subject: I ❤️ you, WA-08.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125409051/601694439/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDUyN2M5Ni0wMTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP9FMvjDP4oqO66ci9-NYbzEsesDRKutg0W8YSo8hdc=&emci=d7fef6c1-f608-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=14527c96-010a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

This Valentine's Day, I want to send a love letter—not to Washington, D.C., but to our home. To WA-08.

During the colder months, there's nothing I look forward to more than cozying up with a book and a whole-milk latte, or relishing the magic of freshly fallen snow.

I love the early mornings in the Cascades, the quiet beauty of our trails and rivers, the majesty of Mt. Rainier, and the small towns and neighborhoods that make this district so special.

I love stopping into local coffee shops and small businesses, chatting with neighbors about their families, their worries, and their hopes for the future.

And I love that WA-08 has a quiet beauty that makes even visitors feel at home here.

But it's not just the scenery— _it's the people, too._

Small business owners, families, and neighbors look out for one another. That's why I fight for WA-08 every single day in Congress. Because everyone deserves to love where they live, to know their community has their back, and to have a representative who will be their voice and stand up for them.

I want to continue to serve you in Congress and keep WA-08 a place we all love and cherish. Will you chip in a donation to my campaign today to help me keep fighting for you? Our mid-month deadline hits at midnight tonight >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-q1-em-2026?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125409052/601694440/1210615431?refcode=em26_260214_mm3_fndd_gq_act___kimpers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em26_260214_mm3_fndd_gq_act___kimpers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=14527c96-010a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&refcode2=14527c96-010a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDUyN2M5Ni0wMTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP9FMvjDP4oqO66ci9-NYbzEsesDRKutg0W8YSo8hdc=)**

Your support makes it possible for me to keep fighting for the place we all love.

—Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Tobias Read
subject: The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against me.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em]
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
It's unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Let me be clear: I did not and will never hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies want to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.
Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 within 72 hours to demonstrate our response to this abuse of power.
Can you help ensure my campaign is ready for this fight and send a donation now to defend Oregon and have my back? I will continue communicating directly about protecting our elections and that takes resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260214em]
Trump’s DOJ lost this last round and we await their next step. But we know they won’t stop meddling in our elections.
Thank you,
Tobias Read

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie's final book wasn’t about politics...
body:
The quietest thing he ever did was the most powerful| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e78f577d4e146009b411981e55b7305&_e=IHLm4Bc8rvZiD36dAo6v8m0iOX29IJo2K3BdiWUcaxAVv9tTA8HVD9QjgFZLe2NBR5KT3qEE9nORi34Vh7tf5-JmfHOqyA0BLHRLtD9dWh2UqcK-PcsutRbmU1MDj88JgGAPXtxBDFPxIK1LxYm-VbaEbb_sEIE-B0_XyNXt05PTF87dHJMMIZ02FGmpUxd53-xZZzsf9EXiWFVnqM_rs8Uuc5mur71e-GIGyUWLyaFbYin2lYqrpxtAxnliB1pB4PxZq2CZn9W61jPgvvSGaY6rs4tt_w7m-b54EI8EsUTzINcNHlPVvqF1ndmF2cTUcT80smSHPhzZOxJrz4ShIdN_nQLVu98gaJwTGsxy3fzVzF2sOJbKlmXkfvAnw-WkLa67ohT3zudHYzAFYFblI2kqh2CYkCPszd6S-SKfHgeg8z9DO5EhuRQrSThqKiEVQUvbGyRehRD04CHqQzJEnP4i89iOzGWvm3PZlZXH1KVnPIH9_5VRKDJToEI3F3IKn84zqKX-nAFWzxELqV0LkS7xHA1_wxpjlRYVDGe_P0rGXDpn6L5KDlRtyEmT8XJ9mb51UIim5D-wGy5KhwyiaLd3zRxM5QEYqmz-7fUvWov11zxXheHFIezKaU4Jp8yncX4WM0Y30pcaiXOJnpY9rdNpAZPp9WeGSpBBdhVcafxQDUQAUwrlJF4Sssnmazls)
---
| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

clean_body: The quietest thing he ever did was the most powerful| | | | | Fellow Patriot, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Each and every dollar matters in this battleground Senate race, which experts say could decide Senate control. **With so much at stake, falling short simply isn't an option, so I need your immediate help to close the gap.**

Hi null, it's Haley writing to you with a very straightforward question:

**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to donate $5 – before my crucial mid-month fundraising deadline – to help me win Michigan's battleground Senate race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14043?t=5&akid=2245%2E49239%2Ed1HKu7)**
What if I told you that there is no path to flipping the Senate blue unless we protect Michigan's Senate seat?
What if I told you that I'm statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent, Mike Rogers, I'm doing especially well among independent voters, and your gift could help me surge ahead in the polls?

What if I told you I was born and raised in Michigan, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you that national Republicans and their dark money super PACs have already started pouring money into Michigan, and that the worst is yet to come?

What if I told you Trump and his MAGA Republicans could eclipse $80 million in spending, which is what they spent last time trying to flip Michigan red?
Null, I can win this race. But only with committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. That's why hitting my $175,000 mid-month fundraising goal – one donation at a time – is absolutely crucial.

**[So will you chip in $5 to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14043?t=6&akid=2245%2E49239%2Ed1HKu7)**

Haley

name: Amanda Gonzalez
subject: Dear Democracy… a love letter
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Amanda for Colorado
body:
| | | Dear Democracy, When you love someone, you don’t just like the idea of them. You learn them. You notice them. You show up for the unglamorous parts. I’ve seen you up close. I stay past 3 a.m. on election nights, making sure every single vote is honored and counted. I field threatening emails and calls from voters who’ve been fed lies, inviting them to come tour and get their questions answered. I’ve stood against even members of my own party when they said improving access to voting wasn't a good idea and I’ve lost friends over it. I’ve also been part of the quiet, careful work behind the scenes, too: the checklists. The long days. The bipartisan teams pulling ballots from drop boxes in bitter cold and snow. I've seen people who don’t agree on much standing in the same line anyway, trusting the same rules. And the hundreds of election workers who power our democracy. That’s why I love you—not as a slogan, but as a practice. **Because democracy is how we protect what we love** : the people we’d pick up from the airport even if it’s a 5 a.m. flight, the neighbor we’d shovel out, the kid we want safe at school, **the right to live here without fear** , the life we’re trying to build. It's how we protect our rivers and our forests, our culture and our identity, our rights and our freedoms. People keep trying to claim you, Democracy. Like you belong to one side. Like you’re up for sale. But you don’t pick sides. **You belong to the people.** I won’t leave you alone with people who only love you when they can control you. You deserve better. Love,
Amanda P.S. Valentine’s Day is for choosing what you’ll show up for.[If democracy is on your list, chip in $10 or $25 so I can keep showing up for Coloradans, face to face across the state](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqum6oshDjP8NRpbzhRH5VoGgfsGEd1_X3AQhfcn_f1pr-CbHR-54SpyGkbaPUpDtlkszmgOfUotrnYhkt1HApNWzlSk5ST7MkYeSiGyK3gz5AHdVT52xN0obOTWpIzBMe3QOJtFxg6a7e5_63bAScyv6d6aQBc4ylqitPrR7SGGTmZEZ2RJayLQaBdWMO4ErD8KwQ3yakV1vTxGpHdED-ICoKiiIuI5Jpam-iZYJSWqVmvgVPDjUsEctSxeB4cC4wbYpcjW7rrz-Ea5JPcBNu46_42ahgNeSEq3FIG5PSwoRyrrFGBJiZI7H_zTwLhBgXOhFOUp09TK1MxjEPVyYfgx/4o6/QWId3axjQla-rUbcYcThKw/h0/h001.RyBxJ-5oyuAWTUEZdc_iZPtG70r039rr_NoaA7lbp1s).

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Amanda Gonzalez is currently serving as the Jefferson County Clerk and County Recorder. She is an attorney, nationally recognized elections expert, and policy analyst. She has held positions as a community organizer, staff attorney, professor, small business CEO, and nonprofit executive director. Amanda’s career has been defined by a steadfast commitment to making government work better for people. Her leadership has modernized voting systems and strengthened public trust in elections. Paid for By Amanda for Colorado. Registered Agent Ashton Narzisi. | | Sent via . name: Team DNC
subject: Claim your 2026 DNC Member Card!
body:
---
Derek, We’re rapidly approaching our February mid-month deadline, and in just a moment we’re going to ask you to [**chip in to the DNC to reserve your Official 2026 Member Card.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026-member-card?refcode=em_20260214_6062_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6062_22930333_xNt_AJ&akid=6062%2E22930333%2ExNt_AJ) But first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why this deadline matters — and why your support makes a difference, especially right now. **November’s midterm elections are right around the corner, and we already have boots-on-the-ground working to mobilize voters and elect Democrats up and down the ballot, all across the country.** We know that to win anywhere, we have to organize everywhere. That’s exactly what we’re doing. We’ve already launched a first-of-its-kind initiative to register hundreds of thousands of new Democrats in key battleground districts. Derek, initiatives like this, along with all the other work that must be done before November, takes a massive amount of resources. At the DNC, we know none of it is possible without our team of grassroots supporters. [**If you’re ready to join us, we hope you’ll consider chipping in $7, or whatever you can afford, directly to the DNC today to help us organize across the country and ensure that we’re able to flip Congress and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026-member-card?refcode=em_20260214_6062_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6062_22930333_xNt_AJ&akid=6062%2E22930333%2ExNt_AJ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026-member-card?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260214_6062_fr&refcode2=6062_22930333_xNt_AJ&akid=6062%2E22930333%2ExNt_AJ)**

name: Graham Platner
subject: Susan Collins, Chuck Schumer, and AIPAC are trying to bury us before we even get started
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=021426_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=021426_1]
Peter,
Janet Mills just entered the race against Susan Collins. So you’re about to get a million fundraising texts and emails from Mills and her campaign (if you haven’t already).
I’m new to this whole politics thing, but I’ve begun to learn how this works: After you donate to any establishment Democrat, Chuck Schumer and the DNC turn around and use your email address and phone number to put their thumbs on the scale – propping up their choice, even when that person is not the strongest candidate in the race.
It’s all part of the corrupt system in Washington. Corporations buy candidates through corporate PAC checks. Special interest groups like AIPAC pour millions into Super PACs. And Chuck Schumer and the DNC buy loyalty by sending millions of texts and emails to funnel money to milquetoast candidates, even when they don’t have the best chance to win.
I’m not the choice of corporations, AIPAC, Chuck Schumer, or the DNC. And that’s exactly why I’m the Democrat who is finally going to actually defeat Susan Collins and turn Maine blue.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a Democrat who will actually support Medicare for All and call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide.
But I’m going up against Susan Collins, AIPAC, and the entire DC establishment. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I am counting on folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Outrage then Action PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=021426_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=021426_1&amount=25]
This is a pretty pivotal moment in our campaign, so no amount you can afford is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=021426_1]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

name: Voter Action Project
subject: A bill to stop (if you ❤️ voting...)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]

After the House passed the SAVE America Act ( the latest version of the anti-voting SAVE Act ), the Senate is all we have left to stop this suppressive legislation from becoming law ahead of the midterm elections , folks.

Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this new SAVE America Act because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $35 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021426_1&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=021426_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021426_1&amount=35]
We know the SAVE America Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before November, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021426_1&amount=35]
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=021426_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=021426_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=7i3WkaEP%2FxIxKKgOwSu1Nl0DzGNrTF0FH%2BJF8ZEJO8%2FGTLdydcklOcOrY6mzCD9bgLl2di2ABuYu%2FbMS3NqmeHBevXzg06DJfgceRK6QJnNlyIoiHbZixRnjZKl6JEu6MWuZf31ZW8pIhFZS7lFfVWIbOLvKwPHUm49zwwzdLdF9c1%2BF3DioHEaZV8TIpA%2BL%2F5ux5UeXFb%2B6j4uBpKv2XkxMAtFVvt3%2F312Yz%2Faniyj4LY7eBPOp5qHf%2FS0Mb%2BqtQx8WMGfM8y5U2e1HjCIRkKRfrKrmbqBAcjMuDLGYKBAAQ7NGefyL%2Bi0I6wrkppFPftu2Y79xDIovcqIQEq3DqdzBal5JFrLqdLj9rZqsCaNVCzmsJ%2BOkqhU35MqZLEjGD3Wuf8skZxlxWKgg4vYD9v0L2wkhgBs4U8%2Fv%2BeMT%2BmI%3D .

subject: Love America? Back the SAVE America Act Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajulkdk-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, Happy Valentine's Day! 💕Today, we celebrate love for our families, friends, and especially this great nation.Under Chairman Bryan Steil's strong leadership as Chair of the House Administration Committee, the [House just passed the SAVE America Act](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajulkdk-didthutlhu-y/)! This commonsense bill requires proof of U.S. citizenship to register for federal elections and a valid photo ID to vote, restoring trust and making it easy to vote but hard to cheat.As Chairman Steil said: "American elections should be for American citizens only. Voter ID and proof of citizenship are commonsense principles... These reforms will restore Americans' faith in our elections." [SUPPORT THE SAVE ACT](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajulkdk-didthutlhu-j/) This Valentine's Day, turn your love for country into action. Your support will help: Push the SAVE America Act through the Senate, Defend these reforms from attacks, and Elect more Republicans committed to election integrity![A gift of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give makes a real difference.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajulkdk-didthutlhu-d/)Thank you for standing strong. Together, we'll keep elections honest and American.-Team WisGOPP.S. Give the gift of secure elections this Valentine's Day. Your contribution helps make it happen! name: Leslie Rutledge
subject: Do you support ICE?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR LT
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=863876ca64&e=624a44d946)
---
| | Peter,

The men and women of ICE do one of the toughest jobs in America.

_They track down dangerous criminals.
They combat human trafficking.
They risk their lives every day enforcing our laws._

Yet attacks on ICE are increasing, and the media keeps claiming that support for law enforcement is fading.

**I do not believe that for one second.**

Arkansans believe in law and order. We believe in secure borders. And we believe in standing with the brave men and women who protect our communities.

[That is why I am asking you to take just 60 seconds to respond to this important poll and let us know where you stand.](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=8e7a5c0440&e=624a44d946)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Presidential 1776 Award - Registration Now Open
body:
Deadline to register is Feb. 21st!
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019c5f0f60f2-234b598b-a922-485b-b596-b925c33e3fd6-000000/9oogqNXgL5XQhyphWphnBXC6UHTcirFWBFuTdrTIQAQ=444)Patriot–Please see the announcement below from the White House. It’s an incredible opportunity for American high school students in grades 9-12! Note that we also checked to make sure that homeschooled students are allowed to apply, and it is open to them as well.The deadline is approaching fast, so please share this with any highschoolers you know as soon as possible!**Presidential 1776 Award - Registration Now Open** Registration is now open for the [ _**Presidential 1776 Award**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.presidential1776award.org%2F/1/0100019c5f0f60f2-234b598b-a922-485b-b596-b925c33e3fd6-000000/eWLpewnYhZvIlE1jA8Myozxv_7o_zPqLizc2g2hHHec=444), a national history competition for high school students celebrating America’s 250th Birthday. This is an exciting opportunity for students to showcase their civic knowledge and compete for **major scholarship prizes**.Please share this opportunity widely with your students, families, colleagues, and networks—and encourage eligible students to register before the deadline.**Registration Window:** Feb 1–21, 2026**Online Test Window:** Feb 22–28, 2026**Sign up today:** [ _**www.presidential1776award.org**_](http://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/http:%2F%2Fwww.presidential1776award.org/1/0100019c5f0f60f2-234b598b-a922-485b-b596-b925c33e3fd6-000000/XBpVn-5OU0mKc1XTi3Dt3vEoU7k06J8aMYmiet2Lhco=444) _(_[__See this flyer__](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fdocuments%2FPresidential-1776-Award-Flyer.pdf/1/0100019c5f0f60f2-234b598b-a922-485b-b596-b925c33e3fd6-000000/0QuRVTV91WCB2KOWBDwPSwof18K-Knflj7M1XERAdqM=444) _for full details and QR codes.)_[ SIGN UP](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.presidential1776award.org%2F/2/0100019c5f0f60f2-234b598b-a922-485b-b596-b925c33e3fd6-000000/kaEZrtIISZRQuWyr5vbm8SJy6Rf69IDcT7MUxMhMlGQ=444)In liberty

clean_body: Deadline to register is Feb. 21st! –Please see the announcement below from the White House. It’s an incredible opportunity for American high school students in grades 9-12! Note that we also checked to make sure that homeschooled students are allowed to apply, and it is open to them as well.The deadline is approaching fast, so please share this with any highschoolers you know as soon as possible!Presidential 1776 Award - Registration Now Open Registration is now open for the , a national history competition for high school students celebrating America’s 250th Birthday. name: Kara, AZ Dems Voter Protection Team
subject: Arizona has lost more election officials than any western state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Arizona has had more election official turnover than any Western state since 2020. Threats and harassment are driving people out. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125410496/601737701/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFhNmU0YmItMTQwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SZMTTo6Gp01Lz3hE3e5fsJl_zwA_fam7tw2wqiS01J4=)
---
Hi there, Kara here from the Arizona Democratic Party's Voter Protection Team. A new report shows Arizona has had more turnover in local election administration than any other western state since 2020. All 15 of our counties have experienced turnover in at least one chief election position. More than 250 people have left election administration roles across 11 western states since November 2020. Arizona leads them all. **Here's what's driving election officials out:** Threats of violence. In five recent Arizona cases, individuals called for election officials to be killed. In Yavapai County, one official needed security from the sheriff at their home. Pressure to break the law. In Cochise County, the Elections Director resigned after being asked to turn over ballots for an illegal Republican hand-count. She called the environment "physically and emotionally threatening." Relentless harassment. Two weeks before the 2024 election, police arrested a man for shooting at the DNC office in Tempe. The result: By 2023, 98% of Arizona had new officials running elections compared to 2020. Our most dedicated public servants are being forced to flee their positions leaving our local elections offices with vacancies at the very moment we need them most. [**Can you chip in to help boost our voter protection efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125410497/601737702/1861397980?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFhNmU0YmItMTQwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SZMTTo6Gp01Lz3hE3e5fsJl_zwA_fam7tw2wqiS01J4=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125410498/601737703/1861397980?contactdata=knkUPpuxIOFQ6gXnXlYT3UNzeJ20dRlgQdIRFsK9H6dM8F6avyFqCiuaG3F1IDCtZD26kyQe1bWb7JAdppneocNOv3vDRfxYshQxU+hnKx0h6YMsBpZt/ugDhAquqQTn0vkpUEzu/f1glzdQvNNPKg==&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFhNmU0YmItMTQwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SZMTTo6Gp01Lz3hE3e5fsJl_zwA_fam7tw2wqiS01J4=)
---
This matters because experienced election officials are essential to secure elections. When they're driven out by threats, our democracy suffers.
After Joe Biden won Arizona in 2020, Republicans manufactured baseless fraud claims that directly led to sustained threats against our local election officials.
In Cochise County, after the Elections Director resigned, the position had multiple people who each served fewer than six months, one of which explicitly cited "intimidation" by election deniers as influencing their decision to leave.
With Katie Hobbs running for reelection this year, there will continue to be immense pressure on local election administrators. As former Maricopa County Recorder Stephen Richer said: "The attention is not going away from Arizona anytime soon."
We need resources to support our voter protection efforts across all 15 counties. Every dollar helps us train volunteers, monitor elections, and respond to threats against election integrity.
Thanks for supporting this critical work,
Kara
Voter Protection Team, Arizona Democratic Party
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125410499/601737704/1861397980?contactdata=knkUPpuxIOFQ6gXnXlYT3UNzeJ20dRlgQdIRFsK9H6dM8F6avyFqCiuaG3F1IDCtZD26kyQe1bWb7JAdppneocNOv3vDRfxYshQxU+hnKx0h6YMsBpZt/ugDhAquqQTn0vkpUEzu/f1glzdQvNNPKg==&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFhNmU0YmItMTQwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SZMTTo6Gp01Lz3hE3e5fsJl_zwA_fam7tw2wqiS01J4=)

From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously. There's a lot of people in the swamp who like to make empty promises. I 'm proud to say that I'm not one of them. When I say something, I mean it. So when I promised my fellow Republicans I'd have your responses ready, I was ready to go to any length to get them. I look forward to reading your responses, JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | | | | I know how much you have to share with MAGA.

If you're receiving this message, congratulations, you've proven yourself.

This is Trump-Endorsed MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds. Every day of President Trump's second term, I've been fighting alongside him to put America FIRST again.

And today, President Trump has given me his most critical mission yet: **ignite the MAGA Movement for a Decisive Victory in 2026.**

So I'm compiling MAGA's TOP SUPPORTERS for a special invitation to join my MAGA Advisory Board.

If you choose to accept, you will receive critical messages regarding our movement, and I will request your direct feedback.

Truth be told, the MAGA Movement wouldn't be where it is today without your feedback, and I think we can both agree, it's time for an UPGRADE.

All I'm asking you to do is answer a few but CRITICAL questions, sign your name, and I will place you on my MAGA Advisory Board.

subject: A little love for Oregon ❤️

body:
Final hours. We’re still short
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajkukit-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,I know it's Valentine's Day, so I'll keep this short.[We're heading into the final hours of our weekly fundraising push](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajkukit-hhlrhljhit-y/) -- and we're still short of our $20,000 goal.This campaign is about love for Oregon.
Love for our communities.
And a belief that we can do better than the direction we're headed.I've spent my career serving locally -- solving problems, leading through crisis, and holding systems accountable. I'm running for Governor because I believe Oregon deserves leadership that shows up prepared and delivers results, not excuses.If you've been waiting for the right moment to contribute, this is it._**Every donation today helps us:**_
* Reach more voters
* Stay competitive statewide
* Build the campaign needed to win

Can you make a quick contribution before the day ends?[Please donate here!](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ajkukit-hhlrhljhit-j/)Thank you for believing in this campaign and in Oregon.Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor

name: Harry Dunn
subject: not normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hey friend, it’s Harry Dunn.

I’m about to ask you to do something *really* important.

[**I recently launched my campaign for Congress to represent Maryland’s 5th district. So I’m asking you to be a Founding Donor to my campaign. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103360?t=6&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)

What is happening right now is *NOT* normal.

→ Trump’s ICE agents terrorizing neighborhoods, using children as bait, and killing Americans in the streets is *NOT* normal.

→ Trump’s MAGA enablers in Congress are letting him treat the Constitution like it's optional. They're ignoring subpoenas. They're refusing oversight. They're acting like Trump is a king instead of a president. Again...this is *NOT* normal.

→ Trump rigging Congressional maps to add GOP House seats, fighting to END Vote-By-Mail to silence Democrats, and calling for Republicans to NATIONALIZE the 2026 elections is *NOT* NORMAL.

I’m *NOT* trying to freak you out. But our democracy is on the line. I swore an oath to protect the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.

[**Right now, we can’t leave anything up to chance. So can I count on you to split a $10, $25, or $50 donation today between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to fight back against Trump and defeat his House Majority?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103360?t=7&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Harry Dunn and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103361?t=8&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103362?t=9&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103363?t=10&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103364?t=11&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103365?t=12&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
When there is so much to be devastated and, quite frankly, pissed off about, it’s easy to lose hope. I’m just as frustrated as you are about the world today.

**But I need you to listen to me:** Not giving this race our all and letting Trump keep his stranglehold on the House won’t fix anything.

Democrats need to buck up, lean in, and get sh*t done.

If you agree this is what it’s gonna take to win a Democratic majority, then I need you by my side during this campaign.

Because I know, with your help, we can win this seat, win a Democratic House Majority, and make this country *actually* work for working people.

[**That’s why it’s so important that you donate $10 today. Can I count on you to help?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103360?t=13&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Harry Dunn and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103361?t=14&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103362?t=15&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103363?t=16&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103364?t=17&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103365?t=18&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)
Together,

Harry Dunn
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=23010%2E878179%2ES4_Swn)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It's simple, but sadly, bleak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

| Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are now cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1q3tc0nsq5klpguak23uln1pnh7klumc1sltf6o_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)
__
---
But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN this trial is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my new Defense Trust._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Defense Trust to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5rlg6o56mdmgkh0t31tb5amsq1c2but2lbjv4o_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57u8th8hk1tkfik4bliecqa5bm594nrnhhv2a30_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s8le195s210o4p6mapl6riasmp1kdgj2o37uno_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zagpkal6aih8soverd8rg03pr7erbtk1op9og2i0_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp95g1ng0p8bdqs5k0d9c1ht596dirmq9gve2alg_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3n281df80fspg7liccggvj5i3jmge5e0fpa9j8_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chimap74cph2bs)

Thank you and God bless you,

Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN this trial is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE. And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my new Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgpj937crbcq4pvtbvnanpreie6lvutq4mgh705o_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chhmcp36c9h2bs)_

| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcc3j48uvq5pn2tdum98u2vbb4urqnqm2atc820o_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chhmcp36c9h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuq91ojtdtb59mil94fitdq69qlsqm0hphedjlo8_rp22sh2s8i6epr4chhmcp36c9h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Take a close look at the image below. You’ve likely walked past this corner of 5th Avenue a dozen times. You might even recognize the world-famous jewelry store at its base. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Take a close look at the image below. You’ve likely walked past this corner of 5th Avenue a dozen times. You might even recognize the . But look at what is happening directly above it. A photo of this specific architectural "anomaly" , and for a good reason. Most people think this building was built by luck. They’re wrong. Hidden inside the blueprint of this tower is a that shouldn't legally exist. It involves a "ghost asset" that most Americans have never heard of, yet it’s the reason this tower stands 20 stories taller than its neighbors. Once you see how the owner pulled this off, you’ll never look at real estate — or your own investments — the same way again. | | Sponsored Content | • | Golden Portfolio ---|--- • | Behind the Markets • | Safe Money Report | | | | | brоught tо уоu bу **Іnception Media, LLC. tо stоp rеcеiving mаrkеting cоmmunicаtiоn frоm us. # IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| | Local governance often reveals larger questions about power, property rights, and the institutions we trust to preserve both. This week's Sunday Bulletin examines eminent domain disputes, constitutional principles under pressure, cultural battles at major institutions, and the reality behind Pennsylvania's latest budget proposal.
**LOCAL GOVERNMENT** : Radnor Township moves forward with plans to condemn 17 acres of Valley Forge Military Academy property for recreation use, prompting warnings from VFMA lawyers about federal government involvement and Supremacy Clause conflicts. The Foundation's chairman asks: "Now we know how Greenland feels."
**POLITICS** : Six candidates vying to replace retiring U.S. Rep. Dwight Evans squared off in a forum, with most holding similar positions on healthcare, antisemitism, and immigration enforcement. The race may ultimately come down to personality, funding, and who voters believe can best fill Evans' shoes.
**SPORTS** : Phillies ace Zack Wheeler speaks publicly for the first time since surgeries ended his 2025 season, expressing optimism about his recovery and reaffirming his commitment to helping the team chase a World Series before his planned 2027 retirement.
**FROM THE EDITORS** : A tribute to Justice Sandra Schulz Newman, Pennsylvania's first elected female Supreme Court justice, who broke barriers through sheer force of will. Plus, an editorial on separation of powers after a grand jury refused to indict six members of Congress over a video criticizing the administration.
**OPINION & ANALYSIS**: The Philadelphia Art Museum's firing of "woke revolutionary" CEO Sasha Suda offers lessons about institutional capture. And Guy Ciarrocchi dissects Governor Shapiro's "cotton candy budget" — a multi-billion-dollar deficit plan that depletes reserve funds while advancing left-wing energy ideology.

---

# Sunday, February 15, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1953, 17-year-old Tenley Albright of Boston, who had contracted polio seven years earlier, became the first American woman to win the World Figure Skating Championship in Davos, Switzerland. She called it her "best" performance. [See her 1953 U.S. Nationals performance here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EFuqzAQANDTmF2QZwADCy_y9YWiSskqStUVsuMhTGpwhE0ievqqvUIv8Bbv_dgfDXuebyczkU5D6Gd6RU8p0dIvq-UQJ6LE843naZ35Ok4hph4lqp3EHVS9M-y3vsycHoiQiow01DVAVSipslEX0DS1A4vVUBsnFZoWri0igEFSCBnrH00iVABSlSo3g20bW7jSVhawNaKU5DiFJb8HntNIg9_Ck5b8GqbM6zGlRxTFXmAnsNvCmtbcksDu6_7RNefx8LnuRdFFFsX_Cjd17g6X05uM9vL4ly3aPV7sPUdVi1LeJsP-101_ynhq_A4AAP__vB9xuw). Gymnast Mary Lou Retton, who captured the hearts of American viewers at the [1984 Summer Olympics](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Dtu6zAQheHVUJ0FPiW7YHGBG1dxmgQIUhEkNbIm4cORRha8-0DZQtpzgK_43y_u4jFhub74DJbG6gpsSwIimN28BqxLBiAsVyx5LRinXBdyksvuwOVBGDd4TA-nm8GOABJUA1b0vRBGdbxrJquOo4kaQgAfozx54MaAilxw3fuoZYN217gURgje6a71Yzgdgxp0MEHIk2eaw4BU5_azYqEJxvSod5jbWHOT7ER0W5j6x-SZyfO2be2jrrQG2P998RQnps53pv5_fTy9fetnfXjVzWyH24Yp4dL1TPNr9ph-SfpTh7uVPwEAAP__4I5xvg), vaulted to a special status reserved for only a handful of athletic heroes. But more recent years have balanced out her once storybook life, as shown in today's _Whatever Happened To..._ section. In Saturday's edition, we included incorrect information about the history of Valentine's Day. [The feast day was established](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUgOGnwU4DR0UtKG5jN7fd0oAc9WwQJnBmjG-_mX2Frf_kK_6vx_KwFCju_-2Jhre0RLxKQGbMS345SuVEZIo7xfMVaT3OVHgBCbqWUKt-8ZbCvXSVNxsiYFuhUcOgVN9qqavDeO_ssE6y39w4Ik4SJrXKUYNblVSyrch8NAmqV0rqTjd2c9PoWt-53imYrOgkeuKUm-9EkQ_cwp3emJs1nVUwB_OziPafgFnAfF1Xc1DhlO9PFzDbzLQGLALmtw0YmSKW2tu7Tpl2ilU2_nlRCFT0IDq5n5bCr81_GvI28BMAAP__V9t2jA) in A.D. 496 to honor Saint Valentine, a third-century priest who was executed on Feb. 14. We regret the error and apologize. We still enjoy Hallmark, especially the Christmas movies, but we will look elsewhere for our history. Today's sponsor is [Fisher Investments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO8jAQRp_G6UCe8SW4cPFLiI6_3TKy4wmZlS8oMSDefsW-wtbfd05xvq7TNXDmevsfCvm-tKnSa8_UO23T9ojc9kLUud64lkfleS1t7xNKtAeJBzBTCpzfkx6SX4iQ1EAexhHAKCvtsHqdRjdqd0ICBaAMQMQl2OSkVCY6O7D_2CSCAZBW22NYojtFlXQ0EdAFoSUl7m07fjeufaUlv9uTtuPcypD92vt9F-qfwIvAy51KzNRbXbiGOnPIn9tnU5cg1Bn0KAXaWagzglFOoN1BqPOw-XR_cc6821FoeSuBf9Gh_ynL0-NPAAAA__82jHLk). Planning your retirement? If you've saved $1 million or more, _The Definitive Guide to Retirement Income_ from Fisher Investments can help you design a strategy to support your ideal lifestyle.
|

## Rubio Affirms America's Stance to Allies
U.S. Secretary of State [Marco Rubio](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQBeDTmM7IHozJFi7S0G3alMjGwzKRf5Axi_b2EZsjpBtppKf3ve_7dLcUKD2-bERTlzwlPPeAtWKZyuEo7xGxUnpQikeieY15rxMI0FwAl_3kLYXXpBpvFkTArkEjh0HKvtNCN6txor9JZ7XvlZRaqcF2AKhtP4tBO2cbMleaANlLKbTSrV3c7cN1XrneSbhZpgR6qrm0P5lSXXEJr_zE0s45NsGstW476z4ZjAzG8zzb2e2X4vozGK-TwRhtyfwt4j4nGzyv5Ygbx6PkDW3iR6Kc-B-S7zgfheqLzzktWDDNyGBsivHbSSHQrgemxCNaCu8a9V_bPQ38BgAA__96YYZc) offered a reassuring message to America’s allies about the administration’s intent to reshape the trans-Atlantic alliance at the annual Munich Security Conference on Saturday. Rubio struck a firm but less aggressive tone after Vice President JD Vance made a harsh critique of European values at the conference last year. The secretary noted that President Trump “[demands seriousness and reciprocity](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCnMR2RvYAxhYuvocvXXolsWMKe_Ceyl0R5-1Nyj3D1SDP6zdd1uToKlG7_XUTLe14SPmtAZixLOT3lGhGZ0o1SPBOtR8yVF5CgWwmtGpbNUXgtfbPZHRGwa9CqcVRq6LTUzWGHCdB3ZtzRaSm9WSczGLUijsY7L3VD9t0mQQ1KSd3ri9v9ZHy39X7wCiYneokbcS6X70yJD9zDKz-wXNYcm2AP5nsV3T8Bs4CZDzwohHcmYD5yxDdIwOy2SIkqF8eUk4B5GDuje9N-lC2eJd-x_TW2FdezEL_aNacdC6YVBcxNsdv9SSFQ1aPo5S06-iw1_KfrHhZ-AgAA__-9roUN) from our friends here in Europe,” with “no interest in being polite and orderly caretakers of the west’s managed decline.” President Trump and his administration [repeatedly have put Europe on notice](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2unDAUBOCngc4r22A7FC7S0N20KZExBziR_2QfluzbR7t5hFuPNJpvfn8tXw4DpuOXi2Bpz0uCuwUggrrUa8XcIgBhOjDFK6E_Y260SC4145IJtWwOw2sZ-83uABKGHqwwRgg1aK770zo9OiVW7aURanNq0sZMZjSTErvn3Pdo321cCiUE16N-uH2dfqzDNq5qFXJy3chhQ8r18SdjohP28MpPqA-fYx_sSVRaN_zs5NzJ-b7vx57_vhXvvJNzyQEJfevk_AGxRlAa-69hrWQKeJzEqF6xsAAuNXZiZN7V-mJPlzw0VnK5AjZiEVpzBzC31uy2vtqt3BgCNm26kR_RYfjsom-d-bTyXwAAAP__40qNVg) for devolving into a culture of political correctness, speech policing, and a security system that heavily relies on U.S. funding and military might.
## President Trump Will Issue EO if Voter ID Bill Fails
President Trump on Friday indicated [he will issue an executive order](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDsO2zAQBU9DdTLIpSTKBYs06pw2pcDPytqAH4NayfHtA-cKqR_wBjO_HuvDUaLy_OkyWt7qWvB9JGTGtrbTUz0yIlN5UslnobDnevAKEqZeQq_GNTpKn3Xoot0QAXWHVhmj1KgnOXW7NVF7tRkZggRvIITgZ6VmGdSmB5ihI_t9k6BGpeQ0TDe3-fvsdRz86BXcnRgkRuLabr8rFd5xS596YbuFmrtkd-bXIfQPAYuAhXfcKaXvJmDZa8avkIDFxUyFDm6OqRYBy2j0rJXpuZ351V-VsfUUe_yD4WS6sK8tYhOwdM3G15tSomMyYpDP7OgfoOP_KnZZ-BsAAP__o6mBEQ) seeking to require voters to present proof of citizenship if the Senate does not pass the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) America Act, which passed in the House last week. In [a Truth Social post](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Ltu4zAQheGnkTobw8tQq4LFAgt13ipASoESR9YEvAgkZcNvHzivkPYc4Cv-z9t8cxw43f-7SLZteU70rIFaozKXc-FcI1HjdOcUz8TrHnNtswRpLiAvAmfvOLxm3Xu7EUlSPVkxDEKgMmD63Y5CrbCOSApGVMuISEqTHrbFDH4YoWf71kAKFAKMNle3LeOfRXm94CLk6DoN5Lnlcv3KnNpOW3jlB5XrmmMf7N7aUTv1t5NTJ6dWzrbXvLIL7_89aijkwr-cXPAf5YxHJ6cj11Y7OQlhwCAORqMQCIDYF-uPJ4fA1Qydhnt0_EP17Vd9HlZ-BwAA__9OyHeC) on Friday, Trump wrote, _“This is an issue that must be fought, and must be fought, NOW! If we can’t get it through Congress, there are Legal reasons why this SCAM is not permitted. I will be presenting them shortly, in the form of an Executive Order_.” An earlier version of the bill, called the SAVE Act, also passed the House last year but stalled in the Senate. The SAVE America Act [would require photo ID at polling places](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OnDAURJ_GdF75DxMXLiJFdBulS4lsfIEbGbyyL2z27SPyCl89mtGc8_s5PQNmPNafYQdPS5kOeLcMRFCnekYsbQcgPFY89vPAedtLo0kJZblQXPZTCpg_k-mSXwAU6A68HAYpe22F7Tbfuyid7CEswlnh5GyNjYsyzhktZmE69PeaULKXUlhjH2GJ7lvUycQ-SuUCMwISUqmPPwUP2mDJn3JBfcxl77LfiF6N6e9MjUyNIc43wZ0xNf4qGQnnxtRI9dxfHFs7gcNfmE_CC3ipCSq_CkHlmHiGFVsOhOXgS8B8FxuV-mF6xMT0D6mF7Acrhq769HpjztjswIxY94D5_yP6ksbLq38BAAD___HOh5Q) and mandate that states obtain proof of citizenship before registering a person to vote in a federal election. A variety of [polling has shown more than 80% of Americans](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OpDAQRE8DGchujGECB5uQzaYbogY34175B9meQXP7FXuFLyuppCq99-e5PpE9x9dvDGTqkdZIV_FUK-U1vzdOJRBVji-O4R15dyGVuoIA3Qno5LhaZP9dVWvNQQQ0tGTkNEk5Dlro1plhFPM876h2Ox5CTXoTByJYhSNapXXL5l4TIEcphVa6x2N7zNtg1TZuEh7YKEGWa8r938SxOjr8N30o93sKrTeu1rM0w68GlgaW67r6L7qU7raB5cZpYMFcefd0xzN5X7ri0tXNqsNAmXeMXXmfZ8q1g2EAqadJ9q4G32Zjz4u956KnRolXQPb_j-uPbH0M_AsAAP__i7Z_Fg) favor requiring a government-issued photo ID to vote.
## List: Most Expensive Automaker Brands
Porsche has [the highest average price of any auto brand](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpSAQhZ8GOw2MilpQbEN3t93SoIw6NwgG8Lq-_cbNfYO_nMk3k--cP6_xZciRX3-bHVVewujxSg5zxjjGc6KQdsRMfiW_n57mbQ8pj8BBlhxK0Y7WkLvHprBqQQSsC1Si64Roa8llsal2GQazyLkbYOms7AfZ1TXnsm1qEP1gC1LPNw6iFYLLRlZmmYZ-qm0ztZOAwbCGo6UcYvUO5POGi7vDB2M1h71wasv5SKz-xUAz0Nd1VWcyOVhzPwADnXKINwM9m5iecQvHQX5loD1e5Xf7ODDQHBhowRnoJ2eJfw_0iT74YOUUjbepfBt_mniX35O-l1w2HDjvGOgiKntc5Bwl2bGGr7sh9980_6jej4J_AQAA__9-f4uA), according to data from Kelley Blue Book. In January 2026, the average transaction price for a Porsche was more than $128,000, led by its best-selling model, [the Porsche Macan](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7tu8yAYgOGrMVsszrYHhn_Jln_tiDB8xF_FIQISK3dfteoddH_1SO_Hzd4cJiz3_y6DGbHaAmdPMAY025471p4BBpY7lvws6I9c-7Cccn2h_MKUDQ7T20oSTATgIAgYtiyMKaGpJocJzNMouIewrEoyr0Guq9g271VYVHQEzbdGOVOMUS317OK-rbsIclc745ubJIWAo7b5s2IZB8T0ri9os6-ZJHOM8eiT-Dfx68Sv53nO3jVXQmj4G038-qit-wNIM-FxYkrY9TJJes8O048z_jT_MvwrAAD__3xbb2A). Land Rover had the second-highest brand cost, with an average January price of more than $101,000. Cadillac, Mercedes-Benz, and BMW rounded out the top five with averages costs of at least $73,000. The [average January price for new cars](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU9jOpA9gAmFi23osu2WyOABJjI2soewuf0qucL2X__pvZ_7eLfkKazfdkfDSxwDXtkjM6YxnRPFvCMyhZXCfgaatz1mHkGCLiWUqh2dJf8am8KZBRGwLtCorlOqrbXUxWZ61WGn214uN9X1vZyglYurJei-VU7Zgsz7TYJqlZK60ZVdpv421a6Z2klBb0Uj0RHHVD0iBd5w8a_4xFTNcS-82ZiPLOovAYOA4bquao6_9uRIYX5PBAwUMq0b53I7JwHDw4byY2D5KBMeMbGAoUjGHRd5T1l3opHrbsl_GPyvME8DfwEAAP__mpd3CQ) was down 2.2% from December 2025's average of $50,318.

**Whatever happened to Mary Lou Retton?** Mary Lou Retton didn’t just win the Olympics in 1984—she _arrived_ there, all grin and grit, and then stuck the landing straight into American pop culture.

In Los Angeles, she became the first American woman to win the all-around gymnastics gold [with an amazing performance](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Dtu6zAQheHVUJ0FPiW7YHGBG1dxmgQIUhEkNbIm4cORRha8-0DZQtpzgK_43y_u4jFhub74DJbG6gpsSwIimN28BqxLBiAsVyx5LRinXBdyksvuwOVBGDd4TA-nm8GOABJUA1b0vRBGdbxrJquOo4kaQgAfozx54MaAilxw3fuoZYN217gURgje6a71Yzgdgxp0MEHIk2eaw4BU5_azYqEJxvSod5jbWHOT7ER0W5j6x-SZyfO2be2jrrQG2P998RQnps53pv5_fTy9fetnfXjVzWyH24Yp4dL1TPNr9ph-SfpTh7uVPwEAAP__4I5xvg), collecting five medals and becoming the first female athlete ever to grace a Wheaties box. What followed was the full American celebrity package: endorsement deals with everyone from McDonald's to Vidal Sassoon, a career as a motivational speaker, a seat on the President's Council on Physical Fitness, and even [a turn on _Dancing with the Stars_.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9q8zAUBfCnkbcY_bOTDBo-CIFvSIdCm5LFXNlX8S2yFaTruHn7ko5du_4OnAPnfOpOQJHm6wtM6Dikbsa1RGTG3OXFUyoTItN8pXlaZurHKRXutNTtRuqNaroBKD46Ww0uIGo0FTq13SrVmFa21eishd7sgzYemh4MBNhZHbzRtvEKZVORe7ZJrRqlZGvbGoLf77wZrG-80nsQVuJAnHL9mWjmEUN8pDvmuk9TFd3IfCvC_BP6KPRxXdf6kRZePD7zpwD3ozDHuzAHvMxvXx_n93D5L3QbqbAwh9dfXBgydxkGSsIcVJXdcFspRirtVlh5nYDizzb_6bC7098BAAD__--Cf9Y) She married, had four daughters, and settled into life as a beloved icon. But the body keeps score. Decades of elite gymnastics, plus a congenital hip condition, meant some 30 surgeries over the years. A 2018 divorce hit her finances hard. Then, in October 2023, a rare and vicious pneumonia landed her in the ICU, where doctors nearly put her on life support. Without health insurance, her daughters crowdfunded nearly half a million dollars, sparking public goodwill _and_ uncomfortable questions about where the money went. By mid-2024, she was still on supplemental oxygen. In May 2025, a DUI arrest in her hometown added another bruise. Today, [Retton’s life looks quieter](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE-DO1aAbZwtKNK427QprYd52ET8rOB5V7595FwhzWikkUYz3_djeUCIIW9fkNCQL0vGd4tIhHWphw2lJUQKeQs5HTmseyqNFiWU5kJxOS4OQjyXoXPGIyrsOzRymqQcey10t5tBWyukBPQg0K_-DgBTb4WbtJz6fuqCudqEkqOUQg_6Bt7eP2zvBjtaqe7ABoEuUKm3nxIy7ejjWV5Yb2tJXTQ70bOx_pOpmak5n8_S6IqYmpVQI1Oz0Jdc7mj8-sfUvJ0pQ6OwNp7AIU9QTx7LwSsSlcyBN4LKITvuIMGGju9YuS8VX1iZmrtq3PMdYgxNT2wQW4IQ_ybRvzi-jPoNAAD__3Hnh88): more recovery, more reflection, and the ongoing work of being Mary Lou Retton—an American sports figure still negotiating what it means to live after the perfect 10 moment has passed. _Did you see Mary Lou Retton in the Olympics or one of her other appearances? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

On this day in 1953, 17-year-old Tenley Albright of Boston, who had contracted polio seven years earlier, became the first American woman to win the World Figure Skating Championship in Davos, Switzerland. She called it her "best" performance. . Gymnast Mary Lou Retton, who captured the hearts of American viewers at the , vaulted to a special status reserved for only a handful of athletic heroes. But more recent years have balanced out her once storybook life, as shown in today's Whatever Happened To... section. In Saturday's edition, we included incorrect information about the history of Valentine's Day. in A.D. 496 to honor Saint Valentine, a third-century priest who was executed on Feb. 14. We regret the error and apologize. We still enjoy Hallmark, especially the Christmas movies, but we will look elsewhere for our history. Today's sponsor is . Planning your retirement? Rubio struck a firm but less aggressive tone after Vice President JD Vance made a harsh critique of European values at the conference last year. In on Friday, Trump wrote, “This is an issue that must be fought, and must be fought, NOW! If we can’t get it through Congress, there are Legal reasons why this SCAM is not permitted. I will be presenting them shortly, in the form of an Executive Order.” An earlier version of the bill, called the SAVE Act, also passed the House last year but stalled in the Senate. The SAVE America Act and mandate that states obtain proof of citizenship before registering a person to vote in a federal election. A variety of favor requiring a government-issued photo ID to vote. Bacteria, which can then help transform the look of your skin from the inside out. Curious about which foods made the list? . | Whatever happened to Mary Lou Retton? Mary Lou Retton didn’t just win the Olympics in 1984—she arrived there, all grin and grit, and then stuck the landing straight into American pop culture. In Los Angeles, she became the first American woman to win the all-around gymnastics gold , collecting five medals and becoming the first female athlete ever to grace a Wheaties box. What followed was the full American celebrity package: endorsement deals with everyone from McDonald's to Vidal Sassoon, a career as a motivational speaker, a seat on the President's Council on Physical Fitness, and even She married, had four daughters, and settled into life as a beloved icon. But the body keeps score. Decades of elite gymnastics, plus a congenital hip condition, meant some 30 surgeries over the years. A 2018 divorce hit her finances hard. Then, in October 2023, a rare and vicious pneumonia landed her in the ICU, where doctors nearly put her on life support. Without health insurance, her daughters crowdfunded nearly half a million dollars, sparking public goodwill and uncomfortable questions about where the money went. By mid-2024, she was still on supplemental oxygen. In May 2025, a DUI arrest in her hometown added another bruise. Today, : more recovery, more reflection, and the ongoing work of being Mary Lou Retton—an American sports figure still negotiating what it means to live after the perfect 10 moment has passed. Radical far-left dark money groups are pouring millions into Maine this week to try to break my resolve and flip this seat. They don't just want to defeat me; they want to kill the SAVE Act to advance their radical agenda.
I will not be intimidated. I will not back down. But I cannot do this alone.

body:
