## **[Sign Your Name--Pray for Free Speech to Win at Supreme Court](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc-O3CAMxp-G3DICM4SZQw6rRpF62Kqn7RF5wMmgJYCATDVvX2X_PEBvlv2TP3-f_7yaV_TBx_UXbjTahzelGqzvPq5LKs-0l1zwScUAh6Hn0At1EDGhW4zo3GjdIKGjUWgthBouoLr76LR1KG-WUN-UslYIpYS6EZfLmTTyzo_HPg5CCeBcXE9CX7QcYCG-aCcdsDPfs8NG9WRTrFQe2PyDfIzpqFI82bR1Yby3liuTLwxmBjO6JdCK4ZTKymCue86pNAbzYaJfUunfMdCzj3jwcq5pL5ZscsTkJASXV3EFUy6KMxj2tplPgMkpl1Qz2ebj-jXayPl9Y3KiDX34alrcMvo1Mjl9KNm7D1TNZ4aZmj9O_2ZTbBQbk9MbmN8v_Y-3n_13Kl0ZXf7rQ_B10OzM10Pjw3L7_yc9RvgXAAD__-IRosY)**
Dear Fellow American,

On October 7th, 2025, one of the biggest free speech cases was heard at the U.S. Supreme Court!

Kaley Chiles stood alongside her ADF attorneys to challenge a Colorado law that censors her speech in counseling conversations. It forbids licensed counselors like Kaley from having conversations that could help clients regain comfort with their sex--_even if that 's the client's goal._

It's a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle.

Laws like this one allow lies to spread--lies like one's sex can be changed and God makes mistakes with His creation. These laws suppress truth from going forward by forbidding people like Kaley from speaking it in counseling.

Kaley is stepping up to challenge this law. And a win in her case could help roll back similar laws in 22 other states.

**I want you to think about that for a moment. One young woman 's courageous stand could reach countless lives with the truth.**

I've had the privilege of getting to know Kaley over the last few months, and I have been so encouraged by her unwavering hope in the Lord and commitment to the truth.

It's not been an easy road. The law threatens exorbitant fines and even loss of her license if she follows the truth in the counseling room and helps young clients pursue alignment of their identity with their body. She's also facing tremendous backlash for choosing to push back on this law--and more is sure to come.

Our enemy, the father of lies, will work to oppose the truth and those who speak it at every turn.

But your prayers can make a difference. Will you please pray...
* **For Kaley** --that God would strengthen and encourage her, and that she would sense His peace in the months to come as we await the Court's decision

* **For our culture** --that God would use this case to open more eyes to the harms of gender ideology, and that hearts would turn toward the truth of knowing Him

[ Commit to Pray](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc-O3CAMxp-G3DICM4SZQw6rRpF62Kqn7RF5wMmgJYCATDVvX2X_PEBvlv2TP3-f_7yaV_TBx_UXbjTahzelGqzvPq5LKs-0l1zwScUAh6Hn0At1EDGhW4zo3GjdIKGjUWgthBouoLr76LR1KG-WUN-UslYIpYS6EZfLmTTyzo_HPg5CCeBcXE9CX7QcYCG-aCcdsDPfs8NG9WRTrFQe2PyDfIzpqFI82bR1Yby3liuTLwxmBjO6JdCK4ZTKymCue86pNAbzYaJfUunfMdCzj3jwcq5pL5ZscsTkJASXV3EFUy6KMxj2tplPgMkpl1Qz2ebj-jXayPl9Y3KiDX34alrcMvo1Mjl9KNm7D1TNZ4aZmj9O_2ZTbBQbk9MbmN8v_Y-3n_13Kl0ZXf7rQ_B10OzM10Pjw3L7_yc9RvgXAAD__-IRosY) Thank you for your prayers—it’s such an encouragement to know that friends like you are going to the Lord on our behalf! In Christ, **Suzanne Beecher** Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. [Please sign your name to let Kaley and our ADF team know that you're praying for them as we await for the U.S. Supreme Court's decision!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc-O3CAMxp-G3DICM4SZQw6rRpF62Kqn7RF5wMmgJYCATDVvX2X_PEBvlv2TP3-f_7yaV_TBx_UXbjTahzelGqzvPq5LKs-0l1zwScUAh6Hn0At1EDGhW4zo3GjdIKGjUWgthBouoLr76LR1KG-WUN-UslYIpYS6EZfLmTTyzo_HPg5CCeBcXE9CX7QcYCG-aCcdsDPfs8NG9WRTrFQe2PyDfIzpqFI82bR1Yby3liuTLwxmBjO6JdCK4ZTKymCue86pNAbzYaJfUunfMdCzj3jwcq5pL5ZscsTkJASXV3EFUy6KMxj2tplPgMkpl1Qz2ebj-jXayPl9Y3KiDX34alrcMvo1Mjl9KNm7D1TNZ4aZmj9O_2ZTbBQbk9MbmN8v_Y-3n_13Kl0ZXf7rQ_B10OzM10Pjw3L7_yc9RvgXAAD__-IRosY)

clean_body: It’s a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle. | | | Dear Fellow American, On October 7th, 2025, one of the biggest free speech cases was heard at the U.S. Supreme Court! Kaley Chiles stood alongside her ADF attorneys to challenge a Colorado law that censors her speech in counseling conversations. It forbids licensed counselors like Kaley from having conversations that could help clients regain comfort with their sex--even if that 's the client's goal. It's a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle. Laws like this one allow lies to spread--lies like one's sex can be changed and God makes mistakes with His creation. These laws suppress truth from going forward by forbidding people like Kaley from speaking it in counseling. Kaley is stepping up to challenge this law. And a win in her case could help roll back similar laws in 22 other states. I want you to think about that for a moment. One young woman 's courageous stand could reach countless lives with the truth. I've had the privilege of getting to know Kaley over the last few months, and I have been so encouraged by her unwavering hope in the Lord and commitment to the truth. It's not been an easy road. The law threatens exorbitant fines and even loss of her license if she follows the truth in the counseling room and helps young clients pursue alignment of their identity with their body. She's also facing tremendous backlash for choosing to push back on this law--and more is sure to come. Our enemy, the father of lies, will work to oppose the truth and those who speak it at every turn. But your prayers can make a difference. Will you please pray... For Kaley --that God would strengthen and encourage her, and that she would sense His peace in the months to come as we await the Court's decision For our culture --that God would use this case to open more eyes to the harms of gender ideology, and that hearts would turn toward the truth of knowing Him Thank you for your prayers—it’s such an encouragement to know that friends like you are going to the Lord on our behalf! In Christ, Suzanne Beecher Legal Counsel Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. ## Gov Abbott Declares State of Emergency
Gov. Greg Abbott directed the Texas Division of Emergency Management to [activate state emergency resources](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb8GM7rgidoGBJuQzaYbWg94rdSiTMEbnf77LfcXJr91z73nz8fygSmnY_2NO1n-fpXloKtlYqa6eHznUtta8YhHWjfOWCmWWBdQMEoFUg9LxJTfi-mi9SrOuiOrp0nrYVJT3212NM_RD3NPz3EKY-ghBPM0cz-oWT_9DF2yd5kCPWhQplcP33ulRg39HNSA00sYRTFxqQ_eiOkb2yu_y0n1EcreZbsxfzbR_xLgBLjruh4hp_AXtvLVuBx3SoC7bwlwuQTMAtzNFOAUCHDaCHBrOSV6X5glBk4nMjXZGJkk7VRXOsJbVmrlqwZqEjfCKMtLNjqpkmxc6n4Dumrj55VyTm2chFHrjin_X8o_83ta-BcAAP__Hf6PWQ) ahead of severe storms expected to hit parts of the state over the weekend. A storm system was expected to move through the state, with potential for severe weather from the Big Bend region to the Red River Valley. [The system was expected](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu5CAQBNDT4IxR0zb2d0CwibO_6YZWA42NhM0XoPF4T7-aucLGVXoq1Z_v9Ztiiuf2mw427RXyevJVE7fGZbV0p1zqVuj0Z9z2lqiwz76sCDhKQKn06immex06byz4WXVs1DQppSeY-m43GCBYi7N3wergLJMHNyKN1jnSgF00bwxQaYUw9PCwvQUYFfazA01TEAOwjy2XR9u58YtqSHd-cnm4fHTJ7K39VNH_ErgIXK7rehx3yK-_-eR3Q-BCpUWX-J0ytZ2LwOUDST64bHy6W9LO5GUOsvKTC8vacjmqwEXDIK1HF2AeJfvg5dDPX5K-_CC1Ds4BK03KdsX4nyumFOs4iQG2g2L6TGz_d-zT4L8AAAD__wmfjcQ) to produce strong thunderstorms and heavy rainfall, with flash-flooding risk and possible tornadoes. Resources at the ready include the state Department of Public Safety, Parks and Wildlife Department, and the Railroad Commission. The storm also comes [nearly five years](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdF7ZY8CPwsVr6DZtSjTGA1gyeDV2liVfH21-IfWV7tE5n_fpjjHFY_3AnVx9LXk66CyJaiWePF4pc1kZj3DEdasJmUIOPIGCXiqQupsCxnRNbROcV2HQDTltrdadVdY0m4Pee9uFf8qo4I2BYei7GYIOZPsZ1dxE9z5ToDsNqjXq5o1Xqtdghll1aBfRKgqxZr7VjSq9sCzpyk_i25z3Jrmt1kcR5r-AUcA4-4JfpcbjvQoY3zoCxpRnTALGJT5JXoRcJC6VWNaN5MJE3ySRSZ4kmTBccsksa94zcz4bduFxxpRi6a1o1bpjTL_0-rdmTwc_AQAA___IN4Js) to the day of the storm that nearly collapsed the state’s power grid.
## HPD Sketch Artist Helps in Guthrie Case
Former Houston Police Department [sketch artist Lois Gibson](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULty3SAQ_RrUoYFFj-uCIg2d06bUrGAlMeaCB_Za1t9nlMkfuD7v8-d9eceYYt5_45Msf29lyXS2RMxUlxWvVGrbK-aQ435wwkqhhLqAgkkqkHpcAsZ0LUMX7KrCm-7I6nnWepzVbLrDbhgGEx7Tpsk8_GNGIpgGgBHDtKkAXbS3mQI9alCDUf1qVqUmDebNqxHnTQyKQuRSez6I6Rvblq7yRbX35dklezB_NmF-CXAC3HmevU_Rf8BRXo1LvlkC3D1LgEvFYxLg7kwBToEAp80N0E45YL3kf51sH8T-kFg5NpavXIljpSa3UmXG7C-5v_iokaTHRgJcV234PGNKsU2zGNT-xJj-leSfXftl4W8AAAD__-o0jts), who worked 5,089 cases over decades, has come out of retirement to help identify a masked individual in Nancy Guthrie's abduction case. Gibson, who has volunteered her services, used her experience in facial reconstruction from [minimal evidence](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAURL8GMyy4oIwBwSZmb9MNrStchXqMvAJmHP9-y_2Fjburq8_587V8YUzx2H_jk2z7bHk56KyJWqOyrHilXOpe8PBH3ENLWMhnXxYQMHIBXA6Lx5iuRXfersJPsiMrjZFyMMKoLljz2Lw0MEk5reCURKWk12LEbSXj9NRFe48JkIMEoZXoV7UKMUpQkxMDmo1pQT62XPoWqNEH65au_KbSu_zskg2t_VSmfjGYGcznefbfIb_ukMGMpUWXiMF8czGYU3aYGMwhv2rLB6_f1Fzgd682fuDhLr6_WiiReCUsLjCY4TFwPWyjAU8cvCCuFRKfnAJuhgc6Q-O4Kt8V63_OmFKso2Fa7E-M6d_N9n9y3xb-BgAA__-78Iy2) in analyzing the doorbell camera footage from the case. She estimates the perpetrator is between their mid-30’s and early 40’s. “ _I couldn’t stop myself, I just couldn’t stop myself, I wanted to help, I felt the pain. I’ve been in the room with [kidnap victims]... so I wanted to help them_ ,” she said. She also holds the Guinness World Record for being the most successful forensic sketch artist.
## Baylor Slugger’s Historic Night
Baylor first baseman Tyce [Armstrong hit three grand slams](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL8GOqO1DTgpXLwmXV57S7TGC1iycWSvQvj7K_ILt5pipBmd8_Ocnhhi2Nf_mMjyZ8nTTkeNxExlcnjGXOpacPd7WDeOWMhnXyYFahSghBwmjyGeU99668DfZUtWGiPlYMDodrPGKSWN9gRoxvE2LLc7auxdP8hBa3JtsNcYKDlIBb2GzmkHMEql7zMMaJamB_KBc-l4I6YP1iWe-U2lm3Nqo92YX7XR_xr1aNTjOI4uRXd1jXpcMFfMiILPmQSWVLnkfRW8FSLxZRM1Yqoi7ALFionaYv3rCDGGOpqmhzVhiN83_pujt1W_AQAA__9V03vg) in Friday’s season opener against New Mexico State, becoming the second player in college baseball history to hit three grand slams in a single game. Armstrong, a redshirt senior from Magnolia, finished with three home runs, two exceeding 400 feet, and drove in 12 runs as Baylor defeated New Mexico State 15-2 in seven innings by run rule. He is the [second college player](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAQBeDT2J1XwwBGFBRpttu0Ka0BxjYStleA9uf2kTdHSDka6el97-c23SjltC_ftLFrr_mYdn7WzK1xmTy981HqUmiPe1rWlqlwPGKZEHAcAAehp0gpvyfVR-chWtGzE8YIoQ0Y2a8uAHk9BknR2DkAeGulmr2RMjIamPvkzjBAoQWCknDx0gOMAqUNoMnMnQKOqR3l0lZu_KI65_fx4HIJx9Znt7Z2r5386vDa4ZXuJ-B8nUdpKWTu8PpHGdpamIcPaKiZtjpQ2Worx74MkpTVarQKA6rgwSKBJi2sRxoNhr64eH-mnFMdTadg2SjlT4f2v-UeDn8DAAD___VGgZE) to hit three grand slams in one game after Louisville’s Jim LaFountain did it in 1976. No Major League player has ever accomplished the feat, though thirteen players have hit two in one game. Check out Armstrong’s historic third grand slam [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQRp_GdInGMzaGwsWNruiy7ZZoiAew5EBke_Pz9qvkFbb9iu8cne_zeOaY4rZ88VV8fc77uMmjJKlV8jjxK-25LJm3sMVlrYmzhD3kEQHbA-BB2zFwTK_RNMFPEHrdiNfOaW0dOGpWzzPonkgDdd1kp9BZIQskc9caMoGa6N9ngNpqBENwnGgCaDVSfwHLblYGJMS652NdpcqTy5xe-13y8bJfm-TXWm9F0T-Fg8Lh-V4VDqeP-4mLTJySwqFUrj9F4YCAaByitq7VvelcaxUNRdF_hCb7cHvElGJpnTKwXDmmD6f-rc7d428AAAD__zHOdKk).

name: Kevin Ford Jr for State Senate
subject: We Can’t Slow Down Now!
body:
We’re halfway through February, this is the point in the month where momentum can either build or stall. | | | [CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE ABOUT KEVIN](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6991b65a7887e84c5db1dacc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fmeetkford%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D698ca5fbf9fb0e22289fd64b%26ss_email_id%3D6991b65a7887e84c5db1dacc%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2BCan%25E2%2580%2599t%2BSlow%2BDown%2BNow%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2026-02-15T12%253A05%253A17Z&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_698ca5fbf9fb0e22289fd64b&l=en-US&s=Qoz4M4QUQqow7yGJVXL_e1cFRcs%3D)
---
| | [](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6991b65a7887e84c5db1dacc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordcalltime&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_698ca5fbf9fb0e22289fd64b&l=en-US&s=FutCCdCyN2BwlGsTk9WbHfpIKTg%3D)
---
Kevin Ford, here.I wanted to catch you before you start your Sunday. **We’re halfway through February, and I wanted to check in with you personally.**[**Because of supporters like you, our campaign is continuing to grow.**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6991b65a7887e84c5db1dacc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordcalltime&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_698ca5fbf9fb0e22289fd64b&l=en-US&s=FutCCdCyN2BwlGsTk9WbHfpIKTg%3D) We’re organizing volunteers, showing up in neighborhoods across District 24, and having real conversations with voters about what they want and deserve from their next State Senator.But here’s the truth: **this is the point in the month where momentum can either build or stall**.[**The decisions we make now shape what we can do in the weeks ahead. The resources we raise before the end of February will directly support**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6991b65a7887e84c5db1dacc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordcalltime&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_698ca5fbf9fb0e22289fd64b&l=en-US&s=FutCCdCyN2BwlGsTk9WbHfpIKTg%3D):
* Expanding our volunteer operation
* Increasing voter contact across the district
* Preparing for the critical spring stretch of this campaign

That’s why I’m reaching out today.If you’ve already given this month, thank you. Truly. If not, I hope you’ll consider stepping in now and helping us close out February strong.
---

With your help, we can keep moving forward and stay on track to win in June.[**Thank you for being part of this journey with me. I don’t take your support lightly.**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6991b65a7887e84c5db1dacc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordcalltime&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_698ca5fbf9fb0e22289fd64b&l=en-US&s=FutCCdCyN2BwlGsTk9WbHfpIKTg%3D)

We’re halfway through February, and I wanted to check in with you personally. We’re organizing volunteers, showing up in neighborhoods across District 24, and having real conversations with voters about what they want and deserve from their next State Senator.But here’s the truth: this is the point in the month where momentum can either build or stall.: Expanding our volunteer operation Increasing voter contact across the district * Preparing for the critical spring stretch of this campaign That’s why I’m reaching out today.If you’ve already given this month, thank you. Truly. If not, I hope you’ll consider stepping in now and helping us close out February strong. | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- This campaign is powered by people who believe in showing up, doing the work, and building something real together. name: Not again
subject: Rerun from hell for Wisconsin Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dxytjYqObXbG6yfv44uibTr-jzlisS5ayXX04G7dUPRfjq0XzalhJD28BzL_F_N6JgBIUGDBKRaNLhEDlobTBOICJmFrTPkbbvdfBxmq5tTtM8MXlYdnB_z3OLT2R2A0Gede4nH0-xk7QvMxEu80uHsFhLZDQrB4MPwnhw90Kb02ME1Rn-4e3nxQGXx0JxtYLlj9GhSTgdZ6y0HfJ3-ZfKc0WZxOFG5v5pLMXQbCRVA=&c=6jklYfSdpZgOot33ZthZmR2NJYBQAyu17JAmAK9af4hiSSlXeO6Qmg==&ch=TYkfxV8yRi5mi0c-uehxd2ou5CZELcnnf68pFjv9wlQgGhiztIchtA==)
---
| Peter,
The first major test of this year for Democrats is not a congressional or senate race.
In April, the Wisconsin Supreme Court is back on the ballot, and MAGA has their eyes fixated on the court again.
You remember what happened last spring. Elon Musk dumped over $20 million into the race to try and buy the court. Democrats fought back, raising enough money from small dollar donations and outorganized the richest man in the world.
It embarrassed Trump so badly he threw Musk out of the White House and his role at DOGE. Then Elon and Trump had a public breakup, and Musk mostly vanished from politics for the rest of 2025.
But now, Elon is back... just in time for Wisconsin Dems to kick his ass again.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dxytjYqObXbG6yfv44uibTr-jzlisS5ayXX04G7dUPRfjq0XzalhJD28BzL_F_N6JgBIUGDBKRaNLhEDlobTBOICJmFrTPkbbvdfBxmq5tTtM8MXlYdnB_z3OLT2R2A0Gede4nH0-xk7QvMxEu80uHsFhLZDQrB4MPwnhw90Kb02ME1Rn-4e3nxQGXx0JxtYLlj9GhSTgdZ6y0HfJ3-ZfIEiG1u-YU6JH9a3wcimZBw=&c=6jklYfSdpZgOot33ZthZmR2NJYBQAyu17JAmAK9af4hiSSlXeO6Qmg==&ch=TYkfxV8yRi5mi0c-uehxd2ou5CZELcnnf68pFjv9wlQgGhiztIchtA==)
---
Trump and Elon truly are made for each other, wholly incapable of taking "no" for an answer.
---
It's the rerun from hell.
We have two months to organize another defense of this court and MAGA sees it as their opening to claw their way back while Democrats are focused on the House and Senate. Elon is out from the shadows and bankrolling MAGA again and they're plotting revenge for what happened in 2025.
Just like last year, this race will set the tone for Democrats in 2026.
Defend Our Courts is suiting up for this battle. After our huge success in helping protect the PA Supreme Court in November, we are expanding nationwide. Wisconsin is our first major target and we are bringing the same winning formula forward.
But here is the reality. When we launched our defense of PA, we had six months to build our operation. For Wisconsin, we only have two. Four fewer months to raise the money, build the program, and get ready to defeat MAGA again.
We don't have time to waste, we have to ramp up our efforts NOW.
Peter,[ will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare right now to help us defend Wisconsin from a MAGA takeover and set the tone for Democrats for the rest of 2026?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dxytjYqObXbG6yfv44uibTr-jzlisS5ayXX04G7dUPRfjq0XzalhJD28BzL_F_N6ho0MNcJqXHOI4n1K2ve4sNhuX9sUZIQ2bZ1M4CtTpZJzjqKMSg4FLm0Apur2yuTIwKakgWktCoZ8PFVls4XApFbOENsKkBqHJ7aQEhdEZP_VVNiJ3Rv3709eNfW66ul1ucnSzc3Hqk4nBLTerTYxkQCKxtQEJxCAu8AT9II97i2STyF_E-EIZw==&c=6jklYfSdpZgOot33ZthZmR2NJYBQAyu17JAmAK9af4hiSSlXeO6Qmg==&ch=TYkfxV8yRi5mi0c-uehxd2ou5CZELcnnf68pFjv9wlQgGhiztIchtA==)

name: Kelly McKenna, End Chronic Disease
subject: Psst Your chronic disease is likely reversible without meds!
body:
Chronic disease is the number one most urgent crisis our country faces, and ultra-processed foods are a leading cause of this crisis.

|
---

| | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkEFugzAQRU9jdiB7TAxZeFEpYpduu0ST8SQZCWyEDVVvXxGlB-hupPn6eu9_XccryiTx8Ykze9plXPO45Fx-0rbSc01RKEhmzCx5GkGDqzXU5nTkTBU8BWehYm-6zhin276vnt6a9o5wt3Bmcnjr4GSwxR674PhubrYSfzRpMCdjtQHX9EAIxBScg86Fs2r1tgQsnBtKMfO6Y5GdJcZ0XCk2lOZq8s9Slqzsh4JBwZCZtpUbjBxSORIKBo6hfovUbxMFw4I10tGj7LCVeSScF5RHVPbyR6bAvT4pFo5F2QvtUq0-LN8yTZJdp1r9mFGmF0r5_3i7h98AAAD__1hPf18)
Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email, but it's about a dire situation in our country.

**Chronic disease is the number one cause of death and disability in America.**

The stakes are incredibly high:
* Nearly 50% of children today have at least one chronic disease, a rate significantly higher than in previous generations.
* Nearly 80% of young adults are overweight or obese.
* 9 out of 10 American deaths and 95% of medical costs are tied to preventable chronic diseases.

Like me, you probably receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...

They all act like the sky is falling, but they don't provide a lot of details about how their actions can make a difference.

Today, I'm breaking the rules.

Instead of sending you a short email, I'm going to lay out End Chronic Disease's comprehensive strategy to equip individuals to take control of their health and help build healthier, stronger communities.

[But first, I'd like to ask you to donate $100, $50, or even just $10 to support our mission.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkEFugzAQRU9jdiB7TAxZeFEpYpduu0ST8SQZCWyEDVVvXxGlB-hupPn6eu9_XccryiTx8Ykze9plXPO45Fx-0rbSc01RKEhmzCx5GkGDqzXU5nTkTBU8BWehYm-6zhin276vnt6a9o5wt3Bmcnjr4GSwxR674PhubrYSfzRpMCdjtQHX9EAIxBScg86Fs2r1tgQsnBtKMfO6Y5GdJcZ0XCk2lOZq8s9Slqzsh4JBwZCZtpUbjBxSORIKBo6hfovUbxMFw4I10tGj7LCVeSScF5RHVPbyR6bAvT4pFo5F2QvtUq0-LN8yTZJdp1r9mFGmF0r5_3i7h98AAAD__1hPf18)

**The good news is chronic diseases are largely preventable - and in some cases, even reversible - through dietary and lifestyle adjustments within reach.**

I have personally battled chronic autoimmune issues for more than twenty years and have been able to clinically reverse a number of these through preventive health measures such as dietary and lifestyle adjustments.

Unfortunately, most people don't realize what we need to do to mitigate or even reverse our chronic disease crisis.

Here are some of the ways End Chronic Disease (ECD) is addressing this health crisis.
**Taking Ultra-Processed Foods Out of Schools**
An easy win in the fight against chronic illness is identifying and addressing how ultra-processed foods intensify this crisis.

These foods, **which often lack any meaningful nutritional value and are engineered to be as addictive as cigarettes** , have been shown by peer-reviewed science to cause a number of chronic diseases, such as:
* Diabetes
* Obesity
* Heart disease
* Fatty liver disease
* Cancer

And yet, these foods continue to permeate our grocery shelves, our pantries, and our schools.

In fact, American children get an estimated 70% of their daily calories from ultra-processed foods, and much of this is coming from the foods they eat in schools!

ECD educated and advocated to legislators in California about this growing issue, and helped pass a historic bill that is set to phase out harmful ultra-processed foods from school lunches.

**Making SNAP Benefits Healthier**
Ultra-processed foods and foods with added sugar are some of the most accessible foods across our country, yet they directly fuel chronic disease.

To make matters worse, many of these items can be purchased with Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits, which are designed to make nutrition more accessible.

However, End Chronic Disease is working with states to take action against chronic disease by removing items such as energy drinks, carbonated beverages, cookies, candy, and potato chips from SNAP eligibility, in order to better support the program's nutrition goals.

12 states have now successfully removed soda from SNAP eligibility with USDA support -- a key step that will help to tackle chronic illnesses fueled by sugary drinks and a popular measure among voters.

**Steps like this are great first steps for moving the needle toward better health.**

ECD is advocating for reform to address this crisis directly through public policy at the state level and promoting public empowerment through media, storytelling, and education nationwide.

[You can help reverse America's chronic disease crisis by donating today!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkEFugzAQRU9jdiB7TAxZeFEpYpduu0ST8SQZCWyEDVVvXxGlB-hupPn6eu9_XccryiTx8Ykze9plXPO45Fx-0rbSc01RKEhmzCx5GkGDqzXU5nTkTBU8BWehYm-6zhin276vnt6a9o5wt3Bmcnjr4GSwxR674PhubrYSfzRpMCdjtQHX9EAIxBScg86Fs2r1tgQsnBtKMfO6Y5GdJcZ0XCk2lOZq8s9Slqzsh4JBwZCZtpUbjBxSORIKBo6hfovUbxMFw4I10tGj7LCVeSScF5RHVPbyR6bAvT4pFo5F2QvtUq0-LN8yTZJdp1r9mFGmF0r5_3i7h98AAAD__1hPf18)

clean_body: Chronic disease is the number one most urgent crisis our country faces, and ultra-processed foods are a leading cause of this crisis. | | | Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email, but it's about a dire situation in our country. Chronic disease is the number one cause of death and disability in America. The stakes are incredibly high: Nearly 50% of children today have at least one chronic disease, a rate significantly higher than in previous generations. Nearly 80% of young adults are overweight or obese. 9 out of 10 American deaths and 95% of medical costs are tied to preventable chronic diseases. Like me, you probably receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all act like the sky is falling, but they don't provide a lot of details about how their actions can make a difference. Today, I'm breaking the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I'm going to lay out End Chronic Disease's comprehensive strategy to equip individuals to take control of their health and help build healthier, stronger communities. The good news is chronic diseases are largely preventable - and in some cases, even reversible - through dietary and lifestyle adjustments within reach. I have personally battled chronic autoimmune issues for more than twenty years and have been able to clinically reverse a number of these through preventive health measures such as dietary and lifestyle adjustments. Unfortunately, most people don't realize what we need to do to mitigate or even reverse our chronic disease crisis. Here are some of the ways End Chronic Disease (ECD) is addressing this health crisis. Taking Ultra-Processed Foods Out of Schools An easy win in the fight against chronic illness is identifying and addressing how ultra-processed foods intensify this crisis. These foods, which often lack any meaningful nutritional value and are engineered to be as addictive as cigarettes , have been shown by peer-reviewed science to cause a number of chronic diseases, such as: Diabetes Obesity Heart disease Fatty liver disease Cancer And yet, these foods continue to permeate our grocery shelves, our pantries, and our schools. In fact, American children get an estimated 70% of their daily calories from ultra-processed foods, and much of this is coming from the foods they eat in schools! ECD educated and advocated to legislators in California about this growing issue, and helped pass a historic bill that is set to phase out harmful ultra-processed foods from school lunches. Educating Americans on Healthy Options Recent polls indicate that Americans are seeking healthier foods, warnings about sugar, fewer food additives, and reforms that prioritize preventive health measures. Americans are finally claiming agency over their well-being, and their daily habits are the most powerful defense against chronic disease. We're so excited that preventive-health concepts are gaining momentum in our country! Now it's time to turn that enthusiasm into action. End Chronic Disease is committed to reversing chronic disease in America through science-based, prevention-focused education, advocacy, and collaboration. By driving systems change and amplifying real success stories, we empower individuals to take control of their health -- and build a stronger, healthier nation. Making SNAP Benefits Healthier Ultra-processed foods and foods with added sugar are some of the most accessible foods across our country, yet they directly fuel chronic disease. To make matters worse, many of these items can be purchased with Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits, which are designed to make nutrition more accessible. However, End Chronic Disease is working with states to take action against chronic disease by removing items such as energy drinks, carbonated beverages, cookies, candy, and potato chips from SNAP eligibility, in order to better support the program's nutrition goals. 12 states have now successfully removed soda from SNAP eligibility with USDA support -- a key step that will help to tackle chronic illnesses fueled by sugary drinks and a popular measure among voters. Steps like this are great first steps for moving the needle toward better health. ECD is advocating for reform to address this crisis directly through public policy at the state level and promoting public empowerment through media, storytelling, and education nationwide. Best, Kelly McKenna CEO, End Chronic Disease End Chronic Disease, Inc., is a 501(c)(4) social welfare organization dedicated to reversing America 's chronic illness crisis through science-based, prevention-first education, advocacy, and collaboration. Our work is funded by the generous support of our donors. Contributions to End Chronic Disease, Inc., are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: We might be looking at a rematch
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1225%2E1086043%2E72zu43)
Peter, it’s official:
**Wes Moore’s former opponent Dan Cox filed to run again for governor this year.**
That’s yet _another_ Republican opponent who is determined to roll back the progress we’ve made under Wes’s leadership. We might be looking at a rematch — and we can’t take anything for granted in the months before Election Day.
That’s why we’re asking you, Peter: **[Will you endorse Wes Moore for governor? Adding your name will be a powerful statement that you’re in this fight with us.](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/moore-2026-endorse-wes/?source=em-20260215-1&t=2&akid=1225%2E1086043%2E72zu43)**

Thank you!
— Team Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260215-1&t=4&refcode2=1225_1086043_72zu43&akid=1225%2E1086043%2E72zu43)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Chip Roy
subject: Endorsed by Charlie Kirk's Turning Point Action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
I'm honored to earn the support of Charlie Kirk’s Turning Point Action and the millions of conservatives they represent across Texas and the country. |
Fellow Patriot,

I don't ask for endorsements lightly - and I don't accept them unless they mean something.

That's why I am honored to tell you that Turning Point Action has officially endorsed our campaign for Texas Attorney General.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c77c0ddeac30443cb513a61253dd9779&_e=Dn846x2QjgV4eROBxDM6v-KI5Cr8_Zv6IRZhK3aW6Nkabp0Syw186UmPXkgHT2I6jaAeNQwDpdOErx3_sJJdwEHy1uqBVe6B5Qr7TcVllJvQ4n8EoWYW-Kh3yZ57dKpBkCYt4lSoxDVdy9v9_x2RU681sbi4O9H-ogeRIgTMtocBLWz0QR-XS5NIx0DQaAhoFXv49MKsjn5ee2LVCuu6lyOwjUqyqGgRDMfXEmmYdZ0B2E26rrzTf8Kn7Qvu9x52zIPpwU5rYjHqqyCiel2hyITf8FtPdM7f_ga9LQiC37QnOqyPY1nzwmBgS-0aTL7i_Bsu_zFiRQuz3XppM2KDZHrQ8IjwI2kx9RgcKmKn3ZE83vludnqfn3ZU7SRG4K9Q2tIPY7XC_Hl0my623ZT82FjnNecEZy00CxE0I_vmm12ebxmdhJBhCiYcZW0Hj_beCf6pYjVsaHW5K_a5FWbhRXMPg2oKiluJdxsZtNIe6WWlWVTDehGhjI_OzbWThRUQdqT93Bcok_hWflYsRHqe7zcpbn9wvnddn-oOo6B3Ir_-sLPoFQ90U85cZ4S5_DCVqM0csxn5ASQblU_lDOuQ5XDR_BD0Ox_T6En1B_HpjlOxI3w10eWWkc6DUMLGmxozjPTj2WeteZaYm-3bBaIpLxjm57GoYkntmHbNt4XbwYw%3D)
Charlie Kirk's Turning Point Action grassroots organization doesn't just hand out endorsements to politicians who talk conservative and govern weak. They endorsed me because of my constitutionally conservative record. They want leaders who will take on the radical Left, the bureaucratic swamp, and the political class that thinks the rules don't apply to them.

When it matters most, they know I don't back down. I will fight to secure our sovereignty, defend election integrity, protect our constitutional rights, and ensure Texas leads the nation in freedom and the rule of law.

clean_body: I'm honored to earn the support of Charlie Kirk’s Turning Point Action and the millions of conservatives they represent across Texas and the country. | Fellow Patriot, I don't ask for endorsements lightly - and I don't accept them unless they mean something. That's why I am honored to tell you that Turning Point Action has officially endorsed our campaign for Texas Attorney General. Charlie Kirk's Turning Point Action grassroots organization doesn't just hand out endorsements to politicians who talk conservative and govern weak. They endorsed me because of my constitutionally conservative record. They want leaders who will take on the radical Left, the bureaucratic swamp, and the political class that thinks the rules don't apply to them. When it matters most, they know I don't back down. I will fight to secure our sovereignty, defend election integrity, protect our constitutional rights, and ensure Texas leads the nation in freedom and the rule of law. But here's the thing, Fellow Patriot - endorsements don't win elections. They are won by patriots like you. The Left and Establishment are already mobilizing to stop us. They know a conservative Attorney General in Texas who will ACTUALLY enforce the law is a nightmare for their radical agenda. So here's how you can help. TPUSA's endorsement sends a clear message - we're engaged and ready to win, but I need your help. We have to prove them right. In Liberty, Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
There are now just 28 days until the special election in Georgia to fill the seat vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dtIAg1mTavqYpyZ_Un5JemCqrv2B1Pvvfs14awtyMiczIX9C_wrgWZ7EpT0I8xUOn1rIG4PTeFHNLI2ynUrzVmSB9kpal0n96dSTRpNgSxMUmaSgkCQB6Rsfc86FqJ3nmmSfTjYuRisSvGZeVTtbKJ5OuUwdq0vraLFlhRskX9kRRipfL1FIkQ789WEznpUTuG7v9a2dqWMgfzkfu0bx9tJQSecYbngjFoTzWz-UgVI=&c=5vz4HQ0QyI2tRHbtZzOHi3aW3bsMfzyHiqndNWmo3vixBm8hFtIq4g==&ch=Qu8bOBf4YboPK7Bx1WTzmEkpLKkS4dFNNnSTc9fFlS3oZCyoPmek1Q==)

|
Peter,
There are now just 23 days until the special election in Georgia to fill the seat vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Right now the GOP House majority rest on just 1 vote and if Democrats win this special election we deadlock the House.
20 Republicans are running. One Democrat is running. I'm that Democrat. This is how we win. This is how we take back the House -- and put a check on Trump's rampage against our Democracy.
I'm Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. Farmer. And I'm running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it's been missing for years.
[If you're in a position to support this campaign, I need you now more than ever. I'm asking because it's critically important. Right now the GOP House majority rest on just 1 vote and if Democrats win this special election we deadlock the House. 20 Republicans are running. One Democrat is running. I'm that Democrat. This is how we win. This is how we take back the House -- and put a check on Trump's rampage against our Democracy. I'm Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. Farmer. And I'm running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it's been missing for years. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thank you for your support at this critical moment. name: GIFFORDS
subject: 🙏To everyone who cares about ending gun violence in America, please don’t skip this message 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

❗ Team -
To everyone who cares about the gun violence prevention movement, please don’t click away from this important message.

We know it’s a Sunday, so we’ll get right to it: [**Gabby is asking you to make your first online contribution of the year to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260215-1-b&t=1&akid=11255%2E3935704%2EgGLxxm)
We wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important. Let us explain why.

Our gun safety movement is at a crossroads with Donald Trump and his allies in office.
He announced an executive order that puts all of the progress we made in jeopardy.
He’s moving to weaken the ATF.
He has chosen extremely unqualified and dangerous individuals to serve as his top-level cabinet members — including FBI Director Kash Patel.

These are challenging times. There's no doubt about that.
But this isn’t the first time our gun safety movement has faced threats to our progress. If we work together, we can and will overcome these obstacles.

Our first mid-quarter deadline of the election year is at midnight tonight.
The majority of folks who open this email won’t give today; they'll simply click away.
But if everyone getting this email donated even $3, we'd have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever.

[**If you’re ready to make an impact during this pivotal time, please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today, or select an amount below.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260215-1-b&t=2&akid=11255%2E3935704%2EgGLxxm) Our average online donation is around $27. Some give more, others give less. All that matters is that you are helping Gabby in the fight to save lives from gun violence.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&amount=3&t=21&akid=11255%2E3935704%2EgGLxxm)**

clean_body: ❗ Team - To everyone who cares about the gun violence prevention movement, please don’t click away from this important message. We know it’s a Sunday, so we’ll get right to it: We wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important. Let us explain why. Our gun safety movement is at a crossroads with Donald Trump and his allies in office. He announced an executive order that puts all of the progress we made in jeopardy. He’s moving to weaken the ATF. He has chosen extremely unqualified and dangerous individuals to serve as his top-level cabinet members — including FBI Director Kash Patel. These are challenging times. There's no doubt about that. But this isn’t the first time our gun safety movement has faced threats to our progress. If we work together, we can and will overcome these obstacles. Our first mid-quarter deadline of the election year is at midnight tonight. The majority of folks who open this email won’t give today; they'll simply click away. But if everyone getting this email donated even $3, we'd have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever. Our average online donation is around $27. Some give more, others give less. All that matters is that you are helping Gabby in the fight to save lives from gun violence. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** 🙏Thank you. Your support — especially today — is critical. As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Impeach Bondi Now
body:
With even Republicans now getting on board, this can happen
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Impeach Bondi](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19da3a48-2ee2-42f8-a995-5a8cfe0c5bc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0bfe2ae-91a1-4c13-97c4-f3b53cc247e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Pam Bondi has been a nightmare as attorney general. Even Republicans have grown tired of her, with many ready to dump her right now. [**Tell Congress to impeach and remove Bondi NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24d3b4a3-abb2-4555-9c63-a711872a778e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With every day, comes a new embarrassment, a new low, and a new threat to our rights and freedom. And with the disastrous Epstein hearings, everyone saw with their own eyes just how incredibly ill-suited she is for this job. Some Republicans are reportedly so tired of this crap, they are already on board with dumping her. And with many others increasingly sick of defending the indefensible, we could get enough to remove her. [**We don't have to live like this. We don't have to accept this. Fight back, and tell Congress: "Impeach Bondi NOW!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf71cceba-29a8-470c-b9c4-25a58afa4e6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia hoax** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment fraud** - a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn't stop. They kept coming - _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed - winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They 're still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman - the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment conspiracy and nearly killed MAGA - is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year 's biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**

name: Redistricting Action HQ
subject: Let’s end gerrymandering once and for all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Show growing public support for legislation that will put power back into the hands of the people.
|
---

Peter, the redistricting crisis is accelerating across the country, especially as the midterms draw closer. The fair maps movement is taking to the courts, the halls of power, and the ballot box to preserve a level playing field in this year’s election.
But let’s be clear: holding off disaster is not our end goal. Saving representative democracy requires a long-term solution.
**With the Redistricting Reform Act, we can put an end to partisan gerrymandering at the federal level — banning mid-decade redistricting and requiring states to use nonpartisan, independent commissions to ensure fairer elections. **
[**Send a message to Congress right now to show growing public support for legislation that ends gerrymandering for good.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125435376/601788960/-2121636071?ms=eng_aotl_tier1_email_RedistCrisis_email_20260215-AOTL-Tier1-RedistCrisis_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20260215-AOTL-Tier1-RedistCrisis_&utm_campaign=RedistCrisis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4YzllYzA1LTdmMGEtZjExMS04MzJlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTczMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mVQWqz16AvFgNtwHxwNnjKWhiWu5wifMjZGRby3VWtU=&emci=8d34214b-f408-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=d8c9ec05-7f0a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=8431045)

---
The fact is, most Americans are not a fan of this manufactured redistricting crisis. The majority of voters in America think it’s bad when a single party controls how districts get drawn. Voters expect (and deserve) fair representation and competitive elections.
Not disenfranchisement. Not extreme division. Not power-hungry politicians deciding to change the district lines with months to go before Election Day.
As Attorney General Holder said, “ _We must pursue a bold, new vision for our country by building a system that gives power back to the people instead of compromised politicians_ ...”
The Redistricting Reform Act is critical to achieving this vision of a truly representative democracy, where the will of the people prevails. [**Are you ready to help create this reality? Use our tool to send a message to your representatives in Congress endorsing the Redistricting Reform Act and supporting an end to partisan gerrymandering once and for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125435378/601788990/-2121636071?ms=eng_aotl_tier1_email_RedistCrisis_email_20260215-AOTL-Tier1-RedistCrisis_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20260215-AOTL-Tier1-RedistCrisis_&utm_campaign=RedistCrisis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4YzllYzA1LTdmMGEtZjExMS04MzJlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTczMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mVQWqz16AvFgNtwHxwNnjKWhiWu5wifMjZGRby3VWtU=&emci=8d34214b-f408-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=d8c9ec05-7f0a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=8431045)

The Redistricting Action Team

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Do You Support a Midterm GOP Convention in 2026?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Senate Republicans want your input on the 2026 midterm GOP convention. | Peter,

Senate Republicans are moving forward with a bold, first-of-its-kind initiative:

A **midterm Republican convention in 2026** focused on energizing conservatives, showcasing President Trump’s America First record, and helping Republicans hold and grow our Senate majority.

As planning continues, we want your input.

**SURVEY QUESTION:** Do you support holding a midterm Republican convention to help Senate Republicans win in 2026?

** [ 👉 YES — I SUPPORT A MIDTERM GOP CONVENTION
👉 NO — I DO NOT SUPPORT THIS IDEA

clean_body: Senate Republicans want your input on the 2026 midterm GOP convention. | Peter, Senate Republicans are moving forward with a bold, first-of-its-kind initiative: A midterm Republican convention in 2026 focused on energizing conservatives, showcasing President Trump’s America First record, and helping Republicans hold and grow our Senate majority. As planning continues, we want your input. SURVEY QUESTION: Do you support holding a midterm Republican convention to help Senate Republicans win in 2026? Your response will be shared directly with Senate Republican leadership as they finalize plans and strategy. - The fight for the Senate majority starts now. Thanks for standing with us. -Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We’re falling behind — can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
The stakes are too high to come up short |
#
---
Team, I'm going to be honest. We set an ambitious February fundraising goal to keep our momentum across Michigan — _and right now we're coming up short._ The gap we’re seeing right now might force us to make painful budget choices about how much we can invest in our midterm election plan. **[Can you chip in to close that gap now? Even a small gift today helps us hold our ground and keep scaling the operation we need to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125435489/601789316/-2107726894?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNjOWVjMDUtN2YwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1AAWKkgs7PLRWDi75Ohebal06u5kWBQyx60_274UrY=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125435491/601789318/-1561548048?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNjOWVjMDUtN2YwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1AAWKkgs7PLRWDi75Ohebal06u5kWBQyx60_274UrY=)

_The stakes in Michigan have never been higher._
Billionaires are funneling money into Michigan to try and flip the state red — and when we let a fundraising gap open, it limits our ability to respond quickly.
Your support right now means we can keep the trains running by responding to misinformation and attacks from the right, continuing to organize and build our movement, and supporting Democrats up and down the ballot.
**[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever fits in your budget to help us get back on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125435493/601789320/-2107726894?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGNjOWVjMDUtN2YwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1AAWKkgs7PLRWDi75Ohebal06u5kWBQyx60_274UrY=)**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Are you in this race with me, Peter?
body:
You can make the difference.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of my home, Peter. Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So [**when I ask you to donate to our campaign, it’s because your contribution**](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5759?t=7&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E) could make the difference between victory and defeat. **Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. **[I am asking you to contribute just $5 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, give what you can today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5760?t=8&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)** | **[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5760?t=9&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)**
---
**[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5759?t=10&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)**
---
I deeply appreciate all your support,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5759?t=11&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=574%2E124072%2EtUty6E)

The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. We can’t afford to fall short this close to Election Day. March 3rd is almost here. Let’s finish this the right way. — Josh | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

Friend,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia hoax** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment fraud** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered, and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
** And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment hoax and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge. **
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
The Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega warchest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress.

|

Patriot,

**I have some not-so-great news to share with you.**

I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy.

_**We're about to miss our most important deadline to date. Apparently, we're only a few hundred bucks away**_ _**from meeting our goal, but it looks like we're going to come up short. **_

This fundraising deadline has a lot of purpose behind it. Ever since conservatives won the House Majority, we've been targeted left and right by Democrats looking to unseat us at any cost.

My team anticipates meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left. I hope it pans out.

**And get this - the Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega war chest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress.**

clean_body: The Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega warchest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress. | Patriot, I have some not-so-great news to share with you. I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy. We're about to miss our most important deadline to date. Apparently, we're only a few hundred bucks away from meeting our goal, but it looks like we're going to come up short. This fundraising deadline has a lot of purpose behind it. Ever since conservatives won the House Majority, we've been targeted left and right by Democrats looking to unseat us at any cost. My team anticipates meeting this goal and beginning our counterattack plan against the Left. I hope it pans out. And get this - the Radical Democrats just sunk $50M into a mega war chest to get started on unseating conservatives like me from Congress. I've asked my finance team, and after some back and forth, they say we have one chance to get it right. | To make sure we hit our target, I've offered to email every single conservative I know to try and help out. Listen, I'm asking for even just $1 to make things right here. Everything helps. Thank you, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: re: the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Let’s face it, Peter, the stakes of the midterms can feel insurmountable.
Our democracy and civil liberties are on the ballot. If we do not restore checks and balances in these midterm elections, we may not recognize our democracy at the end of Trump’s term.
**_Regaining Congressional control is the only path forward to stopping the Trump Administration’s agenda._**
**That is why it is imperative that Jon Ossoff has the resources he needs to win in November.** [**If you’re on board and ready to join the fight, you can chip in $5 to support Jon’s reelection campaign here →**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260215-1-f-a&t=1&akid=1654%2E5691347%2ETvfANs)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.dw22dg&amount=5&refcode=em260215-1-f-a&t=2&akid=1654%2E5691347%2ETvfANs)**
---
****
| **[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.dw22dg&refcode=em260215-1-f-a&t=3&akid=1654%2E5691347%2ETvfANs)**
---
****
If you still aren’t convinced, here’s why your donation is important, especially right now:
* Jon is MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. He is the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Donald Trump won in 2024.

* The GOP knows that Democrats’ path to retaking the Senate majority depends on defending Jon’s seat in Georgia. That’s why they are already investing millions of dollars into flipping this seat red.

* Polling shows one of Jon’s extreme opponents neck and neck with him. And the GOP is already pulling out every dirty trick in the book to win.

[**So if you can, please rush $5 TODAY to help us build the resources we’ll need to win this race, regain Congressional control, and put a stop to the MAGA agenda >>**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260215-1-f-a&t=4&akid=1654%2E5691347%2ETvfANs)

body:
| | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias.

I'll get right to the point: [**This is a request for a donation of $5 to the DSCC ahead of their mid-month deadline.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260215-MarcElias-EliasDeadlineFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260215-MarcElias-EliasDeadlineFR-Pros-sl1&akid=22716%2E9716520%2E7LSlo2)

But please, **let me explain why this moment is so important.**

I've gone to court dozens of times to stop Donald Trump's lawlessness, and I'm proud to say that I've beaten him 64 times. That tells you two really important things:

**FIRST, Donald Trump and his MAGA minions _don't quit_.** If we don't want their extreme agenda, we'll have to stand up and stop them. And stop them again. And _again._ **Every single time.**

**SECOND, the GOP is _beatable_.** We just have to put the work in -- and that includes at the ballot box.

That brings me to today. The DSCC is working to lay the groundwork for a MASSIVE blue wave in the midterms, and to get us in tip-top shape, they've set a $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal.

**But as of now, we're on track to _fall short_ of that mark -- and unless we play catch-up immediately, we could be handing victory right back to the GOP.**

[**So now's the time to show up, because that's how we win -- take it from someone who's done this before. clean_body: | | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias. I'll get right to the point: But please, let me explain why this moment is so important. I've gone to court dozens of times to stop Donald Trump's lawlessness, and I'm proud to say that I've beaten him 64 times. That tells you two really important things: FIRST, Donald Trump and his MAGA minions don't quit. If we don't want their extreme agenda, we'll have to stand up and stop them. And stop them again. And again. Every single time. SECOND, the GOP is beatable. We just have to put the work in -- and that includes at the ballot box. That brings me to today. The DSCC is working to lay the groundwork for a MASSIVE blue wave in the midterms, and to get us in tip-top shape, they've set a $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal. But as of now, we're on track to fall short of that mark -- and unless we play catch-up immediately, we could be handing victory right back to the GOP. We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Marc Marc Elias | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. subject: Trump’s BEGGING you’ll skip this...

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm) [ Is this dpwillis67@gmail.com?](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=3&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)

You’re one of our top supporters in your state so we thought we’d see your name on our petition to stand with Mark Kelly.

Remember, Trump called for Kelly to be **executed.**
Pete Hegseth is **censuring and demoting** him.

But we can’t find any record of you standing with Mark Kelly?

[We’re opening our petition back up, until 11:59 PM ONLY.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=4&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)

[**Please, sign our petition now to stand with Mark Kelly before it’s too late >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=5&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm) | [SIGN NOW: STAND WITH MARK KELLY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=6&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=7&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
Waiting for your signature,

Fight For Reform

\--------- FORWARDED MESSAGE ---------

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=8&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
Yep, you read that right.

The President of the United States just called for Senator Mark Kelly’s EXECUTION... [**_all because he reminded soldiers they don’t have to follow illegal orders!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=9&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)

[**So we’re racing to get 50,000 signatures for our emergency petition to STAND with Mark Kelly, but we DESPERATELY need more support in your state before our midnight deadline. Click here to add your name to our petition NOW >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=10&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
[ADD MY NAME →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=11&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
---
* * *
Team,

It’s no secret that Trump has been acting like a dictator since stepping back into office.

[**_But now, he’s literally calling for his political opponents to be ARRESTED and MURDERED!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=12&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)

We need to show Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies that Democrats from Alabama to Alaska STAND with Senator Mark Kelly against the President’s threats.

But we just checked, and we’re still missing [5,000] signatures from local Democrats...
[ **Please, be one of the 50,000 signatures showing support for Mark Kelly against Trump. Click here to add your name to our petition NOW >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=13&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
[ADD MY NAME →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73052?t=14&akid=23929%2E4449941%2Ezmqcgm)
---
Did you sign?

name: Team Pappas
subject: This is important
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]Chris Pappas for Senate

We wouldn’t
reach out to you if it weren’t important.

Here’s the deal: It’s the middle of February, and if we’re going to have
any chance of winning this open seat and flipping the Senate blue, then we
need to stay ahead of our fundraising.

Now that Trump has thrown his full support behind our opponent John
Sununu, we have to do everything we can to stop national Republicans from
outraising us and flipping this seat red.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_1.-8JPTq&refcode=em20260215-1&t=1003&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]Team Pappas has set a goal to raise $75,000 before our mid-month
deadline expires at midnight — will you chip in $5 or
whatever you can right now to help us reach it?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_1.-8JPTq&amount=5&refcode=em20260215-1&t=1022&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]Donate $5 »

While John Sununu is backed by MAGA billionaires and corporate special
interests, our campaign is grassroots-powered – the average donation to
our campaign is just $27!

It’s so
important for you to join us. Polls show this race in a dead heat, and
national Republicans know that New Hampshire is their key to holding the
Senate majority.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_1.-8JPTq&refcode=em20260215-1&t=1023&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]Tonight is our mid-month deadline, and we’re falling short of our
$75,000 fundraising goal. Please pitch in $5 or whatever
makes sense to you before midnight tonight so we can hit our goal, elect
Chris to the Senate, and defend the Granite State.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_1.-8JPTq&amount=5&refcode=em20260215-1&t=1024&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]Donate $5 »

Thank you for being in the fight with us,

Team Pappas

P.S. [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/530?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_1.X64nFM&refcode=em20260215-1&t=1025&akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc ]If you’re feeling especially fired up, please commit to a
$5 monthly gift to Chris’s campaign from now until Election
Day. Every dollar raised could make the difference in a race this close.
Thanks for your support!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5128%2E582294%2E9tO4Xc

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Something powerful is happening...
body:
---
Derek, Something powerful is happening... In the last few weeks we’ve sent messages focused on what Democrats have been doing to organize and win in 2026 — launching our new voter registration program, When We Count, hiring and training hundreds of young organizers, and investing in our state parties. We’ll be honest: We didn’t know how Democrats would respond to messages like these, especially when the news feels bleaker than ever. **But instead, something powerful happened:** Terrence from Wisconsin chipped in $25. A few minutes later, Rachel from Iowa contributed $50. Then, Victoria from Kentucky pitched in $25. Suddenly, we had a whole movement of people committed to fighting back against Trump’s authoritarianism. As Democrats gear up to win the most important midterm elections of our lives this November, we _need_ to keep building that momentum. With your donation today, we’ll send a clear message to Trump and his allies: Democrats aren’t giving up. We’re standing together, we’re fighting back, we’re organizing, and, ultimately, we’ll flip Congress and prevent another two years of chaos and destruction. [**Derek, can we count on you to join Terrence, Rachel, and Victoria by chipping in $7 to the DNC today? We’ll put your contribution to work immediately:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260215_6108_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6108_22930333_N7Rs7A&akid=6108%2E22930333%2EN7Rs7A) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260215_6108_fr&refcode2=6108_22930333_N7Rs7A&akid=6108%2E22930333%2EN7Rs7A)**

Thank you for your support,
The Democrats

That's just reality.
Washington is a cesspool of creeps, crooks, crockpots, and crybabies. It's getting harder and harder to find honest folks who just want to do right by God for America.
My friend Steve Scalise just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $100,000,000 (that ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're targeting 35 GOP seats in our most vulnerable districts - harder than ever before.
Now, my buddies in the House have their FIRST major deadline of the election year coming up - and I just learned they're falling 15-20% behind goal.

| Friend,
Accountability for our leaders is crucial for a functioning democracy. Without it, our democracy cannot survive.
On Wednesday, Trump Attorney General Pam Bondi showed that MAGA has zero regard for accountability.
Bondi appeared before the House Judiciary Committee to answer questions about the Trump administration's handling of the Epstein files and escalating ICE violence in American cities.
Instead of providing answers, she delivered partisan attacks, MAGA talking points, and open contempt for the representatives questioning her on behalf of the American people.
She even refused to acknowledge the victims of the horrific abuse at the hands of the Epstein class and how Bondi's own DOJ revictimized them when they redacted the names of powerful men, but NOT their victims.
