Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40858%2E3422442%2EYQ_DdU)
Hi Peter, it’s Thomas, finance director for Katie’s campaign for governor.
I’m working overtime on a Sunday to make sure we reach our February mid-month fundraising goal because electing Katie this year is so important.
In a state this big, running a truly competitive campaign costs a lot—we’re talking millions of dollars to reach voters across California.
We can’t waste a single day, and we can’t do this without a huge team effort from supporters like you.
**Katie has never backed down from a fight.** She’s taken on Big Oil, Big Banks, Big Pharma—armed with nothing but facts and the determination to stand up for people who don’t have an army of lobbyists on their side.
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give—this is it. Every dollar today helps us reach more voters, sooner.
**[So I’m asking from my laptop on a Sunday: can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help us hit this goal?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260215_1_ak.xFJuTu&refcode=em20260215-40858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40858%2E3422442%2EYQ_DdU)**

Thank you so much,
Thomas
Finance Director

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260215-40858&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40858_3422442_YQ_DdU&akid=40858%2E3422442%2EYQ_DdU)**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. But he understood that lasting change requires more than words; it requires dedicated effort, resources, and infrastructure that can compete in every battleground. Here 's what your donation does: Deploys ballot-chasing teams in battleground districts and states Mobilizes and trains volunteers for voter contact Builds infrastructure that secures victories in close races Ensures America First candidates can compete -- even in states the Left assumes are "safe" Patriot, the chaos in Minnesota is proof of what happens when Democrats go unchecked. If we fail to act now, this lawlessness and corruption will spread from state to state, taking root in every corner of America. We're entering 2026 with everything on the line. This is your moment to honor Charlie's legacy -- to fight back, defend our values and freedoms, and make sure conservatives show up everywhere it counts. For Charlie and the future of our country, | | Tyler Bowyer Executive Director Turning Point PAC P.S. Words can't express how happy we were to leave 2025 behind and turn the page on a new year. But now is not the time to breathe easy. This is the year we fight back. We can't think of any worse way to let Charlie down than to come up short this November. We need to dig in now and fully dedicate ourselves to saving America in 2026. We've seen what the Left will do with our country if we hand it to them. PLEASE don't let the nightmare become reality. For Charlie! --Tyler Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Paid for by Turning Point PAC | | 4930 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Do You Know What’s Hidden in Section 5101? | Every single day, millions of seniors struggle to get by—living below the poverty line—even while collecting Social Security. subject: 'Shadows in the Squad' by Steve Abramowicz

Nothing says 'save democracy' like flirting with 'burn it down' rhetoric--right?

### Nothing says 'save democracy' like flirting with 'burn it down' rhetoric--right?
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Feb 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2ebdde1-3e26-4108-b8ff-1a38de8ee1b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"Our popular Government has often been called an experiment. Two points in it our people have already settled--the successful establishing and the successful administering of it. One still remains--its successful maintenance against a formidable internal attempt to overthrow it... [to] demonstrate to the world that those who can fairly carry an election can also suppress a rebellion; that ballots are the rightful and peaceful successors of bullets." President Abraham Lincoln July 4, 1861
In the frothy world of American left-wing politics, where ideals of equity and justice bubble up like over fermented kombucha, few organizations have captured the zeitgeist quite like the[Democratic Socialists of America (DSA).](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe2ef9a-b22c-4dc4-b0e0-37d738fe3686?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Founded in 1982 as a ragtag alliance of Bernie Sanders enthusiasts and dusty Marxist reading groups, the DSA exploded in popularity during the Trump era, ballooning from a few thousand members to over 90,000 by 2020. It birthed electoral stars like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC), Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib--the so-called "Squad"--and positioned itself as the scrappy underdog fighting corporate greed and systemic inequality. Who could argue with that? Free college, Medicare for All, a living wage: these are red-meat rallying cries for millennials drowning in student debt and gig-economy precarity.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.iXQT4fh_34XAQkZqCogLPrkV1I6B1j_qsSohngq2ODU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188047688)
But beneath the Instagram-ready memes and viral TikToks of canvassers knocking on doors in Bushwick, a darker undercurrent simmers. A recent expose from Canary Mission, a watchdog group dedicated to unmasking extremism in progressive circles, paints the DSA not as a beacon of reform but as a Trojan horse for anti-American radicalism. Titled["Hostile Takeover: The DSA's Plan to Capture American Politics,"](https://substack.com/redirect/8a50d042-748d-48d1-8b43-e3d69b83ac3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)the report--released in late 2025--levels explosive charges: that the DSA is orchestrating a stealth infiltration of the Democratic Party, not to tweak its edges but to gut it from within, replacing liberal democracy with a cocktail of Marxism, anti-imperialist fury, and outright sympathy for designated terrorist organizations. It's a narrative that demands scrutiny, especially as DSA-backed candidates like Zohran Mamdani surge toward powerhouses like New York City Hall.

Let's unpack this. At its core, Canary Mission accuses the DSA of waging a "hostile takeover," leveraging the party's infrastructure while plotting its ideological evisceration. Drawing parallels to Bolshevik subversion of the Mensheviks, the report claims DSA factions like the Liberation Caucus, Red Star Caucus, and Marxist Unity Group aren't content with incremental wins. They envision dismantling the "settler empire"--code for the United States itself--through armed "national liberation" and the overthrow of the Constitution. Frances Gill, a DSA National Political Committee member, is quoted urging activists to "take the empire down from within" from the "belly of the beast." Amy Wilhelm echoes this, calling for the "overthrow of empire." Ahmed Husain labels America a "decaying fascist empire," while Mirah Wood, on the DSA's International Committee, chillingly intones, "death to Israel and death to America.
"These aren't fringe whispers in a Reddit thread; they're public statements from elected leaders within the organization. The DSA's International Committee, in a 2019 declaration, explicitly committed to the "dissolution of the U.S. empire" and "decolonization" of American lands--rhetoric that blurs into calls for territorial balkanization. Post-October 7, 2023, when Hamas's brutal assault on Israel left 1,200 dead and ignited a global firestorm, the DSA's response wasn't mourning or measured critique. It was solidarity with "Palestinian resistance," framing the attack as a "revolutionary act" against imperialism. Chapters organized pro-Hamas rallies, with the Liberation Caucus hailing the slain Hamas leader Yahya Sinwar as a "martyr." Cliff Connolly, another NPC member, declared on October 7 itself: "Hamas is fighting for liberation.

"This terror-adjacent posturing isn't abstract. Canary Mission documents DSA ties to groups like the Palestinian Youth Movement, which radicalized chapters through anti-Zionist indoctrination, and Within Our Lifetime, a pro-Palestinian outfit that co-hosts events glorifying "intifada." Endorsements roll in from dubious corners: Imam Siraj Wahhaj, implicated in the 1993 World Trade Center bombing plot, backed Mamdani's mayoral bid. The Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR), whose executive director Nihad Awad praised the October 7 attacks as "inspirational," funneled $100,000 to his campaign. Even Rashida Tlaib, the DSA-endorsed congresswoman, dubbed the massacre "resistance.

"Zoom in on Zohran Mamdani, the 33-year-old Ugandan-born state assemblyman whose 2025 NYC mayoral run exemplifies this creep. Powered by the NYC-DSA--the organization's largest chapter with 10,000 members--Mamdani's operation was a machine: 50,000 volunteers, 1.6 million doors knocked, 2.3 million calls made. Funding poured in from allies like the Working Families Party ($30,000 for canvassing) and Jewish Voice for Peace Action ($16,321). His co-chairs, Grace Mausser and Gustavo Gordillo, didn't just mobilize; they ideologically steered. Gordillo reframes Hamas not as terrorists but as anti-capitalist warriors. Mamdani's father, Mahmood Mamdani--a Columbia University professor--has justified suicide bombings in academic tomes, while mentor Linda Sarsour, a DSA fellow traveler, advocates Israel's destruction.

The DSA's anti-Israel obsession manifests in concrete sabotage. They've pushed BDS (Boycott, Divestment, Sanctions) resolutions in local governments, conditioned endorsements on anti-Zionist litmus tests, and launched the "Not On Our Dime" campaign to kneecap Jewish charities aiding Israel. NYC-DSA co-authored bills to divest pension funds from the Jewish state, equating it to Nazi Germany. Kareem Elrefai compares Zionism to the Holocaust; Gerard D'Albon calls Israel a "Nazi regime." "From the river to the sea" chants--widely interpreted as a call for Israel's erasure--pepper their rallies, posted by NPC members like Alex Pelliterri.

But the rot extends beyond the Middle East. Domestically, DSA chapters agitate for "defund the police" and outright abolition, linking U.S. cops to "Palestinian liberation" in bizarre solidarity. NYC-DSA's Racial Justice Working Group targets the NYPD's Strategic Response Unit for disbandment, while national leaders like Shahana Hanif push to slash budgets for DEI redirection. Economically, it's state-controlled utopia: overthrow the market, seize the means, as the Marxist Unity Group demands. Internationally, alignment with authoritarians--China, Russia, Iran--via anti-imperialist cosplay. Even Alicia Singham Goodwin, niece of a China-based billionaire, was arrested at an anti-Israel protest, underscoring the odd-bedfellows vibe.

Critics of Canary Mission might dismiss this as McCarthyite fearmongering. The group, founded in 2014, has faced accusations of doxxing pro-Palestinian activists and stifling dissent. Its reports, while meticulously sourced with screenshots, quotes, and financial trails, lean heavily on guilt-by-association. DSA boosters in outlets like Jacobin and The Nation hail Mamdani's rise as a triumph of grassroots democracy, not a radical coup. AOC herself has distanced from the DSA's edgier edges, focusing on Green New Deal bread-and-butter issues. And let's be real: American politics has always harbored extremes, from Tea Party birthers to antifa window-smashers. Is the DSA's bombast any worse than Trump's MAGA cult?

Yet evidence mounts that it's not mere bluster. Mamdani's victory--narrow but seismic--signals DSA's electoral muscle. In the 2024 primaries, they unseated moderates in Philadelphia and Chicago, installing BDS advocates. Their NPC, stacked with "Springs of Revolution" revolutionaries, now steers national strategy. Hasan Piker, the Twitch-streaming socialist heartthrob, amplifies this to millions, normalizing "globalize the intifada" as edgy praxis. In a polarized era, where 70% of young Democrats sympathize with Palestinians per recent polls, this isn't marginal; it's mainstreaming.

The peril lies in normalization. What starts as anti-Zionist fervor spills into antisemitism--DSA events have hosted speakers denying Jewish self-determination while waving Hezbollah flags. It erodes alliances: Jewish progressives, once DSA stalwarts, flee amid harassment. And abroad, it emboldens foes; Iran's proxies cheer U.S. leftists chanting "death to America" as validation.

Canary Mission's call to action rings urgent: Read, discuss, defend. As [Desmond Tutu](https://substack.com/redirect/79c5dd17-ebb5-4328-b3ef-97c05fd03528?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)warned, "freedom's price is eternal vigilance". The DSA's hostile takeover isn't a conspiracy theory--it's a blueprint, etched in manifestos and megaphones. Progressivism thrives on bold visions, but when those visions glorify violence and empire's end, they risk torching the house we're all trying to rebuild. Democrats must purge this fringe, lest the Squad become the Syndicate. The ballot box is our firewall; use it before the radicals rewrite the rules.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

Chapters organized pro-Hamas rallies, with the Liberation Caucus hailing the slain Hamas leader Yahya Sinwar as a "martyr." Cliff Connolly, another NPC member, declared on October 7 itself: "Hamas is fighting for liberation. "This terror-adjacent posturing isn't abstract. Canary Mission documents DSA ties to groups like the Palestinian Youth Movement, which radicalized chapters through anti-Zionist indoctrination, and Within Our Lifetime, a pro-Palestinian outfit that co-hosts events glorifying "intifada." Endorsements roll in from dubious corners: Imam Siraj Wahhaj, implicated in the 1993 World Trade Center bombing plot, backed Mamdani's mayoral bid. The Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR), whose executive director Nihad Awad praised the October 7 attacks as "inspirational," funneled $100,000 to his campaign. Even Rashida Tlaib, the DSA-endorsed congresswoman, dubbed the massacre "resistance. "Zoom in on Zohran Mamdani, the 33-year-old Ugandan-born state assemblyman whose 2025 NYC mayoral run exemplifies this creep. Powered by the NYC-DSA--the organization's largest chapter with 10,000 members--Mamdani's operation was a machine: 50,000 volunteers, 1.6 million doors knocked, 2.3 million calls made. Funding poured in from allies like the Working Families Party ($30,000 for canvassing) and Jewish Voice for Peace Action ($16,321). His co-chairs, Grace Mausser and Gustavo Gordillo, didn't just mobilize; they ideologically steered. Gordillo reframes Hamas not as terrorists but as anti-capitalist warriors. Mamdani's father, Mahmood Mamdani--a Columbia University professor--has justified suicide bombings in academic tomes, while mentor Linda Sarsour, a DSA fellow traveler, advocates Israel's destruction. The DSA's anti-Israel obsession manifests in concrete sabotage. They've pushed BDS (Boycott, Divestment, Sanctions) resolutions in local governments, conditioned endorsements on anti-Zionist litmus tests, and launched the "Not On Our Dime" campaign to kneecap Jewish charities aiding Israel. NYC-DSA co-authored bills to divest pension funds from the Jewish state, equating it to Nazi Germany. Kareem Elrefai compares Zionism to the Holocaust; Gerard D'Albon calls Israel a "Nazi regime." "From the river to the sea" chants--widely interpreted as a call for Israel's erasure--pepper their rallies, posted by NPC members like Alex Pelliterri. But the rot extends beyond the Middle East. Domestically, DSA chapters agitate for "defund the police" and outright abolition, linking U.S. cops to "Palestinian liberation" in bizarre solidarity. NYC-DSA's Racial Justice Working Group targets the NYPD's Strategic Response Unit for disbandment, while national leaders like Shahana Hanif push to slash budgets for DEI redirection. Economically, it's state-controlled utopia: overthrow the market, seize the means, as the Marxist Unity Group demands. Internationally, alignment with authoritarians--China, Russia, Iran--via anti-imperialist cosplay. Even Alicia Singham Goodwin, niece of a China-based billionaire, was arrested at an anti-Israel protest, underscoring the odd-bedfellows vibe. Critics of Canary Mission might dismiss this as McCarthyite fearmongering. The group, founded in 2014, has faced accusations of doxxing pro-Palestinian activists and stifling dissent. Its reports, while meticulously sourced with screenshots, quotes, and financial trails, lean heavily on guilt-by-association. DSA boosters in outlets like Jacobin and The Nation hail Mamdani's rise as a triumph of grassroots democracy, not a radical coup. AOC herself has distanced from the DSA's edgier edges, focusing on Green New Deal bread-and-butter issues. And let's be real: American politics has always harbored extremes, from Tea Party birthers to antifa window-smashers. Is the DSA's bombast any worse than Trump's MAGA cult? Yet evidence mounts that it's not mere bluster. Mamdani's victory--narrow but seismic--signals DSA's electoral muscle. In the 2024 primaries, they unseated moderates in Philadelphia and Chicago, installing BDS advocates. Their NPC, stacked with "Springs of Revolution" revolutionaries, now steers national strategy. Hasan Piker, the Twitch-streaming socialist heartthrob, amplifies this to millions, normalizing "globalize the intifada" as edgy praxis. In a polarized era, where 70% of young Democrats sympathize with Palestinians per recent polls, this isn't marginal; it's mainstreaming. The peril lies in normalization. What starts as anti-Zionist fervor spills into antisemitism--DSA events have hosted speakers denying Jewish self-determination while waving Hezbollah flags. It erodes alliances: Jewish progressives, once DSA stalwarts, flee amid harassment. And abroad, it emboldens foes; Iran's proxies cheer U.S. leftists chanting "death to America" as validation. Canary Mission's call to action rings urgent: Read, discuss, defend. As , "freedom's price is eternal vigilance". The DSA's hostile takeover isn't a conspiracy theory--it's a blueprint, etched in manifestos and megaphones. Progressivism thrives on bold visions, but when those visions glorify violence and empire's end, they risk torching the house we're all trying to rebuild. Democrats must purge this fringe, lest the Squad become the Syndicate. The ballot box is our firewall; use it before the radicals rewrite the rules. Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer. This Substack is reader-supported. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. If you like what you read, please forward it to a friend. We only grow with your help, and thanks for doing it! name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: We’re at 88% — can you help finish this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
Your gift tonight helps voters get the facts.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/131?refcode=em20260215-169&t=1&akid=169%2E12592%2Ezhfva9)
**Today is the last day.**
By midnight tonight, Virginians for Fair Elections must reach our $10,000 goal to keep our first round of digital ads on the air. We’re 88% of the way there — and we need your help to close the gap. [**Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help us cross the finish line?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260215_1.dHDcN1&amount=3&refcode=20260215-169&t=2&akid=169%2E12592%2Ezhfva9)
This is our chance to make sure voters hear clear, accurate information about the redistricting amendment _before_ misinformation fills the void.
Free and fair elections are under real threat right now. This amendment gives Virginians a temporary, voter-approved way to level the playing field and protect fair representation across the Commonwealth.
But voters can’t support what they don’t understand.
These digital ads are how we explain — in plain language — what the amendment does, why it matters, and how voters remain fully in control. If we miss this goal, we lose precious time when clarity matters most.
That’s why tonight is so important.
[**If you can, please chip in right now to help us reach our goal before midnight. Even a small contribution helps ensure Virginians get the facts they need to help protect fair elections and vote YES on April 21.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260215_1.dHDcN1&amount=3&refcode=20260215-169&t=3&akid=169%2E12592%2Ezhfva9)

Virginians for Fair Elections

name: California Dems
subject: Special election in CA-01 while GOP Majority hangs by a thread
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
If CA-01 flips, GOP’s fragile majority could collapse |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125451506/601833441/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGM3YzgyNy05OTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJmfJhLdCCSiPP1QZZQl2uLQWYeoWfb2naYLL_ougM=)

clean_body: | = Team: Sen. Susan Collins (R-Maine) officially announced she’s seeking a sixth term — despite previously supporting term limits and campaigning on a promise to serve no more than two. Susan Collins is one of the most vulnerable Republicans running for re-election this year, and Maine is a top priority as we gear up to flip GOP-held seats blue and Flip the Senate. = | = The path to the Senate majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. That’s why Maine is one of the top Senate races we’ll be focusing on in the months ahead — because our chances of Flipping the Senate could all come down to whether we defeat Susan Collins. In states like Maine, Michigan, Georgia, and North Carolina — where nail-biter races will determine the fate of the Senate majority — we need the resources to compete with the GOP’s money machine and support Democratic candidates. We need you in this fight now more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Flip the Senate = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Senate Republican Alerts
subject: We’re falling behind early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Fundraising gap growing | Fellow American,

We just reviewed the latest Senate fundraising numbers — and they’re alarming.

Democrats are **outraising Republicans in multiple battleground Senate races** to start the 2026 cycle. Not by a little. By a lot.

name: Team Walz
subject: A real victory
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
After months of disruption — aggressive raids, officer-involved shootings, two deaths, and abducted children — Trump’s DHS is finally pulling back its flood of ICE agents from Minnesota.
Minnesota didn’t roll over.
People organized. Neighbors protected neighbors. Communities stayed peaceful, stayed persistent, and refused to be intimidated — and now this administration is retreating.
**This is a real victory, and it happened because people like you held the line.**
But we’re not done. We’re still pushing for answers and accountability — and Trump’s DOJ is still pressing forward with its sham investigation into Tim. The legal fight ahead could cost millions.
**[If you can, chip in $5 — or whatever you’re able — to keep our Legal Defense Fund ready for what comes next.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20260215.gIDjkl&amount=5&refcode=em20260215-480&t=1&akid=480%2E34582%2Er7hm9I)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20260215.gIDjkl&amount=5&refcode=20260215-480&t=20&akid=480%2E34582%2Er7hm9I)**
We're grateful,
Team Walz

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_ldf_footer?refcode=tw-em-20260215-480&t=21&refcode2=480_34582_r7hm9I&akid=480%2E34582%2Er7hm9I)**
---
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

Tim Walz for Governor

St. Paul MN 55104

Jon Tester knows that Democrats cannot win here in Montana, even if they are spending millions. He learned that firsthand when he lost to my friend, Tim Sheehy.

Fellow American, Jon Tester has a new game plan now - run an _**"independent"**_ against me.

His hand-picked candidate is a wolf in sheep's clothing. Montana doesn't need a woke, radical left college president - they need someone who will stand up for Montana values and put America FIRST.

_So, what could we expect from this faux-independent?_
1. He would allow biological men to compete against women.
2. He would be another vote to impeach President Trump.
3. He would vote to reopen our border.
4. He would be another reliable vote for Chuck Schumer.

**And that's just the beginning.**

In 2024, over $315 million was spent to keep Tester in his seat. _They failed, so they are changing their game plan._

I know this "independent" candidate will have the financial backing of Chuck Schumer, Jon Tester, and out-of-touch Hollywood elites.

**[That's why I am reaching out to you today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=84a232d70be142a287147773931b4127&_e=Ge4W1mihDQrIB4j94A890kQA92vrgOEI-YfA8btBgGZcdM06WfKTVWr2mZ_Eqzt7ekbrrKzEU9LWKwyH1mv4c_HjDRd5hUDmk1ySQIMXmLG-wK_ONnXx23_lD0cMunGEucrjJ87UooNzozj3K4fpuLMk3xfxP5nKeeAZnMe9ksRDeSvKDObMGGGaRqAOz2s9u-hQzLxC3VimjUy-bjb6AW8vCJwRscVKkWcbHh5X288j9blJuIklKBByLWVGe9mrO-0Xtoud7s_GFfO1VKmJo1iMugRNWcia0JvVf-ycbCdctIZJlhGBlfpsL8VHyFXiZsDtvX3DQL9EQUrdS5eQrapIF82OEruZm8E6kkiFpkV3ntrY9Pp63XwAYHp1eGPViisoalXylNhSTYgfW5PKegBqz7ZAp4M8hsUlv8yXfnvt6RYaIS28lyA_FoeGAt2KTP9d3RxwQKE0pBj7f30NXPZv5sGFOaaAVRbylI2QVq-48CpQyuLolvayTKwu4LO_tHWuDJNZ6kCC7i3qgUNhYq0Qf1zI23tOa49C_kHbHQDACjXz13uJuNNusCu-dXDQghEIEIkz9Cx0w-Dtc2OntBZ4tfsnkObvsZ9TkWbhL4tDAFuPMCCj7Lon0l0QIbI8Y9arKpYG2n8wzqUTjhY8uVNgJ1sOeuy8WL7zvZ2WHRm9USY3LP0jEv4RvULdugNroCA3_4gBW0vPGvKU91YfO8z3LsD5lTTFF5anbFDQ1zkuxk8U_hazjIXae4MDOWdpWkWVUSbS3OgIt4bX-IrISA%3D%3D)** We cannot allow Democrats to prop up one of their hand-picked candidates while deceiving Montana voters. We must have the resources to make sure Montanans know exactly who is in this race.

clean_body: Democrats failed in 2024, so they are changing their game plan | Jon Tester knows that Democrats cannot win here in Montana, even if they are spending millions. He learned that firsthand when he lost to my friend, Tim Sheehy. Fellow American, Jon Tester has a new game plan now - run an "independent" against me. His hand-picked candidate is a wolf in sheep's clothing. Montana doesn't need a woke, radical left college president - they need someone who will stand up for Montana values and put America FIRST. So, what could we expect from this faux-independent? 1. He would allow biological men to compete against women. 2. He would be another vote to impeach President Trump. 3. He would vote to reopen our border. 4. He would be another reliable vote for Chuck Schumer. And that's just the beginning. In 2024, over $315 million was spent to keep Tester in his seat. They failed, so they are changing their game plan. I know this "independent" candidate will have the financial backing of Chuck Schumer, Jon Tester, and out-of-touch Hollywood elites. We cannot allow Democrats to prop up one of their hand-picked candidates while deceiving Montana voters. We must have the resources to make sure Montanans know exactly who is in this race. Can I count on you to help set the record straight? With your help, we'll keep Montana red and defeat Jon Tester, Chuck Schumer, and Senate Democrats once again. Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Why I consider myself the luckiest member of the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’d mean a lot to me if you read this.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)
When I was sworn in as Delaware's member of Congress, I made a simple promise: I would work with anyone willing to deliver for Delaware, and I would stand up to anyone who would hurt Delawareans.
These last twelve months have felt like a decade in many ways. Time and again, we have seen the president sowing chaos and endorsing cruelty — striking fear into the hearts of immigrant neighbors, disregarding due process, firing public servants and attacking the foundations of the American health care system. Meanwhile, families across Delaware are facing rising utility bills, housing costs, and grocery prices that don't match their paychecks.
This is the reality that has shaped my first year in Congress.
From day one, I've focused on protecting Delawareans — because a government for and by the people must respect the rule of law, not the whims of the powerful and wealthy few. That meant standing up to political appointees who sought unauthorized access to Americans' personal data, pushing for transparency and accountability from the White House, and defending Congress's constitutional role in decisions about war.
We've seen the consequences when those guardrails fail — when wealthy donors are given a blank check to summarily fire civil servants and hollow out federal agencies Congress created to serve the public.
We also witnessed relentless attacks on the American health care system: the largest cut to Medicaid in our history, mass firings of health care workers, and partisan attacks in the research and institutions that keep us safe from disease. Science — not ideology — should guide decisions that affect people's health. That's why I supported legislation to protect vaccine access, fought to restore and strengthen Medicaid funding, reinstate federal health workers and extend Affordable Care Act tax credits — something we are much closer to now than when my Democratic colleagues and I started that effort.
I'll be the first to admit it: it can feel like Congress isn't doing enough to address everyday concerns. But after my first year in office, I'm proud to say I know that progress is still possible, despite a loud, divided and too-often dysfunctional Washington, when we listen to one another and put people over politics.
Every day in Washington, while I work to defend our democracy and address the cost of living, Delawareans reach out to my office for help navigating federal bureaucracy. A Social Security notice demanding tens of thousands of dollars because of an administrative error. A delayed tax refund. A stalled SBA loan. A grandmother unable to access her Medicare coverage. A veteran denied the benefits they earned in uniform.
To the people facing these challenges, they mean everything. In every constituent we serve, we learn how to make government deliver better for all of us.
That's why I'm most proud that my office helped over 800 Delawareans this year, returning nearly $4 million directly to families. Oftentimes, government isn't abstract — it's whether a problem gets solved or a door gets slammed shut.
Delivering for our neighbors also means bringing resources home. This year, working alongside Senators Coons and Blunt Rochester, we helped secure over $200 million in federal grant funding for Delaware communities, hospitals, schools, and local governments — along with more than $76.4 million of new direct investment across our state.
When I was elected, I hadn't hoped to serve in the minority. So, yes, I have real disagreements with my Republican colleagues. When I need to stand up to policies that would hurt Delaware, I do — and always will. But Delawareans know something Washington sometimes forgets: you can stand for your values and still work together where common ground exists. That's how we deliver results.
I introduced five new bills, all with bipartisan support, all shaped directly by conversations with Delawareans — from consumer protection to supporting farmers. One of my bills that would expand investment for entrepreneurs and small businesses passed the House unanimously this past summer.
I led a bipartisan effort to restore funding the Trump administration cut from Delaware's Manufacturing Extension Partnership, protecting small and mid-sized manufacturers and good-paying jobs, and helped secure bipartisan funding for Delaware-developed cooling technology that reduces data centers' energy and water use and eases pressure on utility costs.
And when the Trump administration moved to cut Medicare's funding for home health care, I worked across the aisle to stop it — preserving nearly $1 billion so seniors can receive care at home and caregivers can keep doing their jobs. I've continued my work to expand paid family and medical leave nationally and support fair wages, because no one should have to choose between their family or their wellbeing and their livelihood.
Supporting our veterans has remained a priority — from protecting earned benefits, to cutting red tape at the VA, to ensuring servicemembers are paid even during a government shutdown.
I consider myself the luckiest member of the House. Not everyone gets to represent the greatest state in the Union. That's why I also spent this year traveling across Delaware — joining town halls and roundtables, touring small businesses, and taking over 360 meetings with neighbors across 35 towns and cities. Those moments at home remind me of the true Delaware way: democracy works best when we focus less on ideology and more on outcomes— less on noise and more on neighbors.
It is the privilege of my lifetime representing our state in the House of Representatives. As I begin my second year, I'm more clear eyed than ever about the work ahead. I'm grateful to the people of Delaware for trusting me with this responsibility.
Thank you for reading,
Sarah McBride
Delaware’s Congresswoman
* * *
**Thank you for reading!** Sarah is working every day to push back against Trump’s billionaire agenda, hold Republicans accountable for the harm they’re causing, and deliver real solutions to make life more affordable for working families. **None of that is possible without this grassroots team.** **[If you’re able, can you pitch in $5 to defend Sarah’s seat, retake the House, and deliver real results for working people?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260215-1-b.J4_02B&refcode=em20260215-2822&amount=5&t=26&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)** **[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260215-1-b.J4_02B&amount=5&refcode=em20260215-2822&t=45&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)**
---
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2026-footer?refcode=em20260215-1-b&t=46&refcode2=2822_21716_KiHKC4&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=47&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=48&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=49&akid=2822%2E21716%2EKiHKC4)

I'm grateful to the people of Delaware for trusting me with this responsibility. Thank you for reading, Sarah McBride Delaware’s Congresswoman Thank you for reading! Sarah is working every day to push back against Trump’s billionaire agenda, hold Republicans accountable for the harm they’re causing, and deliver real solutions to make life more affordable for working families. None of that is possible without this grassroots team.

We can’t let Republicans have any advantage over us, or they will win. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you, Josh Harder’s Finance Team *

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Quiz Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
We’re cheering them on to bring home the gold.
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4081%2E898137%2EqxcqLt)
Hey there —
The Winter Olympics are ongoing, and I can’t tell you how much I’m enjoying watching these incredible athletes compete in winter sports.
I absolutely LOVE the Olympics. It’s a time when people from all backgrounds come together to root for a common goal. Politics and playbooks usually divide us, but Team USA is the one thing we can all agree on.
In the spirit of these games, my team and I put together a fun quiz about the Winter Olympics and my other favorite thing ever, _Michigan_.
[**Take our team’s Olympics quiz here to learn more about the Michiganders involved in the winter games!**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/survey/2602-olympics-quiz/?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260215_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4081%2E898137%2EqxcqLt)

---
Thanks — and go Team USA!
– Mallory

clean_body: | | | Peter, this is what House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries said on IMPEACHING Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem. I hate to be so blunt, but you and I have NO time to waste. Here’s what happened :FIRST: A Radical Democrat filed ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT against Secretary Noem for leading the charge to STOP illegal immigration, THEN: More than 160 House Democrats signed onto the Impeachment, AND NOW: Jeffries has joined Gavin Newsom, JB Pritzker, and the entire Radical Left in demanding Trump FIRE her! Kyle Kirkland here. And after suffering under the tyranny of Newsom’s California for FAR TOO LONG... ...I’m running for Congress to TAKE BACK our country! And that starts with ENDING the illegal immigrant crisis ACROSS America. Since taking office, Secretary Noem has :>>> LOCKED DOWN our border to stop the flood of illegal immigrants egged on by Radical Democrats like Newsom, >>> LED THE CHARGE to get MILLIONS of illegal immigrants OFF our streets and OUT of our country, and >>> DEFENDED the brave ICE officers putting their lives on the line to SECURE our country! And as a thanks from the Radical Left... ...Democrat House Leadership is now calling for Trump to FIRE HER or they’ll IMPEACH! But here’s the good news: You and I have the power to STOP this sham, Peter. But we have to act FAST. A message that WE THE PEOPLE want a SECURE southern border. And that WE THE PEOPLE will NOT tolerate attacks on Secretary Noem or our ICE officers for keeping our country safe. Thousands of patriots have already signed. But I still haven’t heard from YOU. Or will you let Hakeem Jeffries, Gavin Newsom, and the Radical Left RUN her out of Washington? For America,Kyle Kirkland | | Paid for by Kirkland for California PO Box 27167, Fresno, CA, 93729

clean_body: I promised fellow Republican leaders a response from you. And I would NEVER not follow through on a promise. From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously. There's a lot of people in the swamp who like to make empty promises. I 'm proud to say that I'm not one of them. When I say something, I mean it. So when I promised my fellow Republicans I'd have your responses ready, I was ready to go to any length to get them. I look forward to reading your responses, JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: 159 days down, 16 to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We started this campaign 159 days ago, and in 16 days, Texans will pick their Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate.
It’s hard to believe. In a short time, we’ve already built the largest grassroots movement in Texas. We have more grassroots donors and more volunteers than any other campaign in this race.
So what we are asking today is: **[if you knew that a $5 contribution would help us reach the undecided voters who will make the difference on March 3, would you contribute?](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260215-1-ak&t=1&akid=448%2E1347274%2EIyNbwe)**
If you knew that $5 could help us convince a few more people to vote early for James, wouldn’t it be worth it...knowing you helped secure the handful of votes that will decide this race?
Because that is what James needs right now. He’s counting on all of us to contribute in a way that will put us one step closer to winning the primary, flipping Texas, and taking back the U.S. Senate majority.
That’s the power of your $5 when you add it together with the thousands of people chipping in now to fuel this movement. Can you do it for James?
**[Will you please consider contributing $5 or whatever you can to our campaign for U.S. Senate today? Now is the time to put our foot on the gas.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260215-1-ak&t=2&akid=448%2E1347274%2EIyNbwe)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: Peter — We started this campaign 159 days ago, and in 16 days, Texans will pick their Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate. It’s hard to believe. In a short time, we’ve already built the largest grassroots movement in Texas. We have more grassroots donors and more volunteers than any other campaign in this race. So what we are asking today is: If you knew that $5 could help us convince a few more people to vote early for James, wouldn’t it be worth it...knowing you helped secure the handful of votes that will decide this race? Because that is what James needs right now. He’s counting on all of us to contribute in a way that will put us one step closer to winning the primary, flipping Texas, and taking back the U.S. Senate majority. That’s the power of your $5 when you add it together with the thousands of people chipping in now to fuel this movement. Can you do it for James? name: Tim Walz
subject: We can’t let them win.
body:
Peter,
I wanted to emphasize just how serious of a moment we are in.
Donald Trump’s federal agents are going door to door in Minnesota looking for folks based on their accent or color of their skin. Kids are afraid to go to school, small businesses are hurting, another life has been lost, and the people responsible have yet to be held accountable. Instead, Donald Trump’s DOJ is investigating me.
Why? Because my focus has always been protecting the people of Minnesota.
They’re trying to scare me and our state — but Minnesota will not be intimidated into silence and neither will I. This legal battle will be expensive, that’s why they’re doing this. They want me to back down and surrender, but I won’t.
I need your help in this fight. If you’re able, please split a donation between our Legal Defense fund and Outrage then Action and make sure we can continue to stand up to Donald Trump and his DOJ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp_2026_dga?refcode=partner_ms_tw_em_20260215_realtexaspac]
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

name: Kyle Blomquist
subject: Stop Settling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blomquist for Congress
body:
I’m not settling. I’m running for Congress. | | | Peter, Every election, American elites tell working-class voters to lower our expectations. They say change happens incrementally, that we shouldn't expect real solutions to the challenges facing our country, our families, and our futures. Then they tell us who to vote for. **[In 2026, I’m not listening to them. I’m not settling. I’m running for Congress.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvbKBRjijH4M6kFuhYdbd5oBt82e7oONi6Skce6kKgKdq8nvEi1ScTQklCY1mHCf8bYByWMgYvwSKT_FAlSXjqmzcDFUV_2MPZxzSM8NFrSheOFkYEQnxWATDmZK2RyTucT6aVH71utiqHMvrG_5EM4JBkvcZrHRTyIOZwjA11KRIoie7DuE1UF6Vek5bmHyv7t1cA6rGCb-DlnXMvmP8uPbJci8oYIkszCh_dHhy1PtyXKfmS_QP6FVDspRW72yYn9QmvYKfwwwVbDINRR18OVxAC4U5tUb96yZVUWmMOgbltniU3cTBSoqDyN8rvESeM/4o6/P3FbpdeITNyT72BuKG-h_w/h0/h001.M-OZOdY-53aIKXhd4xVMN0xlEPXKDi5zvOsa4x2IZ3M)** I will not take money from corporate PACs that remove worker protections and lower our wages by limiting competition. I will not take money from AIPAC, which pressures politicians to send our tax dollars to fund genocide in our name. I will not take money from the private prison industry that profits from the mass detention and terrorization of immigrant communities. I will not take money from billionaires who hoard the wealth created by our labor while cutting their taxes at the expense of basic necessities and healthcare for the poor. I am running based on my values and fighting for what the American working class deserves: healthcare as a human right, housing as a human right, living wages, strong unions, and a dignified retirement. We can either keep lowering the bar, or we can raise it together. name: David Hogg
subject: Here’s why $5 makes a real difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Your $5 will help us elect fighters, not folders.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260215-1&t=1&akid=3150%2E587540%2E_jtBrv)
$5, Peter.
**[$5 is the amount I’m asking you to donate to Leaders We Deserve right now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260215_1_hpc.EhTpsm&refcode=em20260215-3150&amount=5&t=2&akid=3150%2E587540%2E_jtBrv)**
Here’s why:
$5 will allow us to recruit and support young progressive candidates who are ready to fight in this critical moment, not fold just because they’re in the minority.
$5 will help us to primary some of the most complacent members in Congress like the ones who voted to thank ICE. Those who offer more excuses for why they can’t confront Trump than they do ideas for helping the people that elected them. If they can’t lead in this moment we will find someone who can.
$5 will support leaders who understand progress isn’t a straight line. Leaders who are in this for their communities, not just the next election cycle.
And $5 will go a long way toward changing the face of power in this country — **electing the young, dynamic, badass progressive leaders we deserve who aren’t just younger versions of those in power controlled by the same special interests but are true agents of change.**
I want a Democratic Party that fights back. A party that I can actually say I am proud to be a part of. A party that actually stands for something more than just what it is not.
**[If you believe we need a better Democratic Party, I hope you’ll contribute $5 today.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260215_1_hpc.EhTpsm&refcode=em20260215-3150&amount=5&t=3&akid=3150%2E587540%2E_jtBrv)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260215_1_hpc.EhTpsm&amount=5&refcode=em20260215-3150&t=4&akid=3150%2E587540%2E_jtBrv)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260215-1&t=5&refcode2=3150_587540__jtBrv&akid=3150%2E587540%2E_jtBrv)**

I want a Democratic Party that fights back. A party that I can actually say I am proud to be a part of. A party that actually stands for something more than just what it is not. Thank you, David Hogg

I wanted you to hear this **DIRECTLY** from me!
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fe13796d0f1440aebe5c0b2056a864f7&_e=FN1IbiLobu8yZnZXdcxMthwAzVI6KswA8y4qgg7YtvMzFwbAcwP8CUiujNwPrIgUv7397vOJLHKiXW8L7Q9bXL58CeiWnJHhlbJJkFOSLHuauSnNYWNa6ph512OIdddRzGVksjadq44bYlsGL_OniyyZSDrpSvNISk7rUTlFOIIk0YxKSFJY8K4kVs0dEIkqEbeHms-cYOE8BSyQ3nmwhIFuMnIirzEfQD3TSVLIJbcd7aXXJJcl1YBhV0-AnozrBZI0C5qFefnkM1tjMoE39ukKpwfiNW499oFmvDkca-SU6ElS0J-82erlQDCXHbfPjUYz8PUTiCYRnefwgqPLl35EsFHeeBw-kYiZO0QsOYKIyo9Wd-Xly6IL4AeoXx_SGqc9OdVK2Pb_zAAf0vlg579ru_S6BWM906HCnlA678Gn4qhuybwIkD4El5_8GluESKzq3mLjK7dKOsMRh5Ipvp3ll3xrQPjzUeer8cYRtQUJ6yrlDbpCPwsPslzWByRSr3sA8x3cJZJtB35N96Y4EKxDMeTHX1uwHrwV1v1nDvFQQ6M4hR1EWBXnu5STg-Hf9CBLWF1uucXvdxEh3SwPSCftD61ZJnKREMHUV79RzzO219OsugDenLZlVksi0ADczWHyfw9Am2BklmoSmLgWCczv7pH2rxQp_zf6vt9PMpr2QS3pA3fRSGRehZvYivFruMV-YtzFFSWnvYUz0zC6rIDG-AQ-Lb9Y_ZROyHv1Fdg%3D)
Thanks to **YOU** , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States.

We’ve done **SO** much, and it’s truly been a**HELL OF A RIDE**.

Our border is **SHUT** , gas prices have hit a **FIVE-YEAR LOW** , inflation is **UNDER CONTROL** , the economy is **BOOMING** , and the USA is finally **RESPECTED** again.

The Democrats **CAN’T STAND** that the American people are winning again, and they’ll **USE** **EVERY DIRTY TACTIC** possible to destroy our progress.

And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after **YOU**!

I’m just standing in their way.

We’ve been through **HELL** together, and**NOTHING** has torn our bond apart.
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fe13796d0f1440aebe5c0b2056a864f7&_e=FN1IbiLobu8yZnZXdcxMthwAzVI6KswA8y4qgg7YtvMzFwbAcwP8CUiujNwPrIgUv7397vOJLHKiXW8L7Q9bXL58CeiWnJHhlbJJkFOSLHuauSnNYWNa6ph512OIdddRzGVksjadq44bYlsGL_OniyyZSDrpSvNISk7rUTlFOIIk0YxKSFJY8K4kVs0dEIkqEbeHms-cYOE8BSyQ3nmwhIFuMnIirzEfQD3TSVLIJbcd7aXXJJcl1YBhV0-AnozreZDyYjaQacGOXQquMUBvtqErG-EYy3JXDuFSiTEOtcbQhBjD9A4zq-0zChoLPByt74i4G2zqZQc37R6jJjlvQ2kYoAJwLu8hE7ZVQARriI7qalo_fvo6md_Vavn_JF6kXA62u7jEKeOpF5D7Ydrw_6h5yE4hxyHLYxBUiYz5jS-U3D5LScoVKpOxHoducrKqSHlqPWX9yGY0PCT8TA9vD3DZRqs3b3nwzmqtp-SxHYB8MarqWaFOcJAzNQojQ4nJ3iF8daO-4DWpAi326jIJx0Ko6IHs_jN9iynJvLwEvE7zrguKGz0RfE5s0feBPN0eAbonJJYtChMTM2SpVHDe5FjCoTEAV_CLXArzs5AaLPEd4MonAGmUX0Hv3lwwIl5lQ1Mqdt6QH6bffJ09ktcT6sNtCVLnF5Qr-DrsrBFjzuWYWo0t-oX0tGkZO0_NsHWTfD7QNoEXztKmqmUoE8E9ohTkUtGfObZF-SYGhYEHBU0%3D)

clean_body: I just stepped out of the Oval Office to send you this | | | | Forget the middle man. I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been aHELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, andNOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. name: Ollie (Chris' dog!)
subject: Hiiii
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
I *definitely* meant to send this on Valentine’s Day, but I was so busy playing around that I missed it.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260215-1123&t=1&akid=1129%2E294397%2EwAl7g0)
Hiiii, it’s me, Ollie!
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260215_1_ak.iq_ShX&amount=10&refcode=em20260215-1123&t=3&akid=1129%2E294397%2EwAl7g0)
I _definitely_ meant to send this on Valentine’s Day, but I was so busy playing around that I missed it. Oops...
Anyway, I love my mom, Judge Chris Taylor! She’s the best mom a dog could ask for.
She scratches behind my ears, gives me treats, and works really hard every day to protect fairness and justice in Wisconsin.
My mom shows me so much love, and I’d really like to give some of that back to her — and that’s where you come in.
[**The election is coming up fast, and your support right now will give my mom’s campaign a boost of energy through the final stretch. Will you chip in today to show her a little extra love?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260215_1_ak.iq_ShX&amount=10&refcode=em20260215-1123&t=4&akid=1129%2E294397%2EwAl7g0)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260215_1_ak.iq_ShX&amount=10&refcode=em20260215-1123&t=23&akid=1129%2E294397%2EwAl7g0)**
Thank you!
Tail wags,
Ollie 🐾

name: EMERGENCY FROM TRUMP
subject: Friend, Friend, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Here are 3 reasons why I absolutely cannot go on without $26 today!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump._g/s9u1eb8eb49)
---
I AM PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP,
_and here are 3 reasons why I absolutely cannot go on without $26 today..._
[READ:](https://link.win.donaldjtrump._g/sbmd616a804)

body:
Happy National Wisconsin Day!
| Friend, today is National Wisconsin Day! [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021526_B1_WisDay&t=2&akid=5846%2E196590%2E0WPB0s) But for me, that’s every day. I was born and raised here, and Wisconsin has given me the community and opportunities that made me who I am today. It’s where someone from a middle-class Milwaukee background like me could become the first Black lieutenant governor of Wisconsin. That’s why I’ve devoted my entire career to bettering Wisconsin, from my start as an organizer in Milwaukee to my work expanding opportunities for working families as Lieutenant Governor. **And now, I’m running for governor because I believe Wisconsin deserves the best: the best healthcare, the best wages, and the best quality of life.** And I won’t settle for anything less. But to make that vision a reality, I’ll need your help. I’m counting on your support – will you chip in $25, $15, or any amount at the link below? **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mb-em-fr-feb26](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021526_B1_WisDay&t=3&akid=5846%2E196590%2E0WPB0s)** I’m in this fight to take care of our beautiful state, the Great Lakes we’re connected to, and all the residents who call Wisconsin home. **[If you believe in that mission, please invest in the future of our state this National Wisconsin Day with a contribution of any amount that is meaningful to you:](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021526_B1_WisDay&t=4&akid=5846%2E196590%2E0WPB0s)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6683?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021526_B1_WisDay&t=5&akid=5846%2E196590%2E0WPB0s)
---
| [DONATE $27 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6683?amount=27&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021526_B1_WisDay&t=6&akid=5846%2E196590%2E0WPB0s)
---

Happy National Wisconsin Day,
Mandela

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1706%2E251025%2EtIo0Bi ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1706%2E251025%2EtIo0Bi ]Abdul for US Senate

Did you see this?

[ The ]The Times: Meet the 'Michigan Mamdani' taking on the Democratic
establishment

Peter, party
insiders think they can decide this primary the old-fashioned way — by
picking their favorite candidate, calling their biggest donors, and
drowning out everyone else with money.

But they’re underestimating our movement, just like how they did in New
York City.

Abdul refuses corporate PAC and AIPAC money. He’s the only candidate in
this race who can say he’s never taken a dime from either.

The establishment can’t control our campaign, and that’s why they’re
threatened by us. Because of that, they’ll do what they always do: Corral
their mega-donor network to boost their preferred candidate and tip the
scales.

That’s the system we’re running to change, and we can’t do it without you
and this grassroots team.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260215-1-ak.vs4zb6&amount=10&refcode=em20260215-1697&t=1004&akid=1706%2E251025%2EtIo0Bi ]Peter,
pitch in $10 today to fuel our work to build an unstoppable
people-powered movement:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260215-1-ak.vs4zb6&amount=10&refcode=em20260215-1697&t=1023&akid=1706%2E251025%2EtIo0Bi ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this help us stay connected with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for taking the time to read this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1706%2E251025%2EtIo0Bi
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1706%2E251025%2EtIo0Bi

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m looking for Peter!
body:
Keep this between us...

| | | | Hey Peter, it's Marsha Blackburn.
I’m sharing this with you because I know you are a solid America First patriot.
My team was just reviewing the list of dedicated patriots who have completed the Official Trump Voter Profile, and your name was NOWHERE to be found.
Now, I know you're a loyal champion of our America First agenda, so I'm willing to give you the benefit of the doubt.
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[I’ve decided to reopen this secure link to give you an opportunity to complete your profile before 11:59 PM TONIGHT!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._kJkusj_4ZY6_Bw)
Not everyone is getting this second chance, so make sure not to waste it. I really look forward to seeing your name on that list when we check tomorrow morning!OFFICIAL TRUMP VOTER PROFILEPeter’s Status: INCOMPLETEDue: 11:59 PM TONIGHT[ACCESS AND COMPLETE YOUR PROFILE NOW >>>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._5sgQprg)This is your last chance! [Please, Peter, submit your Voter Profile before time expires!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-mYw)
\- Marsha Blackburn| | |

Hello – it’s Eileen Laubacher, the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.

Hello – it’s Eileen Laubacher, the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado. **I’m emailing to ask if you can make a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats.**
Here’s why: When I retired from the Navy, I was looking forward to more time with my husband, our five kids, and our three grandchildren. But I guess service to country is in my blood.
My father served 37 years in the Navy, and my grandfather fought fascism as a frogman in WWII. Since preschool, I was determined to go to the Naval Academy to follow in their footsteps – well before women could even attend.
When I look now at how Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert are trying to tear up our Constitution, I shudder at what my grandfather would think. Many of the same dangerous forces that he and his shipmates risked their lives to defeat are taking root here at home.
**I am running to defeat Lauren Boebert because I took an oath in the Navy to defend our Constitution against all threats, foreign and domestic – even when those threats are sitting members of Congress.**
My campaign has set a goal to raise $200,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:**
[**Please, will you make a monthly donation right now – every single dollar you can afford to give today – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not accepting money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so no amount you can give is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458218/601848497/156431970?refcode=20260215-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzVhMWIwZWQtYTgwYS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A3w3oHuDsKSlw74J7acJxkmOISn6afet8alyU51K6ac=)

name: Team Sharice
subject: We need you engaged
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're sorry to interrupt your weekend

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458684/601849989/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjZlZTI5Zi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAIXUZc2R323OeSQx6nd1zYRaMPUmZJW-cjZ_CfXLEA=) We’re sorry to interrupt your weekend, but we needed you to know: Sharice Davids is working around the clock to hold corrupt politicians like Donald Trump accountable. But if National Republicans get their hands on this seat in November? We can kiss any chance of a Democratic majority goodbye. **_[That’s why hitting our fundraising goals — including tonight’s HUGE deadline— is so important for a people-powered campaign like ours. This is about more than one election or one Congresswoman. It’s about building a Congress that fights for us, not the billionaires and extremists. Please, will you chip in before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458685/601849990/454992728?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_021526_sorrytointerrupt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjZlZTI5Zi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAIXUZc2R323OeSQx6nd1zYRaMPUmZJW-cjZ_CfXLEA=)_** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458686/601849991/454992728?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_021526_sorrytointerrupt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjZlZTI5Zi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAIXUZc2R323OeSQx6nd1zYRaMPUmZJW-cjZ_CfXLEA=)
---
The truth is, all of us have a role to play in these midterms.
Sharice’s role? She’s fighting a battle on two fronts right now. In Washington, she’s standing up to the corruption and cruelty of the National Republican Party. She’s supported legislation to ban stock trading by members of Congress, stood up to their scheme to gut affordable health care, and so much more.
And here in Kansas, she’s taking on the full force of the Kansas Republican Party, one of the most extreme state parties in the entire country. A party that — by their own admission — wants to ban abortion, ban marriage equality, and kick thousands of Kansan s off their health care.
**Your role? We need you engaged in this fight.**
Remember: There is nothing National Republicans would love more than to watch us voluntarily remove ourselves from the political process. They want us to feel hopeless. They want us to believe that this next election won’t matter — so why even bother supporting Democrats like Sharice anyway?
**They’re lying. They’re lying because this election WILL make a difference.**
They know if Sharice wins this election here in KS-03 — and Democrats take back the House with it — their power goes up in smoke. So they’re scrambling, trying to convince us that change is impossible.
**_[But change IS possible. As long as we roll up our sleeves, put in the work, and yes, chip in to help Democrats like Sharice fight back against their big-money opponents.
