clean_body: We're sorry to interrupt your weekend = We’re sorry to interrupt your weekend, but we needed you to know: Sharice Davids is working around the clock to hold corrupt politicians like Donald Trump accountable. But if National Republicans get their hands on this seat in November? We can kiss any chance of a Democratic majority goodbye. = | | = The truth is, all of us have a role to play in these midterms. Sharice’s role? She’s fighting a battle on two fronts right now. In Washington, she’s standing up to the corruption and cruelty of the National Republican Party. She’s supported legislation to ban stock trading by members of Congress, stood up to their scheme to gut affordable health care, and so much more. And here in Kansas, she’s taking on the full force of the Kansas Republican Party, one of the most extreme state parties in the entire country. A party that — by their own admission — wants to ban abortion, ban marriage equality, and kick thousands of Kansan s off their health care. Your role? We need you engaged in this fight. Remember: There is nothing National Republicans would love more than to watch us voluntarily remove ourselves from the political process. They want us to feel hopeless. They want us to believe that this next election won’t matter — so why even bother supporting Democrats like Sharice anyway? They’re lying. They’re lying because this election WILL make a difference. **JUST IN:_Election denier involved in fake electors plot wrote much of SAVE America Act, Trump-aligned think tank claims_** **MAGA Republicans in the House just voted for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote.[Sign now to demand the Senate BLOCK the SAVE Act >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458915/601850402/-2063862027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmVjZjBmNi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vb-Bxyfv0bE1SKggBsxHQRIWappSZ1oA0bZSULLSLQ=&emci=2d0f2bf0-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=f2ecf0f6-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=26828920)** | | | **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458917/601850403/-2063862027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmVjZjBmNi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vb-Bxyfv0bE1SKggBsxHQRIWappSZ1oA0bZSULLSLQ=&emci=2d0f2bf0-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=f2ecf0f6-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=26828920)**
---
Picture this, friend:
You show up to register to vote – or update your registration – and suddenly you’re told you can’t.
_Why?_ You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate.
**The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario** , and it would create unnecessary hurdles for millions of eligible voters – especially those without the time, money, or resources to chase down official documents
150 million citizens – _half the country_ – lack passports. And at **$130** each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either.
Make no mistake, friend: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box.
**[We've seen this playbook before, but the good news is we can fight back. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll sign the petition to demand the Senate STOP the SAVE Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458920/601850404/-2063862027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmVjZjBmNi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vb-Bxyfv0bE1SKggBsxHQRIWappSZ1oA0bZSULLSLQ=&emci=2d0f2bf0-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=f2ecf0f6-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=26828920)**
| | **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125458922/601850405/-2063862027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmVjZjBmNi1hOTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vb-Bxyfv0bE1SKggBsxHQRIWappSZ1oA0bZSULLSLQ=&emci=2d0f2bf0-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=f2ecf0f6-a90a-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=26828920)**

name: Chris Pappas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I wouldn't be in this race without people like you.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)
Hi,
I wouldn’t be in this race without people like you.
And today I’m asking for your help again — _**just $5.**_
Here’s why that matters:
This campaign isn’t funded by right-wing interests or GOP megadonors. It’s powered by Granite Staters — teachers, nurses, small business owners, retirees — who chip in what they can because they believe in what we’re building together.
**We’ve got a big mid-month fundraising deadline coming up TONIGHT.** If everyone reading this email gave just $5, _we’d hit our goal_ — and that momentum would carry us into the next phase of this race stronger than ever.
It’s not about the size of the donation. It’s about the strength of this grassroots team.
So I’m asking:
**[Will you chip in $5 today and help fuel this people-powered campaign?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_2.n0k167&refcode=em20260215-2&t=2&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260215_2.n0k167&refcode=em20260215-2&t=3&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)**
Thank you for believing in me — and in what we can accomplish together.
– Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260215-2&t=4&refcode2=5098_582294_lrHnlI&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=5&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=6&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=5098%2E582294%2ElrHnlI)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “FULL RESTITUTION”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
A slap on the wrist is not enough...
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
| **_FROM THE DESK OF RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
Friend,
---
This report gives me hope that justice will be served:
---
**_“Republicans are demanding _FULL_ _RESTITUTION_ for Rudy Giuliani, who was charged with 13 felony counts and fined $148 million after contesting Georgia’s 2020 election, following Fulton County’s admission that 315,000 votes were fraudulently counted.”_**
---
Since you’ve been supporting me through thick and thin, you know more than anyone that I’ve been dragged through _hell and back_ over the last 5 years.
---
**_And what was my terrible “crime?”_**
---
...As it turns out, my “crime” was speaking the __truth__ – God’s honest truth.
---
_Ballots were, in fact, WRONGLY counted. 315,000 of them to be exact – in a state decided by less than 12,000 votes!_
---
_If America becomes a country where Deep State goons and corrupt lawyers and judges can RUIN you for simply asking questions and telling the truth, then our Free Republic is _dead_._
---
**That’s why I’m not giving up the fight._And neither is President Trump_.**
---
Giving up this fight means giving up on what America stands for. It means surrendering to fear tactics and legal warfare.
---
**The bad guys who perverted our justice system cannot just get off with a slap on the wrist. Dropped charges and a dismissed prosecutor do not undo the catastrophic damage that was done.**
---
**That’s why I’m _humbly_ asking you to join Republicans who are calling for “FULL RESTITUTION” for yours truly.**
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked in Georgia, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---
So my goal is to have **2,313,757** red-blooded Americans sign the petition for “full restitution.”
---
[ **Please add your name to the PETITION calling for “FULL RESTITUTION FOR RUDY W. name: Charlie Bailey
subject: Protect every single ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia

We need your help tonight.

Peter, I’m writing to you tonight because our $16,000 mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight, and right now, we’re falling behind. You and I have seen this before. The attacks on our state, the lies, the efforts to undermine our elections. But what’s happening now feels different. It’s not just noise: **it’s a real, coordinated attempt to take power away from voters** — and they’re starting right here in Georgia. It’s scary. But it’s not unstoppable. We’re building a defense that’s ready for whatever comes next. Legal teams to fight back in court. Organizers who make sure voters know their rights. And a protection plan for every single ballot. But we can’t do any of it if we miss this goal tonight. I truly believe that if we come together now — friends, neighbors, people who care about this state — we can protect our right to vote and stop the chaos. [Will you chip in $10 before midnight? Whatever you can give will help us cross the finish line and defend Georgia’s right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125459364/601850787/-951696519?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_021526_B1_MM4_D1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2ZmMGI1MS1hYjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HP-0N4Lgw3TyUz448BtjbSf0pyV_vhTmv-73SM1pbpo=) | | [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125459365/601850788/-951696519?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_021526_B1_MM4_D1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2ZmMGI1MS1hYjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HP-0N4Lgw3TyUz448BtjbSf0pyV_vhTmv-73SM1pbpo=)

| | My name is Adriana Fralick. _I still remember when my mom told us we_ _were moving to America._ She worked so hard to get us the right paperwork. She waited years for it. She never lied about who she was, why she was coming here, or why she was bringing her kids with her. **In that moment, my mom taught me** **something I’ll never forget:** **_America is worth _respecting_. _****_Our laws _matter_. _** **_And opportunity comes with _responsibility_._** So I hit the books. I worked hard just like my mother showed me. And after graduating from the University of Nevada Reno, I finally earned my law degree. **That’s when the REAL fight began****⬇**⬇****⬇****

clean_body: | | | | | Many 9-year-old Mexican girls aretrafficked across the border. I thank God every day I wasn’t one of them. My mother brought me and my siblings here LEGALLY – and we were welcomed by the booming sound of made a promise to fight for America ever since. I’d like to extend that same promise to you. Will you read the rest of my story? | | My name is Adriana Fralick. I still remember when my mom told us we were moving to America. She worked so hard to get us the right paperwork. She waited years for it. She never lied about who she was, why she was coming here, or why she was bringing her kids with her. In that moment, my mom taught me something I’ll never forget: America is worth respecting. Our laws matter. And opportunity comes with responsibility. So I hit the books. I worked hard just like my mother showed me. And after graduating from the University of Nevada Reno, I finally earned my law degree. That’s when the REAL fight began⬇⬇**⬇ | | As soon as I got into the world of politics, I immediately saw the the Democrats play. Obstruction. Crooked plea deals.Vicious lawfare and political attacks. And let me tell you, it’s only gotten worse : → Violent criminals and illegal aliens released into our country →President Trump dragged in front**of kangaroo courts → Conservative parents and grandparents maligned, spied on, and labeled as domestic terrorists I’m running for Attorney General to make sure that NEVER happens again. The American people deserve a fighter who'll: CRACK DOWN on illegal immigration LOCK UP violent criminals; and PROTECT our law enforcement | | The Democrats are raising MILLIONS against my campaign for this very reason. They will lie, intimidate, and threaten me from now until Election Day – . But I won’t back down. That 9-year-old girl is still in my heart.And she made a promise to fight for America no matter what. But it all comes down to this moment: Will you rush over $25 or more to join my fight as the next Republican Attorney General? For America, Adriana Fralick Republican for Attorney General (NV) | | | | | Paid for by Adriana for Nevada** | | P.O. Box 370801, Las Vegas, NV, 89137 | | |

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Recapping “Powered by Love, Not Cages”
body:
This moment demands participation in many forms — showing care and compassion for immigrants in detention is one way to do that. | | | Peter, In this moment, it’s crucial to build pathways for our loved ones, neighbors, and communities to come together, process, and channel our emotions — whether we’re angry, grieving, or uncertain — into shared healing, collective care, and purposeful action. In our United We Dream “Powered by Love, Not Cages” community call on Thursday, we spoke to over 115 people about what it means to live and lead out of love in this moment. We encouraged participants to share United We Dream’s work with their loved ones, join a political education training, and find a political home in their own communities. We also encouraged them to gather friends and write letters to our immigrant neighbors in detention centers sometime in February in the hope of offering them hope and human connection. This moment demands your active participation. It demands compassion and a willingness to care for your neighbors. You’ve shown your love and allyship time and time again, Peter. **** [**Your contribution to United We Dream will help us show that love is powerful. Join us as we work to empower immigrant youth, keep our communities informed, and demand accountability from those in power.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAesyy1ml4hxyp2tJ_Fo3Ip6Gl_XOaxxL1LkpCoriMygPeIr_pIAUK1q5__RRCKGzJa289cOyXMCKSnEX9iAsGtbdQpbuDYc3GFlU2-chSzO3AzPylCBy489WRInKeY0efXu76KRMi3aH9XdDQrn1-TcFiFjGi8bk5dQuEwYDyGyYY3xa4-eH-mLzU55IvZcx0PjO9rR9zBNbPfGIq9PQRgrPwV9iBjtP__UWKLeRX8OQQ9piYcKA8fTFWe1v-G67XZHNVYZcPpN_yjWWWnwXjVNOzSVcbqW27G04K4UxXPyvzFdEYYJy8orAuoelWUAtZothKOd1p0KEfq7OvdtuyynUyxZip1bmR6bmvKi3OnTJveelenbLkY9pGkbHHQoZtovDWOFmrPKmo01Ct979YjfzPCVfQ8fUyh7uP8Mx9g_O4/4o6/4GRi2akLQE2hN_c7D0CWpQ/h0/h001.yU9S0jAck6pDORjdOe91-dgVSyp8IndJMIeuqYOD5oI) clean_body: This moment demands participation in many forms — showing care and compassion for immigrants in detention is one way to do that. | | | Peter, In this moment, it’s crucial to build pathways for our loved ones, neighbors, and communities to come together, process, and channel our emotions — whether we’re angry, grieving, or uncertain — into shared healing, collective care, and purposeful action. In our United We Dream “Powered by Love, Not Cages” community call on Thursday, we spoke to over 115 people about what it means to live and lead out of love in this moment. We encouraged participants to share United We Dream’s work with their loved ones, join a political education training, and find a political home in their own communities. We also encouraged them to gather friends and write letters to our immigrant neighbors in detention centers sometime in February in the hope of offering them hope and human connection. This moment demands your active participation. It demands compassion and a willingness to care for your neighbors. You’ve shown your love and allyship time and time again, Peter. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Thank you, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

This is Tyler Bowyer, Executive Director of Turning Point PAC.
**Ballot chasers are the fiercest fighters in the 2026 battle.**
While many stepped back after tragedy struck, our chasers stepped up — knocking doors, contacting voters, chasing mail-ins, and making sure every conservative vote is counted in the exact districts that decide control of Congress.
They are on the front lines right now.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2add9874-aed7-4e2b-a4a9-cb3d467a7f00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hi, it's Raja.
I wanted to share three critical numbers that define where we are right now:
### **30 Days**
That's how long it is until Election Day - and right now, early voting is happening across our state.
In fact, Illinoisans are casting their ballots as you read this.
This will be one of the FIRST opportunities of 2026 to send a signal that we're DONE with Trump's cruelty and chaos. What happens in Illinois will set the tone for the rest of this entire election year.
### **$7 Million**
That's how much Super PACs are spending to support my opponent.
These shady PACs have already been caught breaking the law. And we just learned one of them is funded to the tune of **six figures** by a notorious ICE contractor responsible for the Broadview Detention Center right here in Illinois.
They're trying to buy this election because they know I won't be a senator who answers to special interests or looks the other way while ICE operates with impunity.
### **$23**
That's our average grassroots donation.
The only way to fight back against dark money trying to buy our elections is when thousands of Americans fight back by giving just $23 at a time. No billionaire checks. No shady Super PACs. Just real people who believe in everything we're fighting for.
### **We Need to Finish Strong**
Tonight is my February Mid-Month Deadline. It is one of our FINAL deadlines before Election Day.
My team and I set an ambitious $100,000 goal to keep our organizing strong through early voting and counter the Super PAC spending against us.
_But we 're falling short, and we're running out of time._
**[I'm personally asking: Can I count on you to chip in our average grassroots donation of just $23 today to help hit my goal, fight back against dark money, and win this critical race?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2add9874-aed7-4e2b-a4a9-cb3d467a7f00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[DONATE NOW ->](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2add9874-aed7-4e2b-a4a9-cb3d467a7f00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With just 30 days to go and voting already underway, every contribution matters. Your $23 helps us reach voters, counter misleading Super PAC ads, and prove that grassroots campaigns can beat shady dark money.
I know how committed this grassroots team is, and I'm grateful to have you on my side in this final stretch.
Thank you,
Raja

name: Mike Rogers
subject: I’m officially terrified, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I need you to read this now.
| | | |
---
[](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[]()
### Friend,

### I simply couldn't wait to share this. After several rounds of phone calls with our party leaders, I’m deeply unsettled. I keep thinking about President Trump—about everything he’s trying to accomplish—and I’m terrified I won’t be able to help him.

### **[This Senate race is the most competitive in the country, and the dark money liberals know it. They’re treating this race like the final boss, pouring in money to cement their control and ensure President Trump cannot move forward.](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)**

### I’m writing to you with a level of vulnerability I've never shared publicly.

### I’m afraid I’ve run out of time to meet our fundraising goal, and I was explicitly told that if I don’t hit this number, the deficit is insurmountable.

### I am begging you to read the personal note I’ve put together. It's a plea for help, meant only for your eyes. Our opponents would _love_ to see this note, but if they get their hands on it, it will destroy our leverage.

### Please, keep this conversation private, and click below to read my note right away:

[READ MY URGENT NOTE](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[]()
###

### Help me pull off this miracle.

### To Victory,

### Mike Rogers
### Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

subject: 30 days to prevent MAGA from stealing a dem primary
body:
MAGA billionaire-funded dark money groups are pouring millions of dollars into IL-9 in the final stretch, trying to buy this seat and stop a real progressive Democrat from winning.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAB9JYFuxFCm3lt0GQrQtPV-WblLsHchxEXyeqT32S8RDg3egAoQee4Nk-snFw8U5n1Fj_p0DnHgpCx-E5uwUauQ-vXikdKpRad9G6JWTtlISgvMuuLf8iDsbj51LlbTKBIAb_Hs2ciWviLA6MFvlJKtThMBXxWhaL25oIP7nf79aSIkG48YH7lVSZv4iuDywCwL8YustclI526OSZtYQCSaOIzk_lm1&c=g0Y__hYm1bpbIND55I86Hd-6QQkhDybWwZC2oSeVaUQkCe4brZ7-xg==&ch=YmsipEAUIoOAjvldnwBgs2rAEiJa37RbXaziLpxrPITo9AYkEooC_Q==)
---
|
Peter,
There are officially 30 days until the polls close in IL-9.
This is it. The final stretch. The moment everything we've built together comes down to.
For months, we have built a movement rooted in working-class power. A movement to stop ICE's violent invasion of our communities. A movement to bring justice to the Trump administration for their crimes. A movement fighting for Medicare for All, affordable housing, and lowering prices for everyday families.
Now it's do or die.
Outside spending in this race has exploded recently. MAGA billionaire-funded dark money groups appeared out of thin air and started pouring millions of dollars into IL-9 during this final stretch. MAGA is trying to steal this seat and stop a real progressive Democrat from winning.
They have billionaires, but we have the people.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAB9JYFuxFCm3lt0GQrQtPV-WblLsHchxEXyeqT32S8RDg3egAoQee4Nk-snFw8U5n1Fj_p0DnHgpCx-E5uwUauQ-vXikdKpRad9G6JWTtlISgvMuuLf8iDsbj51LlbTKBIAb_Hs2ciWviLA6MFvlJKtThMBXxWhaL25oIP7nf79aSIkG48YH7lVSZv4iuDywCwL8YustckgR2iHGYVaHRID97Eqmdc4&c=g0Y__hYm1bpbIND55I86Hd-6QQkhDybWwZC2oSeVaUQkCe4brZ7-xg==&ch=YmsipEAUIoOAjvldnwBgs2rAEiJa37RbXaziLpxrPITo9AYkEooC_Q==)
---
Our campaign has raised over $1 million dollars from tens of thousands of grassroots donors across the country. No corporate PACs. No MAGA billionaires. Just everyday Democrats chipping in for a movement they believe in.
While my opponents rely on false and misleading attack ads funded by MAGA billionaires and corporate special interests, we are focused on what actually wins elections: real conversations with our neighbors. Knocking doors. Making calls. Sending texts. Showing up in every neighborhood across the district.
This is the kind of organizing that cuts through the noise. This is how we'll defeat the MAGA billionaires trying to steal this seat.
But we have to finish strong. Every dollar you give right now will be deployed immediately in the field. It supports our staff and volunteers working around the clock to reach every last voter before the polls close.
[Can I count on you to rush a $30 donation right now to power our campaign in these final 30 days and send our movement from the streets of Chicago to the halls of Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAB9JYFuxFCm3lt0GQrQtPV-WblLsHchxEXyeqT32S8RDg3egAoQee4Nk-snFw8U7YsxkxSP2eRFuFPTnOj74Nf1j-UuIcaHFa_-ZHBDo3oVgqDREsK_ZP7vsgnOlovYBRQMajUfuyCdedYbmJJMikS2UyP7O1VckdzKED_59NqRYZc6gLz-bUxs7yKHC_wv2D-ZAKCEVoNLI_A0QM5mETPyLt8ATsUgirqKkLsLwTU=&c=g0Y__hYm1bpbIND55I86Hd-6QQkhDybWwZC2oSeVaUQkCe4brZ7-xg==&ch=YmsipEAUIoOAjvldnwBgs2rAEiJa37RbXaziLpxrPITo9AYkEooC_Q==)

And for the first time in a long time, Georgia Republicans don't know who's really in charge. **I 'm Shawn Harris, and I'm running in the special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene -- and what we're seeing right now is total chaos on the Republican side.** Trump and MTG are at war. GOP candidates are afraid to say her name. And the so-called "MAGA movement" is eating itself alive. That chaos created this moment - our moment. clean_body: | | MAGA is panicking!! And for the first time in a long time, Georgia Republicans don't know who's really in charge. I 'm Shawn Harris, and I'm running in the special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene -- and what we're seeing right now is total chaos on the Republican side. Trump and MTG are at war. GOP candidates are afraid to say her name. And the so-called "MAGA movement" is eating itself alive. That chaos created this moment - our moment. And moments like this don't come often. This special election is happening soon - on March 10. So either we show up now, or Republicans lock this seat down again and move on like nothing happened. | ~~ ~~ ~~ Thank you for being part of this fight, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Sorry about this email!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I hope you know that I never take your support for granted.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125459936/601852332/-671935818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.15_Sorry-About-This-Email_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2RkODVjOS1hZjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3EV55n3PWdv5KRpLAyYejKs2q2az3PAH2CIyz_5xEk=) Folks, I want to be completely transparent.

I don’t like reaching out just to ask you for money, especially when folks’ budgets are as tight as they are now. **You’re not an ATM — I hope you know that I never take your support for granted.**

When I _do_ ask, it’s because we are up against a real, urgent deadline — and tonight is one of those moments.

Republicans are already pouring millions into key Senate races to protect their majority. They’re counting on corporate PACs and billionaire donors to keep control of the Senate, push Trump’s billionaire-first agenda even further, and block the progress we’re fighting for.

Our team doesn’t have that kind of money.

We’re depending on grassroots power to support battleground races across the country and take back our majority. Friend, I wanted to reach out personally as we hit the halfway mark of the first quarter. This is a big moment for our campaign -- not just because our first public FEC deadline of the election year is approaching fast, but because the stakes here in CA-45 are rising every single day. **Election analysts now rank CA-45 as the most vulnerable Democratic seat in Southern California. Multiple Republican challengers are already in the mix. And national Republicans are pouring in money, trying to buy this seat back.** But here’s the difference: We’re running a campaign that delivers _real_ results -- not empty promises. Whether it’s taking on Big Pharma’s middlemen to lower prescription drug costs or fighting to protect our democracy, I’m focused on what really matters for working families. That’s what this campaign is about, and it’s why we need to keep pushing forward. **[This race was decided by just 653 votes in 2024. That means we’ll need to work twice as hard -- and earlier than ever -- to hold the line and protect this seat. clean_body: | = = Friend, I wanted to reach out personally as we hit the halfway mark of the first quarter. This is a big moment for our campaign -- not just because our first public FEC deadline of the election year is approaching fast, but because the stakes here in CA-45 are rising every single day. Election analysts now rank CA-45 as the most vulnerable Democratic seat in Southern California. Multiple Republican challengers are already in the mix. And national Republicans are pouring in money, trying to buy this seat back. But here’s the difference: We’re running a campaign that delivers real results -- not empty promises. Whether it’s taking on Big Pharma’s middlemen to lower prescription drug costs or fighting to protect our democracy, I’m focused on what really matters for working families. Hi Peter,

I’m sure your inbox is full of a lot of emails right now – I know mine is! – but here's why this one might just be the most important:

I’m Raja Krishnamoorthi, running for U.S. Senate in Illinois. This will be one of the FIRST elections of 2026, and it’s coming up in just a few weeks.

This is a critical opportunity to send an unmistakable signal to Donald Trump that we’re done with his cruelty and chaos.

This is our chance to stand up to Trump. And that’s why I’m running: Because now more than ever, we need Senators with a backbone.

Senators who stand up to Donald Trump and ICE. Who force real oversight and accountability. Who fight for hardworking families – not special interests.

That’s what’s at stake here, Peter.

But here’s the problem: Right now, shady Super PACs are spending MILLIONS to support my opponent — thanks in part to funding from a notorious ICE contractor.

Tonight, I have a critical mid-month deadline — one of my FINAL ones before Election Day. Right now, we’re not on track to hit our goal, so I need a huge outpouring of grassroots support to keep up with these Super PACs.

So I need to ask: Can I count on you to support my campaign with a $10 or $25 donation before the midnight deadline? I promise it makes a big difference. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250]

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125460839/601855778/-103424466?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5700-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE3M2QwNi1iMjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abNu6RQQROWefVyRGshBfet1sR0QlquGfFunAwtwjGI=)
Friend, it’s Alex Vindman.
February marks 6 years since Donald Trump fired me after I blew the whistle on his not-so-perfect phone call with Ukraine.
I’ve risked everything because I refuse to bow down to a wannabe tyrant. I refuse to start now.
Donald Trump and his allies may try to attack me, but I’m not backing down from the fight against chaos and corruption. That’s why I am running for the United States Senate in Trump’s backyard — and why I am humbly asking:
**_[Will you please split a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help me check Trump’s power? Your donations add up quickly when everyone is chipping in what they can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125460840/601855779/-103424466?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5700-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE3M2QwNi1iMjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abNu6RQQROWefVyRGshBfet1sR0QlquGfFunAwtwjGI=)_**
| | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125460841/601855780/-103424466?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5700-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE3M2QwNi1iMjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abNu6RQQROWefVyRGshBfet1sR0QlquGfFunAwtwjGI=)
---
I risked everything by reporting that phone call. I stand by that decision six years later.
When I joined the Army, I took an oath to defend our nation and its values. I served at the Pentagon under presidents from both parties, putting our nation’s safety before politics.
The decision to report that call wasn’t for political gain. It was to protect our democracy. I believe I served my nation by helping expose corruption by the chief executive, and I would do it again today.
The reality is, we are still in the fight for the soul of our country. We need leaders who have the courage to take on corruption and lower costs for our families in the Senate.
I know we can defeat Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate and win this race...but I can’t do it without you.
**_[Winning this thing is going to take everyone chipping in. If you can split a few dollars between my campaign and Jacky Rosen, it would go a long way to show MAGA that we are ready to take them on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125460842/601855781/-103424466?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5700-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE3M2QwNi1iMjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abNu6RQQROWefVyRGshBfet1sR0QlquGfFunAwtwjGI=)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125460843/601855782/-103424466?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk5700-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE3M2QwNi1iMjBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abNu6RQQROWefVyRGshBfet1sR0QlquGfFunAwtwjGI=)

Tens of thousands trapped by fear, debt, and deportation threats

# [Idaho Built an Ag Empire on Modern Day Slavery](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=188066432&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4MDY2NDMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzExODk3NjgsImV4cCI6MTc3Mzc4MTc2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GU-e9tW9zJ4f9Pm_X3RSrkPToFsgWrfT8miKOrdnSXk)
### Tens of thousands trapped by fear, debt, and deportation threats
| | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Feb 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=188066432&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4MDY2NDMyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MTE4OTc2OCwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzgxNzY4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j2kcv6TRep7q_hkdrEwlwJw2fQJnm_MMMEcBKSwFacE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=188066432&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4MDY2NDMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzExODk3NjgsImV4cCI6MTc3Mzc4MTc2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GU-e9tW9zJ4f9Pm_X3RSrkPToFsgWrfT8miKOrdnSXk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=188066432&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4MDY2NDMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzExODk3NjgsImV4cCI6MTc3Mzc4MTc2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GU-e9tW9zJ4f9Pm_X3RSrkPToFsgWrfT8miKOrdnSXk)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/idaho-built-an-ag-empire-on-modern?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last week, some dairy industry and construction folks got offended when I compared their labor practices to "**slavery**." Called it disrespectful and gaslit all of us who are oppossed to illegal immigartion.
Take a look:
[| | | | | Brandy
---
@LibertyBelle208
Today the men in suits showed up to tell us what would happen to Idaho's economy if we took away the slaves. It started with who will pick our potatoes. Then who will milk the cows. And then what about the sugar beets, barley and onions. Then Idaho's tater tots and yogurt.
| 11:12 PM * Feb 13, 2026 * 442K Views1.25K Replies * 2.67K Reposts * 9.99K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e6f2d8ff-9a6f-4ef6-85a3-ab5a10efe37d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
You know what?
Good. Be offended. Because what's actually disrespectful is what's happening on farms and jobsites across Idaho right now. And if the comparison bothers you, maybe that says something about the conditions you're defending.
So this blog is my response.
* * *
**Imagine you 're here illegally, working on an Idaho farm.**
Could be dairy. Could be potato fields. Sugar beets. Onions. Maybe you're on a construction crew building houses in Boise's suburbs. Your boss knows. Of course he knows. The industry evenly openly claims there are 30,000 illegal workers in Idaho (I think it's way more).
You complain about conditions? Mention the wages? Say something about the converted barn they're making you sleep in with nine other guys? The farmer doesn't have to do anything. Doesn't have to call ICE. Doesn't even threaten directly. The threat just exists in the air between you. It's always there.
He needs you, actually. Can't run his operation without you. But you don't know that for sure, do you? And even if you did, the fear sits in your chest anyway because the risk isn't worth testing.
_**This is human exploitation happening right now in every agricultural county in Idaho.**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9e5dec1a-9098-408c-8e1e-9c5c76bd8ad5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A couple months ago an ICE agent based in Boise told me something that keeps rattling around in my head. He busted some farmworkers during a raid last year and expected resistance, anger, fear, chaos, the usual. _**Instead they thanked him.**_ Because they said they'd been working every single day since Christmas with no break. Not one day. Months straight of 12, 14, 16 hour days.
For them, getting arrested and deported was relief.
Think about what has to be true for deportation to feel like freedom.
Idaho agriculture runs a multibillion dollar operation annually. We got dairy, potatoes, wheat, sugar beets, barley, hay. The Magic Valley feeds a chunk of America. And it runs on people who can't say no. Dairy operations needs milkers every day. No weekends off ever. Construction sites building the new subdivisions outside Meridian and Nampa? Same workers, different setting, identical fear.
You're up before dawn, work until dark, sometimes seven days a week. Maybe you're making $16 an hour on a farm or high teens to low twenties on a construction site. State minimum wage is $7.25 but rent keeps climbing anyway. Your back hurts from lifting sacks of potatoes or sheets of drywall. Fifty, eighty, hundred pounds. Over and over. The guy you work with lost three fingers last month in the machinery and kept working after they patched him up because... what else is he gonna do?
But the housing is where the farmer or contractor really becomes the slaveholder. You're living in trailers or converted outbuildings, packed in tight with maybe ten or fifteen people sharing space meant for maybe four. Southern and southeast Idaho winters can get cold. Summer in the valley hits 100 and maybe there's no AC. You're paying rent for this, by the way. $100 - $300 monthly gets deducted right from your check for a room with mold creeping up the walls and mice in the corners.
These are human beings created in God's image being exploited for profit.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83634135-7b99-4d11-8b73-def21a861022?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Or, maybe you paid a coyote (i.e. smuggler) to get here.
$3,000, $5,000+. So now you're working just to pay that off before you even start sending money "home" like you promised. Months of labor where you're essentially getting nothing. It's bondage with a paycheck.
And the boss knows this. He knows you can't leave, can't complain, can't organize. He's built his whole operation around your fear. The economics demand it, whether he's evil or just practical. _**Cheap slave labor keeps him competitive.**_ If he pays fair wages with real protections and benefits though, he's out of business.
_So he exploits you instead and pays poverty wages_ and houses you in conditions he wouldn't let his dog live in. He takes your labor and your dignity and calls it a job opportunity.
Many of Idaho's agricultural regions are remote. Twin Falls, Jerome, Gooding, up into the Magic Valley. Even the construction sites on Boise's edges keep you isolated. Your employer often provides housing and transportation. Which means he controls everything about your life. Your sleeping arrangements. Your ability to get anywhere. Access to other people. Total control.
_**This is modern day plantation logic.**_
_**Different century, same structure.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d3c868b4-0607-4bb6-9763-784f77a0f954?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Agricultural employers and construction outfits say there are 30,000 illegal aliens working in Idaho total. I don't buy it.
But Idaho's got hundreds of dairy operations. Add potato farms, onion operations, sugar beet harvest, hay production, cattle ranching, food processing plants in Twin Falls and Nampa. Then construction booming all across the Treasure Valley. All those new houses, the commercial buildings, road crews.
The math doesn't work. I think the industry lowballs the number because acknowledging the real scale means acknowledging how completely dependent they are. It means admitting the whole state economy is built on exploiting people who have no legal standing to push back.
I'd bet it's 50,000 easy. Probably more. Scattered across farms and job sites, invisible until ICE shows up, then suddenly they matter for a day before everyone goes back to pretending the system's fine.
That's fifty thousand human beings being systematically exploited.
It's a human rights crisis happening in our backyard.
You can't leave. Technically you can, sure. Nobody's got you in chains. But leaving means possibly getting sent back to whatever you fled. Your kids grow up without you and the money you were sending to your mother in Mexico City stops.
_**So you stay. And the boss knows you 'll stay (he's counting on it).**_
The threat of ICE doesn't even have to be spoken. It's just there. Hanging over every interaction. You see a sheriff's car on the highway and your stomach drops. Hear sirens and wonder if today's the day. That constant fear is the whip. It's just modern and more efficient and wrapped in immigration law.
Those workers who thanked the Boise ICE agent weren't confused or broken. _They were exhausted past the point where deportation seemed worse than the daily grind._ When going home to potential danger feels better than another day of farm work or construction, something's fundamentally wrong with the equation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf2a7f5f-d8c9-43bb-b813-707a7f3eaa90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Talk to anyone who actually knows Idaho agriculture or construction and they'll tell you the same thing: 70-80%+ of the labor is illegal. The whole thing would collapse without it.
So there's this weird unspoken agreement. Employers need workers. Workers need jobs that don't ask for papers, and ICE does occasional raids to show they're doing something but not so many that the economy crashes.
_**Everyone pretends the system works even though it 's built on people who have zero power and no recourse.**_
And the conditions stay brutal because they can. Why improve housing when workers can't complain? Why pay more when the alternative for workers is deportation? Why add safety equipment when injuries don't get reported?
The mechanism is different but the power structure is identical to slavery. One person owns your labor because the alternative is destruction.
We built prosperity on the backs of people we exploit because we can. And we call ourselves a Christian state? Idaho, where everyone claims to love Jesus and follow His teachings? Where are those teachings when tens of thousands of people are being exploited in our fields and on our construction sites?
### Jesus said whatever you did to the least of these, you did to Him. So what are we doing to Him right now in the Magic Valley? In Jerome County? In Canyon? On every farm and jobsite paying slave wages for 16 hour days?
Obviously farmers and contractors mostly won't call ICE on their own workers. But they don't have to because the possibility does the work for them. You police yourself because the consequences of stepping out of line are too catastrophic to risk.
You're living in uncertainty.
_Is today the day? Will this complaint be the one that triggers something?_
The psychological weight of that is crushing and it's deliberate. Your fear turns into someone else's profit. Your silence keeps the whole machine running. Your inability to leave or demand better props up Idaho's economy.
Those workers thanking the ICE agent would rather face deportation than one more shift. When that's your reality, when the cage is that suffocating, what else do you call it? The person controlling you might think of themselves as a job provider, someone giving opportunities to people who need them. Maybe he even goes to church on Sunday and prays for the poor and the oppressed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74998fd6-39e5-45c3-8b63-fd8533b0dbf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is shameful...
There's no other word for it. We're exploiting human beings, tens of thousands of them, and we've built a whole economic system that depends on their powerlessness. We make money from their fear while prices stay low because they can't speak up.
_**And we do it in Jesus 's name?**_
In a state that prides itself on Christian values and family and hard work and integrity? Where's the integrity in paying someone slave wages for 16 hour days, seven days a week? Where's the family values in housing people in converted barns with no heat?
_**Where 's the Christian love in building your business model on the certainty that your workers are too terrified to demand basic human dignity?**_
This is the thing that seldmo gets talked about in the debate on illegal immigartion: that fact that these are people. They have names, families, hopes, pain. They are human beings create din god's image deserving of basic rights and dignity and fair treatment.
The people profiting from this system should look in the mirror and ask themselves what they're really doing. And they should reckon with the fact that their prosperity is built on other people's suffering (because it is).
_This has to change._ Basic human decency demands it. You can't claim to value life and dignity and justice while building your agricultural or construction empire on the backs of people who can't say no.

clean_body: Tens of thousands trapped by fear, debt, and deportation threats | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Tens of thousands trapped by fear, debt, and deportation threats | | | Feb 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | Last week, some dairy industry and construction folks got offended when I compared their labor practices to "slavery." Called it disrespectful and gaslit all of us who are oppossed to illegal immigartion. Take a look: You know what? Good. Be offended. Because what's actually disrespectful is what's happening on farms and jobsites across Idaho right now. And if the comparison bothers you, maybe that says something about the conditions you're defending. So this blog is my response. Imagine you 're here illegally, working on an Idaho farm. Could be dairy. Could be potato fields. Sugar beets. Onions. Maybe you're on a construction crew building houses in Boise's suburbs. Your boss knows. Of course he knows. The industry evenly openly claims there are 30,000 illegal workers in Idaho (I think it's way more). You complain about conditions? Mention the wages? Say something about the converted barn they're making you sleep in with nine other guys? The farmer doesn't have to do anything. Doesn't have to call ICE. Doesn't even threaten directly. The threat just exists in the air between you. It's always there. He needs you, actually. Can't run his operation without you. But you don't know that for sure, do you? And even if you did, the fear sits in your chest anyway because the risk isn't worth testing. This is human exploitation happening right now in every agricultural county in Idaho. A couple months ago an ICE agent based in Boise told me something that keeps rattling around in my head. He busted some farmworkers during a raid last year and expected resistance, anger, fear, chaos, the usual. Instead they thanked him. Because they said they'd been working every single day since Christmas with no break. Not one day. Months straight of 12, 14, 16 hour days. For them, getting arrested and deported was relief. Think about what has to be true for deportation to feel like freedom. Idaho agriculture runs a multibillion dollar operation annually. We got dairy, potatoes, wheat, sugar beets, barley, hay. The Magic Valley feeds a chunk of America. And it runs on people who can't say no. Dairy operations needs milkers every day. No weekends off ever. Construction sites building the new subdivisions outside Meridian and Nampa? Same workers, different setting, identical fear. You're up before dawn, work until dark, sometimes seven days a week. Maybe you're making $16 an hour on a farm or high teens to low twenties on a construction site. State minimum wage is $7.25 but rent keeps climbing anyway. Your back hurts from lifting sacks of potatoes or sheets of drywall. Fifty, eighty, hundred pounds. Over and over. The guy you work with lost three fingers last month in the machinery and kept working after they patched him up because... what else is he gonna do? But the housing is where the farmer or contractor really becomes the slaveholder. You're living in trailers or converted outbuildings, packed in tight with maybe ten or fifteen people sharing space meant for maybe four. Southern and southeast Idaho winters can get cold. Summer in the valley hits 100 and maybe there's no AC. You're paying rent for this, by the way. $100 - $300 monthly gets deducted right from your check for a room with mold creeping up the walls and mice in the corners. These are human beings created in God's image being exploited for profit. | | ---|---|--- Or, maybe you paid a coyote (i.e. smuggler) to get here. $3,000, $5,000+. So now you're working just to pay that off before you even start sending money "home" like you promised. Months of labor where you're essentially getting nothing. It's bondage with a paycheck. And the boss knows this. He knows you can't leave, can't complain, can't organize. He's built his whole operation around your fear. The economics demand it, whether he's evil or just practical. Cheap slave labor keeps him competitive. If he pays fair wages with real protections and benefits though, he's out of business. So he exploits you instead and pays poverty wages and houses you in conditions he wouldn't let his dog live in. He takes your labor and your dignity and calls it a job opportunity. Many of Idaho's agricultural regions are remote. Twin Falls, Jerome, Gooding, up into the Magic Valley. Even the construction sites on Boise's edges keep you isolated. Your employer often provides housing and transportation. Which means he controls everything about your life. Your sleeping arrangements. Your ability to get anywhere. Access to other people. Total control. This is modern day plantation logic. Different century, same structure. | | ---|---|--- Agricultural employers and construction outfits say there are 30,000 illegal aliens working in Idaho total. I don't buy it. But Idaho's got hundreds of dairy operations. Add potato farms, onion operations, sugar beet harvest, hay production, cattle ranching, food processing plants in Twin Falls and Nampa. Then construction booming all across the Treasure Valley. All those new houses, the commercial buildings, road crews. The math doesn't work. I think the industry lowballs the number because acknowledging the real scale means acknowledging how completely dependent they are. It means admitting the whole state economy is built on exploiting people who have no legal standing to push back. I'd bet it's 50,000 easy. Probably more. Scattered across farms and job sites, invisible until ICE shows up, then suddenly they matter for a day before everyone goes back to pretending the system's fine. That's fifty thousand human beings being systematically exploited. It's a human rights crisis happening in our backyard. You can't leave. Technically you can, sure. Nobody's got you in chains. But leaving means possibly getting sent back to whatever you fled. Your kids grow up without you and the money you were sending to your mother in Mexico City stops. So you stay. And the boss knows you 'll stay (he's counting on it). The threat of ICE doesn't even have to be spoken. It's just there. Hanging over every interaction. You see a sheriff's car on the highway and your stomach drops. Hear sirens and wonder if today's the day. That constant fear is the whip. It's just modern and more efficient and wrapped in immigration law. Those workers who thanked the Boise ICE agent weren't confused or broken. They were exhausted past the point where deportation seemed worse than the daily grind. When going home to potential danger feels better than another day of farm work or construction, something's fundamentally wrong with the equation. | | ---|---|--- Talk to anyone who actually knows Idaho agriculture or construction and they'll tell you the same thing: 70-80%+ of the labor is illegal. The whole thing would collapse without it. So there's this weird unspoken agreement. Employers need workers. Workers need jobs that don't ask for papers, and ICE does occasional raids to show they're doing something but not so many that the economy crashes. Everyone pretends the system works even though it 's built on people who have zero power and no recourse. And the conditions stay brutal because they can. Why improve housing when workers can't complain? Why pay more when the alternative for workers is deportation? Why add safety equipment when injuries don't get reported? The mechanism is different but the power structure is identical to slavery. One person owns your labor because the alternative is destruction. We built prosperity on the backs of people we exploit because we can. And we call ourselves a Christian state? Idaho, where everyone claims to love Jesus and follow His teachings? Where are those teachings when tens of thousands of people are being exploited in our fields and on our construction sites? Jesus said whatever you did to the least of these, you did to Him. So what are we doing to Him right now in the Magic Valley? In Jerome County? In Canyon? On every farm and jobsite paying slave wages for 16 hour days? Obviously farmers and contractors mostly won't call ICE on their own workers. But they don't have to because the possibility does the work for them. You police yourself because the consequences of stepping out of line are too catastrophic to risk. You're living in uncertainty. Is today the day? Will this complaint be the one that triggers something? The psychological weight of that is crushing and it's deliberate. Your fear turns into someone else's profit. Your silence keeps the whole machine running. Your inability to leave or demand better props up Idaho's economy. Those workers thanking the ICE agent would rather face deportation than one more shift. When that's your reality, when the cage is that suffocating, what else do you call it? The person controlling you might think of themselves as a job provider, someone giving opportunities to people who need them. Maybe he even goes to church on Sunday and prays for the poor and the oppressed. | | ---|---|--- This is shameful... There's no other word for it. We're exploiting human beings, tens of thousands of them, and we've built a whole economic system that depends on their powerlessness. We make money from their fear while prices stay low because they can't speak up. And we do it in Jesus 's name? In a state that prides itself on Christian values and family and hard work and integrity? Where's the integrity in paying someone slave wages for 16 hour days, seven days a week? Where's the family values in housing people in converted barns with no heat? Where 's the Christian love in building your business model on the certainty that your workers are too terrified to demand basic human dignity?** This is the thing that seldmo gets talked about in the debate on illegal immigartion: that fact that these are people. They have names, families, hopes, pain. They are human beings create din god's image deserving of basic rights and dignity and fair treatment. The people profiting from this system should look in the mirror and ask themselves what they're really doing. And they should reckon with the fact that their prosperity is built on other people's suffering (because it is). This has to change. Basic human decency demands it. You can't claim to value life and dignity and justice while building your agricultural or construction empire on the backs of people who can't say no. | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Brian Lenney ? ?

# Opinion:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0a455a02-d5df-4559-b616-7e50cdef441a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons
### **Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..23nPey4qPieZ73zdDjH_5HIaRRQ_NvBOGP2Phlc1AaM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187958815)
* * *
The House Homeland Security Committee hosted a hearing featuring Acting Immigration and Customs Enforcement Todd Lyons and Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Rodney Scott and Democrats acted as you would expect.
Furious over enhanced immigration enforcement across the United States, Democrats on the committee either misrepresented the incidents that have grabbed the nation's attention or put forth insane questions to Lyons and Scott. Instead of getting facts on the record, the Democrats were more interested in getting their soundbites in.
Rep. Shri Thanedar (Mich.) asked Scott if he is planning on seeking a pardon from President Donald Trump due to the conduct of Border Patrol agents operating within the United States.
"I signed up for this job to protect America and I'm very proud of the service that I provide and I don't need a pardon from anybody," Scott replied.
_**A messagr from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Finance Buzz](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2dd5e-0f63-4827-b591-329d2c09082a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Tackle your credit card debt by paying 0% interest until nearly 2028](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2dd5e-0f63-4827-b591-329d2c09082a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2dd5e-0f63-4827-b591-329d2c09082a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Did you know some credit cards can actually help you get out of debt faster?**
Yes, it sounds crazy. But it's true.
The secret: Find a card with a "0% intro APR" period for balance transfers.
Then, transfer your debt balance and pay it down as much as possible during the intro period. No interest means you could pay off the debt faster.
**[Check out these cards today and see what the hype is all about.](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2dd5e-0f63-4827-b591-329d2c09082a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2dd5e-0f63-4827-b591-329d2c09082a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**Piece continues**_
"You better hope so! You better hope you get been pardoned because you will be held accountable...That's why I introduced a bill in the United States Congress to abolish ICE," Thanedar replied.
It is unclear why Thanedar referred to ICE when talking to Scott since he is not in charge of that agency.
Rep. Daniel Goldman (N.Y.) told ICE's Lyons that Democrats calling ICE the "Gestapo" and "secret police" are justified because it is what they are seeing.
"People are simply making valid observations about your tactics, which are unAmerican and outright fascist," Goldman continued.
Lyons pushed back on Goldman's comments and told him to go to the Holocaust Museum down the street in Washington, D.C. because he is wrong to make such a comparison.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..23nPey4qPieZ73zdDjH_5HIaRRQ_NvBOGP2Phlc1AaM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187958815)
Rep. Delia Ramirez (Ill.), who infamously declared she is a proud Guatemalan first before being an American, used her time to compare ICE and Border Patrol to the Klu Klux Klan.
"I have as much respect for you as I do for the last white men who put on masks to terrorize communities of color. I have no respect for the inheritors of the Klanhood and the slave patrol," she said.
The most appalling line of questioning came from Rep. LaMonica McIver (N.J.), who is charged with assaulting federal agents during a fight outside a holding facility last year.
McIver asked Lyons if he considers himself to be a religious man. When Lyons replied that he does, McIver then asked, "How do you think Judgement Day will work for you with so much blood on your hands?"
"I'm not going to entertain that question," Lyons said.
"Of course not. Do you think you're going to Hell?" McIver followed up.
After Lyons again said he was not going to answer the question, Committee Chairman Andrew Garbarino (N.Y.) interjected to tell McIver her questions were not appropriate.
"Mr. Chairman, I'm just axing a question. You guys are always talking about religion and the Bible..." McIver said, defending her "questions."
After Tuesday's hearing, it can be certain that if Democrats take back the House after this year's midterms, the witch hunt from the Left against DHS will only benefit illegal aliens and the criminal enterprises who profit off of them.
* * *

Lyons pushed back on Goldman's comments and told him to go to the Holocaust Museum down the street in Washington, D.C. because he is wrong to make such a comparison. Rep. Delia Ramirez (Ill.), who infamously declared she is a proud Guatemalan first before being an American, used her time to compare ICE and Border Patrol to the Klu Klux Klan. "I have as much respect for you as I do for the last white men who put on masks to terrorize communities of color. I have no respect for the inheritors of the Klanhood and the slave patrol," she said. The most appalling line of questioning came from Rep. LaMonica McIver (N.J.), who is charged with assaulting federal agents during a fight outside a holding facility last year. McIver asked Lyons if he considers himself to be a religious man. When Lyons replied that he does, McIver then asked, "How do you think Judgement Day will work for you with so much blood on your hands?" "I'm not going to entertain that question," Lyons said. "Of course not. Do you think you're going to Hell?" McIver followed up. After Lyons again said he was not going to answer the question, Committee Chairman Andrew Garbarino (N.Y.) interjected to tell McIver her questions were not appropriate. "Mr. Chairman, I'm just axing a question. You guys are always talking about religion and the Bible..." McIver said, defending her "questions." After Tuesday's hearing, it can be certain that if Democrats take back the House after this year's midterms, the witch hunt from the Left against DHS will only benefit illegal aliens and the criminal enterprises who profit off of them. | A guest post by| reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media covering immigration, protests, and national flashpoints across the U.S. Subscribe for full podcast episodes, unfiltered interviews, and on-the-ground reporting you won't see on MSM. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

Remember: President Trump wants to cancel the 2026 election| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125461124/601856821/-569431239?refcode=260215em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2Q3NGY4MC1iNTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZe4UlicKW4t6dODbtkJVfCwuCGrSNTtRieosVjtRtA=)
---
| | In case you missed my last email, here’s the headline we cannot ignore:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125461125/601856822/-569431239?refcode=260215em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2Q3NGY4MC1iNTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZe4UlicKW4t6dODbtkJVfCwuCGrSNTtRieosVjtRtA=)
---
That’s not taken out of context – it’s a sitting president openly questioning whether Americans should get to vote at all. And it’s not the first time he’s said something like this. It’s time we take him at his word. This isn’t about left vs. right anymore. It’s about whether elections are a constitutional guarantee — or something politicians get to discard when they don’t like the outcome. So what happens next matters. We need to organize and fight to win elections up and down the ballot. **_We must make it crystal clear that attacks on democracy come with consequences._** **My campaign. team is working to protect democracy where it actually happens: at the state and local level, where elections are run, counted, and certified.** But I can’t do that without you. If people like Trump are testing the idea of canceling elections, then our response has to be overwhelming voter turnout, relentless accountability, and leaders who won’t flinch when democracy is under attack. **[If you believe voting is non-negotiable — and that no president gets to decide otherwise — I’m asking you to take the next step with me and chip in today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125461126/601856823/-569431239?refcode=260215em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2Q3NGY4MC1iNTBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZe4UlicKW4t6dODbtkJVfCwuCGrSNTtRieosVjtRtA=)**

What if I told you that there is no path to flipping the Senate blue unless we protect Michigan's Senate seat?
What if I told you that I'm statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent, Mike Rogers, I'm doing especially well among independent voters, and your gift could help me surge ahead in the polls?

What if I told you I was born and raised in Michigan, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you that national Republicans and their dark money super PACs have already started pouring money into Michigan, and that the worst is yet to come?

What if I told you Trump and his MAGA Republicans could eclipse $80 million in spending, which is what they spent last time trying to flip Michigan red?
Null, I can win this race. But only with committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. That's why hitting my $175,000 mid-month fundraising goal – one donation at a time – is absolutely crucial.

**[So will you chip in $5 to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14047?t=7&akid=2253%2E49239%2EclUamy)**

Hi friend, MAGA politicians are still seriously talking about this Greenland nonsense. They pound their chests, and float absurd distractions while working families are left behind. Rent keeps climbing. Groceries cost more every week. Childcare is unaffordable. Health care bills keep piling up. These stunts aren’t leadership. They’re a distraction. These MAGA politicians don’t want to talk about affordability because they don’t have a plan to fix it. So instead, they change the subject. Loudly. Ridiculously. Repeatedly. Meanwhile, Nellie Pou is focused on what actually matters to New Jersey families. Lowering costs. Investing in infrastructure. Protecting workers. Making government work for people who are just trying to get by. That contrast could not be clearer. But if we want serious leaders who talk about rent instead of foreign land grabs, we have to win here in Northern New Jersey and across the country. And winning means building the resources to compete, organize, and take back the House majority. **[Please, chip in today to support Rep. Pou and help us put an end to this nonsense. clean_body: | | Hi friend, MAGA politicians are still seriously talking about this Greenland nonsense. They pound their chests, and float absurd distractions while working families are left behind. Rent keeps climbing. Groceries cost more every week. Childcare is unaffordable. Health care bills keep piling up. These stunts aren’t leadership. They’re a distraction. These MAGA politicians don’t want to talk about affordability because they don’t have a plan to fix it. So instead, they change the subject. Loudly. Ridiculously. Repeatedly. Meanwhile, Nellie Pou is focused on what actually matters to New Jersey families. Lowering costs. Investing in infrastructure. Protecting workers. Making government work for people who are just trying to get by. That contrast could not be clearer. But if we want serious leaders who talk about rent instead of foreign land grabs, we have to win here in Northern New Jersey and across the country. And winning means building the resources to compete, organize, and take back the House majority. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Together, Pou for Congress | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: The Democrats
subject: Tonight
body:
---
Derek, we’re reaching out to ask you to [**chip in directly to the DNC tonight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260215_6110_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6110_22930333_DRiqV0&akid=6110%2E22930333%2EDRiqV0) Not tomorrow, not next week, _tonight_. Here’s why: Trump is doing everything he can to make us too afraid to speak out. He’s sent the National Guard into cities. He’s weaponized the FBI and Justice Department for his own personal gain. All while he floats the idea of running for a third term. **He wants us to be overwhelmed and exhausted._We can’t let him win._** The most impactful thing any of us can do right now is work to elect as many Democrats as possible, leaders who will check Trump’s power and bring his agenda to a grinding halt. Here at the DNC, that’s exactly what we’re focused on. We’re building power across the country by expanding our organizing initiatives and investing in state parties. And we’re making it a top priority to register the next generation of voters. **It’s already working.** Just this month, Democrats have won two state legislative seats in Texas and Louisiana — in districts Trump won by double digits in 2024. [**We’re not taking our foot off the gas. To win in November, we need to continue building on this momentum and channel it into everything we do. Derek, will you join us and chip in $7 today to power our fight to elect Democrats this year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260215_6110_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6110_22930333_DRiqV0&akid=6110%2E22930333%2EDRiqV0) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260215_6110_fr&refcode2=6110_22930333_DRiqV0&akid=6110%2E22930333%2EDRiqV0)**

**What happens if your Social Security check doesn’t show up one month?**

Seriously — then what?

Washington keeps hinting at “shortfalls,” “delays,” and “cuts.” They’re not subtle. And if you’re depending on those checks to survive retirement... that’s a dangerous bet.

Because Social Security can shrink.

It can be delayed.

It can disappear faster than anyone admits.

And you have **zero control** over it.

That’s why you need a backup plan that doesn’t rely on government promises.
